That's why we're sending this exclusive survey to topMAGA patriots ONLY. Which major peace award should President Trump receive NEXT? This survey closes at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT and only the first 5,000 responses will be delivered to Trump's team at Mar-a-Lago. | | Thank you for being one of President Trump's strongest supporters. For America, MAGA Survey Team | | Paid for by Jerrod Sessler | | 600 8th St, Prosser, WA |

name: Sarah McBride
subject: What I shared on the Capitol steps
body:
I need you standing with me. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121807341/590643220/-1516755731?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjY1NDUwNWItOTJkZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V8tF5l0iUs_-AaytIrg8EL6lnz2wefH2cKyZWFneAPo=)
It’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride. I want to share what I recently shared on the Capitol steps:

I didn’t have the courage to come out until I was 21.

The truth is, I had known who I was for my entire life, and that meant 21 years of pain. 21 years of a kind of homesickness that only went away when I was finally able to get the care I needed.

My biggest regret in life is that I never had a childhood without that pain.

So many years later, I marvel at the courage of transgender young people today, who are sharing themselves with their families and this world despite the toxicity and the hate that too often comes from Congress and from the politicians inside it.

All any of us want is to live a life of purpose and happiness and wholeness, and I carry that with me every day in Congress — especially right now.

In just days, millions of Americans will see their health insurance premiums skyrocket.

And instead of doing something about it, **Mike Johnson and House Republicans just passed some of the most extreme anti-trans bills we’ve seen — including legislation that risks _jailing_ parents and doctors for affirming transgender children and following medical best practices.**

Republican politicians have made their priorities painfully clear: all they care about is making the rich richer and attacking trans people.

As the only openly trans member of Congress, I refuse to stay silent. I will keep fighting for the dignity, humanity, and fair treatment of every person in Delaware and across the country.

**But if we’re going to tackle this Republican obsession, I need you standing with me.**

**[Rush a split donation between my campaign and Derek Tran to help us keep pushing back. Every donation sends a powerful message that we won’t let Republicans get away with weaponizing trans kids as political pawns.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121807346/590643227/1639839510?refcode=em-12.22.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjY1NDUwNWItOTJkZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V8tF5l0iUs_-AaytIrg8EL6lnz2wefH2cKyZWFneAPo=)**

name: Georgia House Democrats
subject: Grateful for You — Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Impact Georgia PAC
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/96405/images/GA%20Democratic%20House%20Caucus%20logo.png]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/96405/images/Events%202025/2025%20GHDC%20Happy%20Holidays%20Blast%20%281%29.png]
As we close out the year, we’re grateful for supporters like you. Because of your support, Georgia House Democrats picked up an additional seat in a recent special election — bringing us closer to the majority in 2026, with just 10 seats to go .
We’ll continue fighting for working families and holding House Republicans accountable as affordability remains out of reach for too many Georgians. In the year ahead, we’re focused on protecting our frontline members, competing in key districts, and building a Georgia that works for everyone.
Thank you for standing with us this year. Your continued support makes this work possible.
Wishing you and your loved ones a joyful holiday season and a strong new year.
— The Team at the Georgia House Democrats
https://www.facebook.com/GAHouseDems/ [https://www.facebook.com/GAHouseDems/] https://x.com/GAHouseDems [https://x.com/GAHouseDems] https://www.instagram.com/gahousedems/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/gahousedems/?hl=en]
About The Georgia House Democrats: House Democratic Members are fighting to make Georgia more affordable and to protect our democracy for every community across the state. We are working to lower costs for working families, strengthen public schools, expand access to healthcare, and defend the freedom to vote and be heard. State legislatures are the frontline in pushing back against Donald Trump and others—through effective policy, responsible lawmaking, and real solutions that protect Georgians. In a closely divided House, every seat matters, and together we’re building the majority needed to deliver lasting progress.
Paid for by Impact Georgia PAC
Georgia House Democratic Caucus
PO Box 3370
Atlanta, GA 30302
United States

Hey folks -- this one was a _ride_. I'm back with my friend **Simon Rosenberg** , and we didn't waste a single minute. We went straight at the corruption, the cowardice, and the absolute rot that's setting in -- from celebrity grifting to media cover-ups to what 2026 could really look like if we're honest with ourselves. This conversation got blunt. If you're trying to make sense of where we are -- and what comes next -- you don't want to miss this one.
**Timestamps**
* [**00:01:44**] Nicki Minaj shows up at Turning Point -- and we break down why MAGA's celebrity grift always comes with a price tag
* [**00:07:28**] Epstein, pardons, and why accountability collapsing is killing faith in democracy
* [**00:12:34**] Democrats start naming crimes as crimes -- and why that shift actually matters
* [**00:22:00**] Barry Weiss spikes the CBS / 60 Minutes story -- and what it says about media capture
* [**00:33:19**] Simon's unfiltered 2026 preview: what should excite us, and what should scare the hell out of us

This episode covers a lot of ground -- celebrity politics, Trump's corruption machine, the media failing in real time, and why 2026 is shaping up to be a full-scale general election, not a normal midterm. If you value democracy, accountability, and winning the fights that matter, help me keep transparent conversations like this going.

With urgency,
--Mike

[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4729?t=4&akid=5159%2E35263%2EBMdUTU) RFK Jr.’s agenda is downright dangerousPeter. His agenda isn’t based in science, it’s based on partisan politics and misinformation — and it’s already an agenda that will set critical research back by decades, and puts kids’ lives at risk. Under RFK’s “ _leadership_ ” the Department of Health and Human Services has cancelled funding to reduce sudden infant deaths, improve adolescent health, prevent fetal alcohol syndrome, and identify autism early in kids. **It’s a disgrace.** The work of the American Academy of Pediatrics protecting children’s health should be a priority for every American. This isn’t a partisan issue, and their funding must not be used as a political pawn. [**The conspiracy theories peddled by RFK Jr. and his appointees are putting us all at risk. **Now, not one but _two_ recent polls show me leading my Republican opponent, Jon Husted!**

---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121808918/590670386/-1792319376?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20251222_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2JiYWNhYmQtOThkZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EQtUYyX6l65YqBEeRuQqqiQ3ogvqmLIbV8nXvHQi-0E=) Team, this is Roy Cooper, running to be North Carolina's next Senator. Our December end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is next Wednesday, and we haven’t yet met our goal, so I do have to ask for your financial support in these final days, but I also want to explain just why I keep reaching out **[(if you don’t need to read more, you can click here to give).](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121808919/590670387/-1792319376?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20251222_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2JiYWNhYmQtOThkZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EQtUYyX6l65YqBEeRuQqqiQ3ogvqmLIbV8nXvHQi-0E=)** **I ask because there’s so much work we must do for this country:** Far-right lawmakers are placing limits on who can vote and preventing women from accessing the abortion care they need. We have to stop the harm that extreme Republicans are causing. **I ask because this is the most competitive race I’ve ever run:** This is a 50-50 state. Our December end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is next Wednesday, and we haven’t yet met our goal, so I do have to ask for your financial support in these final days, but I also want to explain just why I keep reaching out = I ask because there’s so much work we must do for this country: Far-right lawmakers are placing limits on who can vote and preventing women from accessing the abortion care they need. They are slashing resources from students and educators because it’s politically convenient. They are cutting taxes for the rich by decimating health care access for the rest of us. name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: Peter: Donations will be matched to end the year strong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This is a rare opportunity to double your impact in defense of fair maps.
|
---

_Today, we're in the midst of a redistricting crisis — and our democracy needs to be actively defended every day. That's why All On The Line is now**Redistricting Action** — a grassroots movement built for the critical fights ahead. Thank you for being part of it._
Peter,
We are living at a time that requires profound and piercing clarity.
The anti-democracy forces trying to reshape our country are testing not only our institutions, but our collective capacity to defend them. They want to restrict voting rights, curtail the promise of “equal justice under law,” erase Black history, and even overturn the basic promises of our democracy.
We as a nation have confronted these deeply un-American threats before. We know, based on our not-so-distant past, that they demand an answer rooted not purely in rhetoric, but in _action_ — in the disciplined work from those who know what and whom the law can protect.
**The next few months will be crucial to preserving our representative democracy, and it is our generation’s turn to take the lead in defeating those who aim to break it. **
**That’s why I’m reaching out about a special opportunity: Thanks to a set of generous supporters,[all donations to Redistricting Action for the rest of 2025, up to $50,000, will be matched dollar for dollar to help ensure we have the necessary funds for the fights ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121809503/590681163/798345718?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGEOYMatch_email_20251222-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOYMatch_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251222-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOYMatch_&utm_campaign=AGEOYMatch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRjYzIwNzRlLTliZGYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eHbpYENPlamF_fSd8VbPBPlNiW3PAFq_u3oHZceCTQ4=)**
| **[**DOUBLE MY GIFT**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121809504/590681164/798345718?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGEOYMatch_email_20251222-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOYMatch_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251222-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOYMatch_&utm_campaign=AGEOYMatch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRjYzIwNzRlLTliZGYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eHbpYENPlamF_fSd8VbPBPlNiW3PAFq_u3oHZceCTQ4=) **
---
As you read this, the Trump administration — assisted by the United States Supreme Court — is making real the ambitions that some of the most extreme elements in our politics have harbored since the New Deal era.
We have watched as campaign finance safeguards were dismantled and anti-corruption laws cast aside.
We have seen the evisceration of the Voting Rights Act and the Court’s refusal to restrain abusive partisan gerrymandering.
Now, even what remains of the Voting Rights Act, Section 2, is hanging by a thread. It’s being threatened in ways that could legalize racial gerrymandering and shift the partisan makeup of as many as nineteen congressional seats — all through judicial fiat.
Now, I know the weight of this charge and the scale of what we’re up against can feel overwhelming.
It is only human to hope for someone else to step in. To pray for a miracle or a savior. To look to the horizon, hoping to see the cavalry coming to the rescue.
**But here is the hard truth: There are no reinforcements on the way. No “miraculous rescue” in the works. We are the cavalry. **
**Your support is a critical line of defense in the ongoing struggle to save democracy.[Make a 2X matched donation today to help fight for fairness everywhere, so we can build a democracy that truly represents the people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121809505/590681165/798345718?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGEOYMatch_email_20251222-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOYMatch_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251222-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOYMatch_&utm_campaign=AGEOYMatch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRjYzIwNzRlLTliZGYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eHbpYENPlamF_fSd8VbPBPlNiW3PAFq_u3oHZceCTQ4=)**
Sincerely,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from Redistricting Action by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. [ Privacy policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121809506/590681166/484759910?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRjYzIwNzRlLTliZGYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eHbpYENPlamF_fSd8VbPBPlNiW3PAFq_u3oHZceCTQ4=&emci=45023f98-77df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=4cc2074e-9bdf-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=8431045) and [ Terms of service. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121809507/590681167/885414598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRjYzIwNzRlLTliZGYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eHbpYENPlamF_fSd8VbPBPlNiW3PAFq_u3oHZceCTQ4=&emci=45023f98-77df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=4cc2074e-9bdf-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=8431045)
| **[**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121809508/590681169/798345718?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGEOYMatch_email_20251222-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOYMatch_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251222-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOYMatch_&utm_campaign=AGEOYMatch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRjYzIwNzRlLTliZGYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eHbpYENPlamF_fSd8VbPBPlNiW3PAFq_u3oHZceCTQ4=) **

name: Haley Stevens
subject: $5 to keep Michigan blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
It means so much to have you with me in this fight.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1700%2E49239%2EQ3Joku)

| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10696?t=2&akid=1700%2E49239%2EQ3Joku)
---
**$5.**
That's what I'm humbly asking you to **[chip in to my campaign](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10697?t=3&akid=1700%2E49239%2EQ3Joku)** before midnight on Wednesday.
| | [Chip in $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10698?t=4&akid=1700%2E49239%2EQ3Joku)
---
**$5** because I'm a lifelong Michigander who has spent my career fighting for our families, our small businesses, and our manufacturing economy. And I need your help to take this fight to the Senate.
**$5** because flipping the Senate blue is Democrats' best chance of keeping the Trump administration in check – and we simply can't do that if we lose here in Michigan.
**$5** because this race is on track to be one of the most competitive – and expensive – in the country. And I simply can't reach my critical pre-holiday fundraising goal without your help.
**I know it might not seem like much – but if everyone reading this chipped in $5, we'd get there in no time! That's the power of the grassroots movement we're building, null. It's made up of thousands of folks like you giving $5 when they can – and I really need you with me today.**
**[Can I count on you to chip in $5 – or anything at all – right now so we can keep Michigan blue and win a Democratic Senate majority next November?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10698?t=5&akid=1700%2E49239%2EQ3Joku)**
| | | [Chip in $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10698?t=6&akid=1700%2E49239%2EQ3Joku)
---
| | [Chip in another amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10697?t=7&akid=1700%2E49239%2EQ3Joku)
---
Thank you in advance for giving what you can. It means so much to have you with me in this fight.

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10699?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1700%2E49239%2EQ3Joku) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10696?t=9&akid=1700%2E49239%2EQ3Joku)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The Housing Boom Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=9329%2E5257348%2EnNECJD ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Far too many Americans are struggling to make rent or find a home they can
afford, Derek.

The problem is not that people are out of work: unemployment is still
relatively low (if rising). The problem is that people are working, and
they still can’t afford a place to live. There are simply not enough
homes, and prices are skyrocketing. I intend to do something about it —
here’s how:

I just introduced the Housing BOOM Act, my plan to help increase the
supply and accessibility of affordable housing.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=9329%2E5257348%2EnNECJD ]Sen. Adam Schiff unveils affordable housing proposal in San Francisco

We need to jumpstart a housing boom in America and massively increase the
supply of new homes. We need to bring urgency to the construction of vast
numbers of new homes. And ensure that the workers who build that housing
can live in the communities where they work. Nothing less will address the
crisis of housing unaffordability in America.

This is legislation that would make a massive new investment in building
affordable homes for middle income and lower income families to make it
possible for young people to own a home or be able to pay their rent.
After WWII, we built millions of new homes for returning GI’s. We did it
quickly and affordably. And we can do it again.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1005&akid=9329%2E5257348%2EnNECJD ]I’m going to keep working to make California — and the country —
affordable, especially so that families can have a place to live and call
home. If you support my work to expand the supply of affordable housing,
please pitch in to power this type of work.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q42025_abs_em.jZ5GRf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=9329%2E5257348%2EnNECJD ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=q42025_abs_em.jmTwmA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=9329%2E5257348%2EnNECJD ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q42025_abs_em.fmwQtt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=9329%2E5257348%2EnNECJD ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q42025_abs_em.z9ptV2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=9329%2E5257348%2EnNECJD ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q42025_abs_em.oB7ZBD&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=9329%2E5257348%2EnNECJD ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q42025_abs_em.aHbpL5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=9329%2E5257348%2EnNECJD ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

This is the type of bold, pragmatic legislation we need to be passing to
make a real difference for families across the country. And Democrats need
to lead the way — while Republicans fight amongst themselves.

With your support, we’ll make it happen.

Thank you,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=9329%2E5257348%2EnNECJD ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=q42025_abs_em.Iv4c2K&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1013&akid=9329%2E5257348%2EnNECJD ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=9329%2E5257348%2EnNECJD ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=9329%2E5257348%2EnNECJD ]Privacy Policy

name: Mike Johnson, 56th Speaker of the House
subject: We’ve made a unanimous decision.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
All you have to do is accept
I'm not alone in believing you truly deserve this. My colleagues and I at House GOP Headquarters were all in agreement.
In fact, we've made a unanimous decision.
If there's anyone who has a record worthy of this, it's you.

name: James Talarico
subject: We’re not taking Latino voters for granted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
In the 2024 election, the Democratic Party lost major ground with Latino voters — particularly in the southern part of Texas.
The National Democratic Party took this community for granted. They stopped showing up. And as a result, look what happened in recent election cycles...
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-pulido.UAobsh&refcode=em251222-2-ak&t=1&akid=337%2E1347274%2Eli8xAs)
**If we’re going to win Texas, we have to win South Texas.**
That’s why I traveled there right after we launched this campaign. And it’s why we are investing major resources toward winning this critical region.
This week, I traveled back to one of my favorite places in South Texas: the Rio Grande Valley.
**I was joined by Bobby Pulido, the Tejano superstar who’s stepping up to run for Congress in one of next year’s most important races.**
We held a rally with a united message: We’re going to show up, we’re going to listen, and we’re not going to take Latino voters and South Texas voters for granted.
[**Will you help us build on our momentum by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Bobby Pulido’s to make sure we win in South Texas and take back power for working people?**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-pulido.UAobsh&refcode=em251222-2-ak&t=2&akid=337%2E1347274%2Eli8xAs)
[DONATE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-pulido.UAobsh&refcode=em251222-2-ak&t=3&akid=337%2E1347274%2Eli8xAs)
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-pulido.UAobsh&refcode=em251222-2-ak&refcode2=337.1347274.li8xAs&t=4&akid=337%2E1347274%2Eli8xAs)_Bobby and I with Carlos Eduardo Espina, one of the biggest Latino social media influencers in the country._
My family is from South Texas. My grandad was born in Bishop. My grandmother was born in Port Lavaca. My dad grew up in Corpus Christi, and my mom grew up in Laredo.
They raised me with South Texas values: freedom, family, and faith. Those are the values I’ve fought for in the Texas Legislature. And those are the values that Bobby and I will take to our nation’s Capitol.
John Cornyn, Ken Paxton, and Bobby’s opponent Monica de la Cruz claim to stand for freedom, family, and faith.
* But you can’t stand for freedom and control what we say, what we read, and what we do with our own bodies.

* You can’t stand for family and vote against paid family leave, affordable childcare, and neighborhood public schools.

* And you can't stand for faith and sell out the sick, the poor, and the vulnerable so you can cut taxes for the rich.

DC Republicans don’t stand for freedom, family, and faith. They stand for control, cruelty, and corruption.
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-pulido.UAobsh&refcode=em251222-2-ak&refcode2=337.1347274.li8xAs&t=5&akid=337%2E1347274%2Eli8xAs)_Our joint rally in Weslaco, Texas._
In the last election, Republican politicians showed up in South Texas and made big promises.
* They promised to make everything less expensive.

* They promised to put working families first.

* They promised to drain the swamp.

I have dear friends and family members in South Texas who voted for Republicans because of those promises. And I get it, I want those things too. Every Texan does.
But look what’s happened just one year since the election:
* Everything is more expensive.

* Working families are falling further behind.

* And corruption in Washington is the worst it’s ever been.

As Bobby and I talk to voters in South Texas, this is our #1 message to them:**If you feel like you’ve been conned, if you feel like you’ve been let down by both political parties — you’ve got a place in this campaign.**
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-pulido.UAobsh&refcode=em251222-2-ak&t=6&akid=337%2E1347274%2Eli8xAs)
Bobby and I are both coming up on our most important FEC deadline in our campaigns so far.
When this deadline passes, we’ll have to report how much we raised, and our opponents will be looking to see whether we have a strong enough grassroots movement to win in South Texas.
[**Please split a contribution between my campaign and Bobby’s today to help us show the strength of our campaigns and the strength of our movement in South Texas.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-pulido.UAobsh&refcode=em251222-2-ak&t=7&akid=337%2E1347274%2Eli8xAs)
[DONATE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-pulido.UAobsh&refcode=em251222-2-ak&t=8&akid=337%2E1347274%2Eli8xAs)
Mil gracias, y se vale soñar!
James

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761

name: David Hogg
subject: My decision on running for office
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Here’s my answer...
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251222-1&t=1&akid=2972%2E587540%2EjqZcMM)
Peter,
I was recently asked in an interview if I was planning to run for office.
My answer? **Hell, no.**
The idea for Leaders We Deserve started back in 2022 when now Congressman Maxwell Frost was first running for office and I came on board to help him raise money. He was a young candidate, driving Uber at night so he could afford to spend his days campaigning and talking to voters. He didn’t have the resources or family wealth connections that were practically required if you wanted to run a serious campaign. I didn’t have family wealth either, but I had a network (including donors like you, who I didn’t know personally but who were aware of my work on gun safety and could give Maxwell $10) and knew I could help him fundraise and win his race. As you know, he beat all the odds to win his election and become the first Gen-Z member of Congress.
So, yeah I could run for office and, if elected, join Rep. Frost as one of only two Gen-Z members of Congress. But here’s the reality: I think constantly about how to strengthen the progressive movement and advance gun safety so we can prevent the next Parkland from ever happening. If I ran for office and won, nearly everything I care about would be blocked by the filibuster. I would be just one vote at best, while Republicans would raise millions by fear-mongering about me “taking people’s guns.” Rather than pouring enormous resources into my own campaign to become a single vote, my efforts are far better spent helping elect exceptional young leaders across the country so that no matter what, the work continues.
That is why I know I can make a much bigger difference through our work at Leaders We Deserve, where we’re helping elect _dozens_ of incredibly talented young leaders every year. Young leaders all across the country who will give hope to a generation that has been ignored, who will combat gun violence and the climate crisis, and who will energize the Democratic party and turn us back into a winning coalition in 2026 and beyond.
I also know that this movement goes far beyond the impact any one person can have. We are not building a cult of personality at Leaders We Deserve, we’re building a lasting movement that is ushering the next generation of leaders into power. If something were to happen to me, this work would continue — and the bench of progressive champions we’re supporting would keep on fighting for our future.
My focus is 100% on electing the leaders who will transform the Democratic Party into the force it should be. But I need your help to do that. With the support of people who give $5, $10, $20 we can give our candidates something rare: the independence to represent their constituents instead of special interests. And with your help we are also giving a generation something we have not had for most of our lives: the hope that just maybe the best is still yet to come for America. Hope that while the system is broken there are actually a few good younger people who are fighting for the right thing.
**[Peter, can I count on you to make a $5 contribution to power our work?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251222_1_running.1ySRRy&refcode=em20251222-2972&amount=5&t=2&akid=2972%2E587540%2EjqZcMM)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251222_1_running.1ySRRy&amount=5&refcode=em20251222-2972&t=21&akid=2972%2E587540%2EjqZcMM)**
Thank you for your support,
David
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251222-1&t=22&refcode2=2972_587540_jqZcMM&akid=2972%2E587540%2EjqZcMM)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

clean_body: Here’s my answer... Peter, I was recently asked in an interview if I was planning to run for office. My answer? Hell, no. The idea for Leaders We Deserve started back in 2022 when now Congressman Maxwell Frost was first running for office and I came on board to help him raise money. He was a young candidate, driving Uber at night so he could afford to spend his days campaigning and talking to voters. He didn’t have the resources or family wealth connections that were practically required if you wanted to run a serious campaign. I didn’t have family wealth either, but I had a network (including donors like you, who I didn’t know personally but who were aware of my work on gun safety and could give Maxwell $10) and knew I could help him fundraise and win his race. As you know, he beat all the odds to win his election and become the first Gen-Z member of Congress. So, yeah I could run for office and, if elected, join Rep. Frost as one of only two Gen-Z members of Congress. But here’s the reality: I think constantly about how to strengthen the progressive movement and advance gun safety so we can prevent the next Parkland from ever happening. If I ran for office and won, nearly everything I care about would be blocked by the filibuster. I would be just one vote at best, while Republicans would raise millions by fear-mongering about me “taking people’s guns.” Rather than pouring enormous resources into my own campaign to become a single vote, my efforts are far better spent helping elect exceptional young leaders across the country so that no matter what, the work continues. That is why I know I can make a much bigger difference through our work at Leaders We Deserve, where we’re helping elect dozens of incredibly talented young leaders every year. Young leaders all across the country who will give hope to a generation that has been ignored, who will combat gun violence and the climate crisis, and who will energize the Democratic party and turn us back into a winning coalition in 2026 and beyond. I also know that this movement goes far beyond the impact any one person can have. We are not building a cult of personality at Leaders We Deserve, we’re building a lasting movement that is ushering the next generation of leaders into power. If something were to happen to me, this work would continue — and the bench of progressive champions we’re supporting would keep on fighting for our future. My focus is 100% on electing the leaders who will transform the Democratic Party into the force it should be. But I need your help to do that. With the support of people who give $5, $10, $20 we can give our candidates something rare: the independence to represent their constituents instead of special interests. And with your help we are also giving a generation something we have not had for most of our lives: the hope that just maybe the best is still yet to come for America. Hope that while the system is broken there are actually a few good younger people who are fighting for the right thing. Thank you for your support, David

name: Justice Democrats
subject: re: the DNC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Did you see this, Peter?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251222-2.QdkKPx&refcode=em20251222-37301&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37301%2E1203867%2EjSKWyH ]Screenshot of a New York Times headline reading: 'The D.N.C. Is
Scrapping Its Report on What Went Wrong in 2024.' The subheadline reads:
'Ken Martin, the Democratic National Committee chairman, ordered the
autopsy months ago but is now said to believe that its release would be
counterproductive for the party.'

That’s right: after promising to listen, reflect, and research what went
wrong to hand Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans a trifecta in Washington
last November, the Democratic National Committee (DNC) is shelving its
post-election report.

As usual, we’re disappointed but not surprised. The Democratic
establishment has learned absolutely nothing.

Until Democratic leaders are willing to take on — not cash in — their
corporate and billionaire mega-donors, stop enabling a genocide on behalf
of the Israel lobby, and start prioritizing the working class, they can’t
expect the people to trust in or vote for them.

That’s why Justice Democrats is working to clean up shop in the Democratic
Party by supporting progressive candidates in the 2026 primary elections,
including Melat Kiros in Colorado’s 1st district.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251222-2.QdkKPx&refcode=em20251222-37301&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37301%2E1203867%2EjSKWyH ]A post on X from Melat Kiros for Congress, CO-1 (@MelatKirosCO) reads:
'This BS is why my generation is stepping up and running. We cannot afford
another cycle of Dem leadership that patronizes and ignores the will of
its voters. We won in November in spite of the establishment and we’ll do
the same in ‘26. It’s time to clean house.' It is quoting a post from
Shane Goldmacher (@ShaneGoldmacher) reading: 'NEWS: The DNC is killing off
its 2024 autopsy. DNC Chairman Ken Martin has decided not to publish a
public report, believing that a backward-looking document would be
counterproductive as the party has started winning....'

But if we’re going to clean house and create the Party we deserve, our
slate of eight primary candidates needs an influx of grassroots support
NOW before the primaries begin in March.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251222-2.QdkKPx&refcode=em20251222-37301&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1004&akid=37301%2E1203867%2EjSKWyH ]Can we count on you to chip in $5 or more to help us
send eight more Justice Democrats to reshape the Democratic Party in
Congress next year?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251222-2.QdkKPx&refcode=em20251222-37301&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1023&akid=37301%2E1203867%2EjSKWyH ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251222-37301-footer&t=1024&refcode2=37301_1203867_jSKWyH&akid=37301%2E1203867%2EjSKWyH

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. ---
Dear Friends,

Christmas is a season of hope — a reminder that even in uncertain times, light still shines.

We celebrate the birth of Christ, whose coming brought peace, redemption, and the promise of new life. His message continues to guide us, calling us to faith, compassion, and trust in God’s plan.

This season also reminds us of the strength found in family — around dinner tables, in shared traditions, and in the simple moments that bind generations together. These are the values that endure, shaping who we are and how we move forward.

As we look ahead, I am encouraged by the people of Oregon who remain grounded in faith, committed to family, and hopeful for the future. Your steadfast dedication gives me confidence that better days are ahead.

May this Christmas fill your heart with peace, your home with joy, and your spirit with renewed hope.

>From my family to yours, Merry Christmas.

God bless you,

Connie Whelchel
Chair, Oregon Republican Party

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friends, Christmas is a season of hope — a reminder that even in uncertain times, light still shines. We celebrate the birth of Christ, whose coming brought peace, redemption, and the promise of new life. His message continues to guide us, calling us to faith, compassion, and trust in God’s plan. This season also reminds us of the strength found in family — around dinner tables, in shared traditions, and in the simple moments that bind generations together. These are the values that endure, shaping who we are and how we move forward. As we look ahead, I am encouraged by the people of Oregon who remain grounded in faith, committed to family, and hopeful for the future. Your steadfast dedication gives me confidence that better days are ahead. May this Christmas fill your heart with peace, your home with joy, and your spirit with renewed hope. From my family to yours, Merry Christmas. God bless you, Connie Whelchel Chair, Oregon Republican Party Stay up to date with the latest campaign updates and Oregon news by following us on social media! | | | | | | PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (FEC COMMITTEE ID C00153031) 732 HAWTHORNE AVE. name: Adam Schiff
subject: The gravity of the situation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Hi Peter, this is Adam Schiff.
Lately, I’ve been thinking a lot about the gravity of the situation we’re facing.
I want to share some thoughts with you — but before I do, will you pitch in any amount to my campaign and Zoe Lofgren before our end-of-quarter deadline?
PITCH IN >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zl-adam-schiff-split-q42025?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-12-22_ASF_WFL_ES-38583]
We are living in unprecedented times. Never before has our country faced such deep threats to our democracy.
Health insurance costs are ballooning because they took money out of health care for a tax cut for rich people. People are worried about making ends meet. Housing costs are skyrocketing.
Meanwhile, Trump and his allies in Congress are more interested in going after their rivals than fixing these economic crises.
It's a lot, and I understand why you might want a break.
But we can’t afford to disengage or turn away. There are too many important fights that we must continue to wage — for an economy that works for everyone, for our democracy, and for the health and safety of us all.
The future is not set; it is up to us, and we can make all the difference.
And there are good reasons for hope. Millions of Americans have come out to protest against the president. Courts are ruling in our favor. And we scored important victories last month in California, New Jersey, and Virginia.
To prepare for the battles ahead, I'm humbly asking for your support today. So Peter, can I count on you to chip in any amount you can to Zoe Lofgren and me to support my fight to defend our democracy and deliver for working people? Your support makes a huge difference ahead of our quarterly deadline.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zl-adam-schiff-split-q42025?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-12-22_ASF_WFL_ES-38583]
Thank you for being part of this grassroots team and having my back every step of the way.
— Adam
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help.
Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q42025?refcode=emfooter&amount=25]
Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
Lofgren for Congress
PO Box 913
San Jose, CA 95113
United States

name: Quick Poll via Team Furman
subject: DO YOU SUPPORT THIS WARRIOR DIVIDEND?
disclaimer_text: Paid For by Commander Jay Furman for Congress |
body:
Peter,

name: Unite4Freedom
subject: Big News for 2026 - Help Us Launch Our National Gathering
body:
Unite4Freedom will continue shining a light on election truth next year!
|
---
Dear Peter, Unite4Freedom will continue shining a light on election truth next year! As we look forward to celebrating this season and starting the new year, we’re excited to announce another major milestone: Unite4Freedom is planning our third national conference in early 2026. Bigger and better than ever, this gathering will bring volunteers, researchers, data analysts, leaders, speakers, and supporters together to learn, train, and collaborate. By unifying the people in our movement, we maximize our impact and amplify your voices. Will you help us launch the conference?
---
| [ **Contribute to Our Efforts** ](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VVxTBJ4V35pZN4d7Rm652vNLW5n2k0f5Hp_3-M_h9pH3m2nnW7lCdLW6lZ3nTW9ly1R41YGy7xVvMZc48cr6GdW6qj9mW4c0fbBVj-fly1GQBBtW3Y1G5N2nWJTGN7Kj7s_Qwd-3W48bvRt7LqQXRN39_m1S6sWljW5_q6lX7C1LNZW1lv1Wr6fQcMBN62KpGFxWpN1W4Z_t8S55gXqhW6KND4N8z5K7gW1ytwK35KkkPWW62GCGl7xcD9TW7TpSv113wTV7W75yP_h2LcYbfN6vz62Kt0hmnW2hvWRv4xNTYNW25yRtJ2sZ1gpW1yCZVS7bzrrlW1BLKCG4YKgvDW1zGDJ55d99B-N5H-Rxc4qpP-f4Jd7FM04)
---
We’re also seeking sponsors and guest speakers. If you know businesses or foundations who may support this event, please reply with your recommendations. And tell us what you want to learn and what speakers you want to hear at the conference—your input shapes the agenda. After you [donate](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VVxTBJ4V35pZN4d7Rm652vNLW5n2k0f5Hp_3-M_h9pH3m2nnW7lCdLW6lZ3lcW7JJkCD6DxcMJW3R8BN56zY3nnW4P00FH96X1NxW4kN2pf68hbtfW5zxpn62v2k5xN5fWtc9rBYclW2GfjrG47GqW1W2jYhmQ3TGCsnW70ygXW28bG58W71Fp1C6mn2s9W7tjQkG7WPX8gW70JRQL6WkPZQW4NTKz23nZ6zWW7MXjh-31WD1LW6JP6_c95DJwKN9m2xGTC2PJpW5-Fr5s1l3QYzW3RWxHw6FHqdHW8WD9ql7m_1G4N7XMXzb31-xRW73NHMV1vtd-TW77Jkx55ZQY2hW3wkRwp8WxjHFW1qSWbS37yh7-f1Q32Jl04), please reply to this email to share your thoughts.
---
|
---
A season of giving. A season of purpose. A season to strengthen the movement. Please keep a look out for future emails as we report back to you on the progress we are making to restore our elections. Unite4Freedom wishes you a very merry holiday season!
---
With Gratitude, Sheila Coombes, Director, [Unite4Freedom](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VVxTBJ4V35pZN4d7Rm652vNLW5n2k0f5Hp_3-M_h9pn3m2nnW6N1vHY6lZ3lJM34kcr44hf5N475tRtdPWKKN10JkLc_dcM_W4VZ4sr33HPc7W8mhpB-5ZpdjvW57RxLW2dZz4_W58xGp21PQthWW5K3wjp3gk5y4W1GcltC6nl1szW81Kyxl347JtvW8253j91zlLc0W6Fjsqh4tL5jFW6T44Gz6v4TbvW2bfzmf1TnRNBVSBWw_2_pFsKW7G1MPN1nd7kGW5-t--K3FtZtQW1sMS023QV8NfW2CBW_S2ZpDS9W8bhgvG5QDDvLW6d_6yF4ZD_dkW8Lg5wv3Cfzl7f1S7sHW04)

clean_body: Unite4Freedom will continue shining a light on election truth next year! | Dear Peter, Unite4Freedom will continue shining a light on election truth next year! As we look forward to celebrating this season and starting the new year, we’re excited to announce another major milestone: Unite4Freedom is planning our third national conference in early 2026. Bigger and better than ever, this gathering will bring volunteers, researchers, data analysts, leaders, speakers, and supporters together to learn, train, and collaborate. By unifying the people in our movement, we maximize our impact and amplify your voices. Will you help us launch the conference? | We’re also seeking sponsors and guest speakers. If you know businesses or foundations who may support this event, please reply with your recommendations. And tell us what you want to learn and what speakers you want to hear at the conference—your input shapes the agenda. After you , please reply to this email to share your thoughts. | A season of giving. A season of purpose. A season to strengthen the movement. Please keep a look out for future emails as we report back to you on the progress we are making to restore our elections. Unite4Freedom wishes you a very merry holiday season! With Gratitude, Sheila Coombes, Director, | Unite4Freedom, a program of United Sovereign Americans, Inc., a 501(c)(4) nonprofit organization, Suite 194, 167 LAMP & LANTERN VILLAGE, CHESTERFIELD, MO 63017

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to childrenâ€™s entertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4uvs9tamgi9rmf80f5rb013npog5jp6n59ghof0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5ieco31c3h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoekcfrv450619241hvm1l696ak9bo4dri8cvum8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5ieco31c3h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z36k5891otnf38cjc0cdeo8c6scttlrk4egv6egg_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5ieco31c3h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z21gaf4pi5433j8b8e9b678ulrkajh7oplilgv98_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5ieco31c3h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zstita056e1ni6n3geglfrc6u10i8oqjdf0h79tg_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5ieco31c3h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7javu4g6122c8admq2p1l218fc6u4cgsioefvlg_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5ieco31c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo21efubtic1dtnd4kfnl0f7u7b4ebpaioft7n30_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5ieco31c3h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsvt09jvd46urpeg50l0o015hp5ko85qcd18uan0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5ieco31c3h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

---

---

---

subject: His words are now our mission
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ahpi7s8facnur9546h0int4stgkn8j6jhsr8f0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5ie6or2c5h2bs)
---

---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdq0d01phjim094ooupbhguhq473magbjoscac50_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5ie6or2c5h2bs)

Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. [**Make your gift to join Turning Point USA today, and we'll send you your FREE copy of ****_How We Win_**** today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za2m7nhthncp4k0mh4nq33fvaglv2qbavot1c9qg_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5ie6or2c5h2bs)

name: Violence in Colorado
subject: On Jan 31 MAGA rioters plan to break Tina Peters out of a CO Jail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
The next January 6th? MAGA plans to apply maximum force against Colorado until we budge on releasing Tina Peters.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cW1O2Dv1SieWbr8jXu9Xpdw2QeH1x1Wtvidy2X2SCZQytgpWWK930FCt1TN7g34GLxWvGcD4urwpCs53NZmax6iOaO78bnUQd55vE0bRuWR8yNFdQYkLZEhX9ED5ahU-c-m52R8wLS9uGGjUnWcfioaL1ZF77BndAXXgKCM807mSGPZ0o0eyFZbJkwSlfWf4yv61aCySACRjVx3ymhINLm0xzW_YfO2s&c=k0FNx8Haea4mISWszeSwaxkI4cbC2dvSEzUpDnrZwrmlsQKxwKSVcA==&ch=nMaEODSzh_APY-VwWSBjJvK1-MVQanCKWZvPFda6OGRFXOVHurNbsA==)
---
|

Peter,
Last week President Trump "pardoned" Tina Peters, the former Mesa County Clerk who was convicted by a Colorado jury for her role in a major security breach of her election equipment.
Trump however does not have the authority to have her pardoned. Since she was convicted at the state level, only the Governor of Colorado can do this. And because their fake pardon is going nowhere some are now suggesting violence is the next solution for freeing Peters.
On January 31, MAGA extremists led by Jake Lang, a white nationalist and convicted January 6th rioter, will attempt to violently break Peters out of the Colorado jail where she is being held. They are calling this planned rally - Bastille Day:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cW1O2Dv1SieWbr8jXu9Xpdw2QeH1x1Wtvidy2X2SCZQytgpWWK930FCt1TN7g34GLxWvGcD4urwpCs53NZmax6iOaO78bnUQd55vE0bRuWR8yNFdQYkLZEhX9ED5ahU-c-m52R8wLS9uGGjUnWcfioaL1ZF77BndAXXgKCM807mSGPZ0o0eyFZbJkwSlfWf4yv61aCySACRjVx3ymhINLmCSF0MpdF2r&c=k0FNx8Haea4mISWszeSwaxkI4cbC2dvSEzUpDnrZwrmlsQKxwKSVcA==&ch=nMaEODSzh_APY-VwWSBjJvK1-MVQanCKWZvPFda6OGRFXOVHurNbsA==)
---

MAGA plans to apply maximum pressure, including the use of force, against Colorado until releasing Peters. Just yesterday it was reported that the decision to strip CO of the National Science Foundations' National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR) was likely a decision driven by the Peters ordeal.
Lauren Boebert is Peters' fiercest champion: she dined with her on the day she committed her crime, encouraged her to do it, and is now rallying her base around the need to free Peters from prison, just like she rallied her base to storm the Capitol.
Violence in Colorado may be imminent and it is exactly what the Trump administration and Lauren Boebert, Peters' fiercest champion wants.
We can't wait for Coloradans to get injured or worse because of Boebert. We must take away the pulpit she uses to call for violence.
Boebert is only in Congress because of a 546 vote margin and is beyond vulnerable. In 2024, her Democratic opponent, Trisha Calvarese had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
[We need your support to continue building the campaign that will defeat her. Please can you make a donation of $25, $10, or even $5 to help Trisha Calvarese defeat Boebert and take away the podium that she is using to escalate American political violence?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cW1O2Dv1SieWbr8jXu9Xpdw2QeH1x1Wtvidy2X2SCZQytgpWWK930FCt1TN7g34G795WaxMOSnr3P5E5Mz1_HCVbQHqFJlvrBPzai93L1kSUdvq-IiH0mY1sESo9kqRY63kF_eJ7VLabzdeG48quQ9y7rZBpfXlIB7i3h1adFx2v98CTvufK34d_fdpcKxa3i2n7kUISetoLqomvre0RUGzoBkVZYuncQme1Qh99NkpcjWAk-6xQHg==&c=k0FNx8Haea4mISWszeSwaxkI4cbC2dvSEzUpDnrZwrmlsQKxwKSVcA==&ch=nMaEODSzh_APY-VwWSBjJvK1-MVQanCKWZvPFda6OGRFXOVHurNbsA==)

In 2024, her Democratic opponent, Trisha Calvarese had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Lauren Boebert must be stopped and with your support we can do it. body:

|
Peter,
This movement is snowballing, and I couldn't be prouder of what we're building together.

---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fku8exYB7FMLwahQQRsb1iTQTdrxlltgIP7Lesw0fHBLARuzXq4maESEokztf2gVEt4Twi3mRK3glAXgI_zltEzXqLevE7Upt5cwGFGnSPFUwvEVAAaxeIWQL08GdEaue2yshR_9R_ASVKkwOJ1adZ-9qzx8GUckhG-bi47RV87-RyXiH0F18WGgeCaxGT5LaGtDqUZqhFnCKWVypjY0Ia4qhEJhaHwp&c=JDu_PBhWad2uuSJdlY42TjhguCvPUGb4wG7JqXUHnrZhnFuDereQTw==&ch=F_w0CAB1nc83hViBMViyJqLvbgN6qf23rS7zFVmGbMSOvK-kNW_ZOQ==)
---
|
We have earned over two dozen endorsements from community leaders and organizations. We're one of the top-funded campaigns in this race with nearly $750,000 raised in total from over 7,500 unique donors from across the country. With over 500 volunteers already, we were able to secure a place on the ballot without having to pay a single canvasser to collect them for us. And we've had 190 meet and greets, attended by over 2,000 people who've made it loud and clear: they want a congressperson with consistency, credibility and relationships.
The people of IL-9 are coalescing around our vision for a better kind of politics, one rooted in optimism and focused on improving the lives of our neighbors.

---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fku8exYB7FMLwahQQRsb1iTQTdrxlltgIP7Lesw0fHBLARuzXq4maESEokztf2gVEt4Twi3mRK3glAXgI_zltEzXqLevE7Upt5cwGFGnSPFUwvEVAAaxeIWQL08GdEaue2yshR_9R_ASVKkwOJ1adZ-9qzx8GUckhG-bi47RV87-RyXiH0F18WGgeCaxGT5LaGtDqUZqhFlSNEJq9F_RDT3Um0kJ4v2l&c=JDu_PBhWad2uuSJdlY42TjhguCvPUGb4wG7JqXUHnrZhnFuDereQTw==&ch=F_w0CAB1nc83hViBMViyJqLvbgN6qf23rS7zFVmGbMSOvK-kNW_ZOQ==)
---
|
Now, we need to keep the momentum rolling into the holiday season--a time when campaign fundraising often slows down, but our movement can't afford to.
I know the holiday season this year will be hard for many families. The Trump administration's ignorance and indifference to the consequences of their own policies are driving up costs for everyday Americans. That's why one of my top priorities when I get to Congress is to tackle the affordability crisis head-on for working families who have been left behind.
[If you're able, I'd be grateful if you could make a contribution today of any size to help keep up our movement's snowballing momentum.](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fku8exYB7FMLwahQQRsb1iTQTdrxlltgIP7Lesw0fHBLARuzXq4maESEokztf2gVEt4Twi3mRK3glAXgI_zltEzXqLevE7Upt5cwGFGnSPFUwvEVAAaxeIWQL08GdEaue2yshR_9R_ASVKkwOJ1adZ-9qzx8GUckhG-bi47RV87-RyXiH0F18WGgeCaxGT5LaGtDqUZqhFlgv1CDkjwqGcEC2PXcWA6o&c=JDu_PBhWad2uuSJdlY42TjhguCvPUGb4wG7JqXUHnrZhnFuDereQTw==&ch=F_w0CAB1nc83hViBMViyJqLvbgN6qf23rS7zFVmGbMSOvK-kNW_ZOQ==)

name: The Flyover
subject: New Battleships, The Horseman, and a Christmas Cookie Map
body:
President Trump announced plans to build a new fleet of Navy battleships called the "Trump class," starting with [two ships](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAURb8GO4w8UNmCYhu72XZLA_oUNggG3oyZv9-4v7DdSW5yb879fswPG2JI-5c90NCW54RXjUiE5UZniSJWH85KHn0uFQ-bZuig5wI4yHm1Ib5n1axmQwSUDRoxDoPSo9ZD402vUQjrFvUhJWrR61GrwQ2gEMWoFt0Ec7cJAClEp5RsBxBWObcItcjebcBUh2ugXNqfHBJ53OI7v7C0Sz6aaDzRWZn8ZDAxmK7rahdXb4s7ZzDdyGCi8jxO7nGvSJ7blPIzLXhgIn7Ywi2Pds_8NnXPENeQdgZTU8x6XiHGUIeRqW4_bIh_u_Svs14GfgMAAP__Fo5_0w) he described as the largest battleships ever constructed.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkcuunDAMQL8m7BiBkwG6YFFpyqq3lbpo1RUKiZm4ygMlZtD9-4pqRv2Au7N8LB8_fr3Nb5o8xfs3HXDkNc0Rj-KRGfMZLprZY3G0FXboUi4YdJyhgWvdQg1ytpr8-6wqO66IgLLCse27Tg39MHSVG9e1k6itbHschuXarPCp7xUYuXZ2wF5WNJ7dWgDZto1S8tJBq9WymFYZeV1WEKpBS5zy5U-iyA5X_54emC8mhcqPjnkrQn4WMAmYjuO4eHpgSAEjp72cVQImS8WkPbKAafr6-_vPLz-EnDJaymhYyJuAySTv0TClWARMxaWtPohdzXnHgFZAt3OYS9qzQSFv_w_1JAEt7UHIW9lSNCk-00aHTdM9Cnl7Dv4CKTLGU24yaqaItXF4lJewyqPdDvKeStcL1dyDJv9vaf7Qpx4j_A0AAP__P-mtvQ) | |
# Tuesday, December 23, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1783, after the Treaty of Paris was signed, [Gen. George Washington resigned](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1utDAQAJ_GdCC89hm-wsUnRXSXNiXyz3LeyOCTvTrE20eXV0g31Yw0X_f17ijT8fh0O1reynrg2TIyY32jd8wZW6Jn44Sp1Ia7O1YY4dZL6EGt0VG-Vt1FuyECqg6tnIzR8zTPpks24gj_pAaQAaJx2k-zuY16dHoGH2DqyL5tEkBJOWqtBgPSae-D1EHd_AZCjxiJSx2-Cx2ccMtXeWEdQtm7bBPzswn1X8AiYDnPc8glDI_yErAQ4y5g4RLd1dPRJ2pc6iVgiRhw91h7UEItuYRchfpAxyV21cbnSTlTM5PQ42N3lH9j_KdDLws_AQAA__-_gHoL) as commander in chief of the Continental Army and returned to his home at Mount Vernon, Virginia. _Love Actually_ is a beloved Christmas classic--but the storyline involving Emma Thompson's character discovering her husband's infidelity has always unsettled viewers, as we report in the _Holiday Section_. Now, fans are noticing an additional [heartbreaking detail](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu2zAMQE8jbwpkSrHdwUMXb79rR4Oy6IitLAUSkSC3L9Qr_IV4AImHB_7-2r-QE-fHL7xolbPsmd4tkQjVjh5FErXIzyaRYqmNLsw7GLjrETTYPSCnz-6GsJ5EQHagdZynyS3zskxDXO0PMy_zaa3zhzlnb809mMWagyZzeoMDr902AthxNM7Z2wQjOu-P0R327k9QzlBgKfX2p3CWSGf6lBfV21GuIa1R5NmU_algU7Dlz7M06SsFWxcr2Ebo3AdloSrI-aIsCrbIIVDWgQQ5ac7aUyovCvqIlZtc2PRVXkxaIop-c0raV8K_-sTcdCSs0jSmpHuPxgdyVrANdQ3PfsxtmpUzjws5_a-Vb734tcK_AAAA__-I8pFF) that makes that famous scene even more devastating. ## Trump Announces New Navy Battleship Fleet
President Trump announced plans to build a new fleet of Navy battleships called the "Trump class," starting with [two ships](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAURb8GO4w8UNmCYhu72XZLA_oUNggG3oyZv9-4v7DdSW5yb879fswPG2JI-5c90NCW54RXjUiE5UZniSJWH85KHn0uFQ-bZuig5wI4yHm1Ib5n1axmQwSUDRoxDoPSo9ZD402vUQjrFvUhJWrR61GrwQ2gEMWoFt0Ec7cJAClEp5RsBxBWObcItcjebcBUh2ugXNqfHBJ53OI7v7C0Sz6aaDzRWZn8ZDAxmK7rahdXb4s7ZzDdyGCi8jxO7nGvSJ7blPIzLXhgIn7Ywi2Pds_8NnXPENeQdgZTU8x6XiHGUIeRqW4_bIh_u_Svs14GfgMAAP__Fo5_0w) he described as the largest battleships ever constructed. Speaking from Mar-a-Lago, Trump said the ships have been under design consideration since his first term and will be part of the Pentagon's "[Golden Fleet](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u3CAUhJ8Gd1jmwPVPQbFJZKW5KbJFSoufw5oEgwV4rX37yPsKtzpHM9Jo5vvzuXwqH3x8_FIbyurSEvEsAWvFfL1a1RqwrH4vdcU15YKbigt08EEZUOCLVT68FtFY6RABeYOSDX0vxmEc-2aVk-6H0SgxCaUNF26ynUaYOjt0Zpqcbby80hgAZ6wTgrc9MCW0NkwY_qEdENGh9TXl9m_ysa7owis9MbcmbU2Qa617IfxGYCYwn-fZbiVeHoEZIz0KgXlLEV_XVfkf1ks5Cq2J6sMHS2s-tp2aoEqhp8rvtdSlTB8pWIzUBcRKYFaZ3m7s_lt__0n4nIy3hP_4dsHDs9wx702Wdj99CL70AxHdY1M-vGvWL7F9SvgfAAD__x6Yj8k)," with plans to ultimately build 20 to 25 vessels. Secretary of the Navy John Phelan said the first ship, the _USS Defiant_ , will be "the largest, deadliest, and most versatile" warship on the world's oceans, describing it as an updated version of the Iowa-class battleship. The president said construction should take about [two-and-a-half years](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOnTAQhJ8Guj3CFy5_4SIN3UmbEhm8HDtabGQvEN4-IlX6vxtpRqP55td7ettAIX5-2g0Nr2mKeBVCZsyPnC0zYfFhL-zRp1xws3GSjWxBSJBqcjbQPenamRVRoqrRiL7r9NAPQ1d7I1qtlHaz7WTv1PDlLH61rpmxb-3SaayDedqElEqIRmv16qSwep4XoRfVzqusdIMucMqv3ylE9rjSnU7MryVtNRnPvJdK_ajkWMnxuq7Xmv48FI9fyXFPFDgspZIj52Pb4YgnBirwSeQwwkqIDNGeN_xHC5wOLsAeN9hSRtjThXk9CNjbCDbe8OQAT8wwH4G4zsbtVyAKpesr3Xw2G-jfRv7WsaeRfwMAAP__TS-SVQ), positioning the ships as a counter to adversaries worldwide while addressing the Navy's aging fleet and shipbuilding shortfalls.
## Greenland Envoy Pick Rattles Denmark
President Trump announced Sunday that Louisiana Gov. Jeff Landry will serve as [U.S. special envoy to Greenland](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ_GdEb22OtlCxebRHQ3inSLlMjAAE78g-y5i3j7iCRvcLvRHOnTOd_Pt-HN-eDT-t1FtLTkIeFRAxJhuc7REQWsm98rbbjlUjG6NICAG5fAQQ2z8-EcdDPbBRFQNWjl3Rjd3bvONJtVOBs5mZuTesJlEUI8jOhGhAfA-BCm8faiSQAlpdBatQak0-M4ST2p27gA0wJnT7m0v7JPtOESzvzC0k45NsFuRHtl6smgZ9Afx9HGmq6MQY-Jf1QG_TWKQb_n4MlP_z-cykfcOaZXPnl1Z-VrdoH7yinz6H4jXwtiCi7NfHeFeF44bfiP6Ap_PuX7j69RMtXnyc9MfftyicSjvmPZm2Ln_fAh-GruTIs1Oh_-VqZPeX5Z-BMAAP__IXGTOg), thrusting the strategically important Arctic territory back into the spotlight. Landry said he would serve in a volunteer role aimed at making Greenland part of the United States, drawing sharp pushback from Denmark and Greenland’s government. Danish officials said they would [summon the U.S. ambassador](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAQhp8Gd1gwYNYpKKJE7vbalNZgxmsuGCzg1vLbR84rXPdJn_Rp5v_znJ8YYkivD9zJtjXPic4aqTUqNzpsLVLdwlHbRlsulXZMMwgYuAQOavYY4jXrztuVCEh1ZOXDGD0-xtF0m9Vi9OPgJRo3ACpcvEEjtTTuh1RulV2wd00CKCmF1qo3IFE7t0i9qMGtwLQgH1ou_WcOqW20xiu_qfRL3rtot9aOytRPBhOD6TzPfnH1_uL2DKYbGUyvQpQiJs9b-doPXg9aAkZO6Z0v_knrym9bLu4p7Vj-8q_KcXdYK_pc7rqaQmpL8Ez9_vXx5EJwKdB5uXXF-uMMMYZqHkyL144h_j-vfWvTt4V_AQAA__-HLoyf) in Copenhagen, stressing that sovereignty and territorial integrity are protected under international law. Polls show most Greenlanders [oppose joining the U.S.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL9yhCAQxp8GOx1ZOPQKijR2lzalg-cim0FwYHPOvX3GvEK6r_jN9-_rMT8cRUrbp9vRss9zwrNGZMZyycUxR6yBjsoBQy4Vd5dm6OHWSmhBzauj-J51s1qPCKgatHIwRo_DOJomWIleL3fpcfReou8HgLtZbiM675W5q4bs5SYBlJS91qozIJ1elqfUT3VbPAjd40qcS_edKXFAH9_5haV75r2JNjAfVagPAZOA6TzP7oWFXNpK_jkuRsB0jWpdWltKlbbAVcCUD0qUU3vkGNutIKZ4EVeZptj1OClGqmYQut92R_Evjv_10cvCbwAAAP__fjN9FA), with many favoring eventual independence from Denmark instead.
## Global Coffee Consumption Rankings 2025
Luxembourg holds the title for the [world's highest coffee consumption](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO4zAQBU8jZRTEjz4OGGyizJtuKLTIptk7lCiQbQu-_cBzhcle8FAF1L_7egdKdDz-wo6WQ14PvGpCZiyfuQFzwhrprBwx5lJxh2NVvRqEVELp1QOl92pabwOiQt2ildM4mnma57GNNshBaq-nSfcwO3PbBjeGCeA2jF77WbZkPzSplJayN0Z3o5Jgts1J4_SwBdWYHj1xLt3_TAdHDOmdX1g6l_c22ch81kb_adTSqOW6ru5F9QnJwUkMiSp_jo1aChxf6MUVyUXh8vPg8hYuH_W5YxUcUey5snA5BMRGLW2x_rwoJarj1Jj-sQOlHyn_qtTLqu8AAAD__0fNf6I) in 2025, with an average of 5.31 cups per person daily. This ranking is notably influenced by a "commuter effect," as nearly half of the country’s workforce lives in neighboring France, Germany, or Belgium and consumes their daily coffee while in Luxembourg. In Northern Europe, where coffee culture is a historical staple, Finland follows with 3.77 cups per day and Sweden at 2.59 cups, reflecting deep-seated traditions like the Swedish _fika_(coffee break). By comparison, the United States ranks 24th globally with 1.22 cups, while major producer nations like Brazil show moderate per-capita figures despite their massive export volumes. At the bottom of the list, tea-dominant countries such as India record just 0.02 cups per person per day. [See a full chart here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO4zAQBU8jZRTEjz4OGGyizJtuKLTIptk7lCiQbQu-_cBzhcle8FAF1L_7egdKdDz-wo6WQ14PvGpCZiyfuQFzwhrprBwx5lJxh2NVvRqEVELp1QOl92pabwOiQt2ildM4mnma57GNNshBaq-nSfcwO3PbBjeGCeA2jF77WbZkPzSplJayN0Z3o5Jgts1J4_SwBdWYHj1xLt3_TAdHDOmdX1g6l_c22ch81kb_adTSqOW6ru5F9QnJwUkMiSp_jo1aChxf6MUVyUXh8vPg8hYuH_W5YxUcUey5snA5BMRGLW2x_rwoJarj1Jj-sQOlHyn_qtTLqu8AAAD__0fNf6I).

Now, fans are noticing an additional that makes that famous scene even more devastating. Do you like Love Actually? Which storyline is your favorite? Reply to let us know. Speaking of movies, would you like to know which city in your state fits the Hallmark movie mold--snow-dusted streets, glowing storefronts, and just enough small-town charm? If you care about performance and want supplements that actually fit into your daily routine without hassle, today's sponsor, , offers a smarter, more consistent way to get the proven benefits of creatine. | Trump Announces New Navy Battleship Fleet President Trump announced plans to build a new fleet of Navy battleships called the "Trump class," starting with he described as the largest battleships ever constructed. Speaking from Mar-a-Lago, Trump said the ships have been under design consideration since his first term and will be part of the Pentagon's "," with plans to ultimately build 20 to 25 vessels. Secretary of the Navy John Phelan said the first ship, the USS Defiant , will be "the largest, deadliest, and most versatile" warship on the world's oceans, describing it as an updated version of the Iowa-class battleship. The president said construction should take about , positioning the ships as a counter to adversaries worldwide while addressing the Navy's aging fleet and shipbuilding shortfalls. Greenland Envoy Pick Rattles Denmark President Trump announced Sunday that Louisiana Gov. Jeff Landry will serve as , thrusting the strategically important Arctic territory back into the spotlight. Landry said he would serve in a volunteer role aimed at making Greenland part of the United States, drawing sharp pushback from Denmark and Greenland’s government. Danish officials said they would in Copenhagen, stressing that sovereignty and territorial integrity are protected under international law. Polls show most Greenlanders , with many favoring eventual independence from Denmark instead. Global Coffee Consumption Rankings 2025 Luxembourg holds the title for the in 2025, with an average of 5.31 cups per person daily. This ranking is notably influenced by a "commuter effect," as nearly half of the country’s workforce lives in neighboring France, Germany, or Belgium and consumes their daily coffee while in Luxembourg. In Northern Europe, where coffee culture is a historical staple, Finland follows with 3.77 cups per day and Sweden at 2.59 cups, reflecting deep-seated traditions like the Swedish fika(coffee break). By comparison, the United States ranks 24th globally with 1.22 cups, while major producer nations like Brazil show moderate per-capita figures despite their massive export volumes. At the bottom of the list, tea-dominant countries such as India record just 0.02 cups per person per day. . # Trump’s Reset Can Give Birth To
# America’s Greatest Era Yet
# A 90-Year cycle may end soon, creating real wealth for early adopters
In 1933, Executive Order 6102 forced everyday Americans to hand over their gold at a fixed rate. Everyday citizens lost a sizable amount of their hard earned wealth at the stroke of FDR’s pen. Now, 92 years later, [President Trump has focused his energy on making things right. ](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=5e4e74c2eaaebc7e1038b659c816515cde3ee7cf440325a9f78350ae37ce4fe15224ff7980cb7363568930e4ec83ac56c57821893d4d6f382584d7a1a95d745e) His next move has the power to trigger a financial reset that could shift trillions of dollars into the hands of the people. A provision buried in the U.S. Code Title 31, Section 5117 allows the U.S. Treasury to revalue America’s gold reserves from an outdated $42 per ounce to today’s market price. That’s a 72x increase!
---
If activated, it could
* **Reinforce America’s financial dominance**
* Reignite trust in value-backed money, making the dollar valuable again
* **Spark a modern day gold rush once the public understand their choices**

---
And the best part... Over 60 Million Americans are eligible to become a first wave benefactor in Trump’s Gold Reset.
