Against all odds, the hidden recording has been revealed, carrying Armstrong’s anxious warnings and shattering NASA’s carefully built defenses. This urgent audio sparks global panic, rewriting the story of space exploration in real time. The consequences are snowballing—trust devastated, reputations on the line, and a wave of uncertainty sweeping the world. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. body:
| | | Hi, Adam Schiff here.

I won't mince words -- **[I'm writing this email to ask you to make a donation to the DSCC.](https://go.dscc.org/go/22085?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251223-AdamSchiff-SchiffGoodReasonFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251223-AdamSchiff-SchiffGoodReasonFR-ETG-sl1&akid=22110%2E9716520%2ErMvWdZ)**

I promise you, I wouldn't ask you without a good reason... and by now, I have _plenty_. Here's the long and short of it: **Donald Trump is _dismantling_ our country piece by piece.**

🗳️ He's attacking voting rights.
From signing an unconstitutional executive order that would disenfranchise millions of eligible voters, to plotting to ABOLISH mail-in ballots, Trump is working to weaken the cornerstone of our democracy.

🩺 He's hiking up health care costs.
His "Big, Beautiful Bill" axed BILLIONS from Medicaid and Medicare, forcing reduced coverage for those who need it most.

🍞 He's gutting SNAP benefits for MILLIONS of Americans.
Trump's budget bill will cut food assistance for the elderly, families with children, and countless others.

🏛️ He's weaponizing our legal system.
Since day one, Trump has used the Department of Justice to try and punish his perceived enemies and protect his MAGA enablers.

🗣️ He's eroding our freedom of speech.
And he's proud of it -- in Trump's own words, "We took the freedom of speech away."

Like I said before, Trump is dismantling our country piece by piece, and we MUST fight back. One of the best ways to do that is to elect a Democratic Senate majority that will put a stop to Trump's worst actions before he destroys our democracy.

Trump and his enablers want us to feel powerless, but here's the truth: there's power in numbers. When we work together, even when it's hard, we can make real, lasting change.

**Democrats have beaten the odds before, so I have to ask:[Will you help us do it again by contributing $5 to the DSCC before their critical midnight deadline? Every dollar matters in the fight to counteract Trump's agenda by electing Democrats to the Senate, and we're counting on your support.](https://go.dscc.org/go/22085?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251223-AdamSchiff-SchiffGoodReasonFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251223-AdamSchiff-SchiffGoodReasonFR-ETG-sl1&akid=22110%2E9716520%2ErMvWdZ)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

body:
Winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule.
Hey Peter, it’s Jon. I’m respectfully asking: **[Can you split a donation of $10 to my reelection campaign and Heartland Patriots today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98653?refcode=em20251223-9847&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9847%2E614464%2EwOZo48)**
Sorry to be so direct, but winning in 2026 is our _only_ hope to regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule.
And I am the _only_ Democratic U.S. Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won.
That makes me MAGA’s #1 target in 2026. They’re _already_ spending MILLIONS of dollars to try to defeat me.
**_There is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021._**
So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, **for all of us.**
**[If you’re able, please make a contribution of any amount to my campaign and Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98653?refcode=em20251223-9847&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9847%2E614464%2EwOZo48)**
The campaign will be brutal.
_But this team wins the hardest battles._
We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible.
Remember? We unseated an entrenched GOP incumbent to win the Senate majority.
And we will win again — with your help.
**[Please: send $10 to my reelection campaign and Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98653?refcode=em20251223-9847&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9847%2E614464%2EwOZo48)**
With gratitude,
Senator Jon Ossoff

Now that I’m closing out my first year in Congress, I’m reflecting on _how_ I got here: by listening to _all_ the voices in the room and engaging with the community. This is, and always has been, a people-powered campaign through and through.

Our grassroots supporters have kept our movement pushing forward this past year, so I want to hear about the everyday issues you want to see prioritized in Congress as we head into 2026.

[**_Peter – If you can spare just two minutes, I’m asking you to represent your community and take our End of Year Grassroots Priorities Survey. subject: From my locker room to yours: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC

| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=26416cfc9b33439189f7d592375b53ab&_e=BQhOaxLImHNyfVozIZgs7aEjPV7itKRCe_syTMmU6WKojQPRX4jXaF4rFUXvSiV7wv6ugGHoyLYWAFfznDKrH4Hh5ifvKsMC7h4OJiYMo-Efvo7o9JrjhtQt8QmgxFGL8K-hfBLwFKUeDIvI8vzUjTGHrJfZuWwXxsGR_JNtznCD4Yp13IfcseQLtayVnDktufnjq68uM-XoSrUFRU-tjphlYfrOpRAp2Id-eix5vrQzWcQTZC-63rnJPK6DA0Zo3pTxLgqM1pwy9O3AptUA9yPv6aK3PdMKlemKt090rE6KmyeRKY41ar3F-jBA5w9-9-SSteb-PWY1XA3XDiu6AaC2l_abNk3DRcH89WfIeopezHJ7p2iyA0_s29IaScLKwRHI6iWcvi_yWiudjVDw-RJ8Pz6pugQ1yb3NWCzsjarSC-5lTw_AUD47uNuWVmRiZSUDjbktfAZHOMQ4yZZe3Ro3xkM3eCbhsD14O1TrlLFH3DjSu7piEpXsWzcWaf5a0q1sssqATg_uYdh-kUl6Pl0hM3eX_X-0xSkd7FwLsQ0%3D)

Peter,

_**As 2025 comes to a close, I wanted to step out of the noise for a moment and say thank you.**_

We've played a full four quarters this year. Long drives. Tough defenses. And through it all, you stayed in the game. You showed up, you leaned in, and you helped us keep moving the ball forward when it mattered most.

That's what a good team does.

Now we're heading into Christmas, and this is the part of the season where it's okay to take a knee, catch your breath, and focus on what really matters: _**faith, family, and time together.**_ I hope you get to step away from the grind, sit around the table with the people, and enjoy the holiday season.

_I also know many of you have already given a lot this year. We 've asked plenty, and you've answered the call time and time again. BUT if you're in a position to help during the holidays, there are some great organizations doing championship-level work for people who need it most:_

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=26416cfc9b33439189f7d592375b53ab&_e=BQhOaxLImHNyfVozIZgs7aEjPV7itKRCe_syTMmU6WKojQPRX4jXaF4rFUXvSiV70PvqYcZ3BoY34naNNVSBZ8koymOoZBR1ZhEa8upkcBhwc2Nsm2YKt8wErmOQIGnZ7wlRUdrzBnilaD6YTI2JxGCR2-1Wf_7jdPZhVPgFbG6vJ08Z1g9U6tTnftW_VcI_A41lk8y710gy6XKYCadHOXGD7zdFxvI9-FqOnMv8vftRUy33Q65ZGRjQeisLZjxMTYRz5yTxzsY0ZS2yndAEUiu6a868dTSDVBGTxRWfsr4eMhrk7wizyobHsQ6UcUR__difxVe2cB_XddR00RUcdlIdNTKYfLPSEhZ1QTsjaYt7cV6FNCLSbiRmKCP6MRBhnWNeHBkzBaXSghiMiGQJG_GstUlAy2V7JIxPlstFHi0uU_KZxtt2SYNQV9CJfYNz4tK70PicwvOgBTNnmaCibNm--mKaDD4tr9XqCg4Bl4Fy-dN-l4wp0vRzdIj8HknBIZBbcNyz8-3g8_CbAFFbW5T7I1P3mbU5Ct-KyHftFfM-y5XpxAGHoDHc-oMpVqZf)

clean_body: | Peter, As 2025 comes to a close, I wanted to step out of the noise for a moment and say thank you. We've played a full four quarters this year. Long drives. Tough defenses. And through it all, you stayed in the game. You showed up, you leaned in, and you helped us keep moving the ball forward when it mattered most. That's what a good team does. Now we're heading into Christmas, and this is the part of the season where it's okay to take a knee, catch your breath, and focus on what really matters: faith, family, and time together. I hope you get to step away from the grind, sit around the table with the people, and enjoy the holiday season. I also know many of you have already given a lot this year. We 've asked plenty, and you've answered the call time and time again. BUT if you're in a position to help during the holidays, there are some great organizations doing championship-level work for people who need it most: Wounded Warrior Project \- backing the men and women who put it all on the line. Tunnel to Towers Foundation \- never forgetting our fallen heroes and their families. St. Jude Children 's Research Hospital \- helping kids and families fight the toughest opponent there is. The Salvation Army of Alabama \- meeting folks where they are and helping them move the chains. Boys & Girls Club of Alabama \- giving young people a safe place to learn, grow, and stay on the right path. Alabama Veterans Assistance Foundation \- helping Alabama veterans and their families when they need it most. No pressure. No hard sell. Just an opportunity to help carry the load if you're able. I'm proud of this team. I'm grateful you're on it. And I'm thankful for everything you've done to make this year count. Enjoy the holidays. Rest up. We 'll be ready for kickoff again soon. God Bless you and your family, and Merry Christmas. subject: I Wore The Badge. I Know What's At Stake
body:
This isn't theory for me. I've been there.
| | |
---
| | [](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com%2F/1/0100019b4bd6a6b2-e61012f7-d4b8-4a16-a001-ab9db22b1bd3-000000/85Fss-1R1w0m_1ryIXfy52-wDXc=458)
---
| |
---
| Peter, before I ever ran for office, I wore the badge. I walked into the dangerous situations politicians only _**TALK**_ about. I sat with victims who will never be the same. I stood beside officers who left home not knowing if they'd return. So when I say law and order isn't optional, I'm not repeating a talking point. **I 'm telling you what I LIVED.**
---
| | [ADD YOUR NAME: ENDORSE BRYCE REEVES](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fstand-with-law-and-order%3Futm_campaign=20251218_Reeves_Law%2526Order%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/1/0100019b4bd6a6b2-e61012f7-d4b8-4a16-a001-ab9db22b1bd3-000000/yp92TKGYGs0GIMg-a265sKbw3vg=458)
---
| And because I lived it, I've seen exactly what happens when leaders go soft on crime: _**Chaos rises.**_ _**Families suffer.**_ _**Communities break.**_ _**Good officers walk away.**_ _**And criminals learn they can get away with anything.**_ ** _I refuse to let that happen in Virginia._** We need a leader who understands safety because he's lived the responsibility, the danger, and the weight of those decisions. That's why I'm in this race – to restore order, defend our communities, and back the blue without apology. [** _If you believe Virginia deserves safety – real safety – I 'm asking you to stand with me today. >>>_**](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fstand-with-law-and-order%3Futm_campaign=20251218_Reeves_Law%2526Order%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/2/0100019b4bd6a6b2-e61012f7-d4b8-4a16-a001-ab9db22b1bd3-000000/LQTDBYva0hjV_OdfHKrYSGBIDyU=458)
---
| | [STAND WITH BRYCE REEVES](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fstand-with-law-and-order%3Futm_campaign=20251218_Reeves_Law%2526Order%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/3/0100019b4bd6a6b2-e61012f7-d4b8-4a16-a001-ab9db22b1bd3-000000/xbfHcdh_-0A36gLPh8L5Pax08PY=458)
---
| I won't apologize for supporting law enforcement. I won't hesitate to hold criminals accountable. And I will never pretend that safety is optional. _**If you trust my experience....**_ _**If you trust my conviction...**_ _**If you trust that I 've earned the right to lead on this issue....**_ [** _Then join me now. >>>_**](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fstand-with-law-and-order%3Futm_campaign=20251218_Reeves_Law%2526Order%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/4/0100019b4bd6a6b2-e61012f7-d4b8-4a16-a001-ab9db22b1bd3-000000/ewoa2GJbUHzJ3m0b1o2QizHmvQI=458)
---
| | [SUPPORT REEVES](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fstand-with-law-and-order%3Futm_campaign=20251218_Reeves_Law%2526Order%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/5/0100019b4bd6a6b2-e61012f7-d4b8-4a16-a001-ab9db22b1bd3-000000/9itUaqh91ofzTHAyoenPVPV-wHU=458)

| Thank you, Bryce ReevesRepublican Candidate for U.S. Senate (VA)

name: Haley S.
subject: Michiganders shouldn't feel afraid of the future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
After all, we’re the state that built America. The state that built the middle class.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1627%2E49239%2Ew_q5SO)
I’m ready to fight for the people that I love in the state that I love
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10349?t=2&akid=1627%2E49239%2Ew_q5SO)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10350?t=3&akid=1627%2E49239%2Ew_q5SO)
null – see that little girl in the photo? That’s me! Way before I had the honor of serving Michiganders in Congress and launching this battleground campaign to be Michigan’s next U.S. senator. I was about 12 or 13 years old there.
But don’t be fooled by school picture day (_and my trendy beaded necklace_). Growing up as the daughter of small-business owners – Mom and Dad had their own landscaping business – I was always around a lot of dirt, grease, grime, and heavy machinery. **I wouldn’t have had it any other way.**
My parents taught me the value of hard work – a value that binds all of us in Michigan together. After all, we’re the state that built America. The state that built the middle class.
In fact, do you know what one of my favorite memories is from growing up? When I got the keys to my first car, a used Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. That car represented the newfound freedom of teenage years. **But it was more to me than just that – it also meant I had a piece of Michigan.**
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10350?t=4&akid=1627%2E49239%2Ew_q5SO)
I love Michigan. I love the people here. And I love that I’ve been able to fight for my state in Congress. But as I’ve traveled our state recently, it’s clear that the people I love are afraid. They’re afraid because of the chaos and uncertainty that Donald Trump and the GOP are inflicting upon our nation.
All across our state, I hear concerns about rising costs, fear of uncertainty in our auto industry, and worries about the future of Social Security and Medicare. And you better believe people are outright disturbed by Trump’s attacks on our democracy and personal freedoms. **This fear, uncertainty, and chaos – all of it is**** _unacceptable._**
That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. I’m ready to fight for the people I love and help block Trump’s dangerous agenda. But the path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan – and this battleground race is being called a “Toss Up” by election experts.
**null, I need your support to reach my $100,000 pre-holiday goal and continue reaching out to voters and win in Michigan.[Will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can to my grassroots campaign?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10350?t=5&akid=1627%2E49239%2Ew_q5SO)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10351?t=6&akid=1627%2E49239%2Ew_q5SO)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10352?t=7&akid=1627%2E49239%2Ew_q5SO)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10353?t=8&akid=1627%2E49239%2Ew_q5SO)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10350?t=9&akid=1627%2E49239%2Ew_q5SO)
---
Thank you,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10354?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1627%2E49239%2Ew_q5SO) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10349?t=11&akid=1627%2E49239%2Ew_q5SO)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=12&akid=1627%2E49239%2Ew_q5SO)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.

Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Gabe Amo
subject: Season's Greetings
body:
Friend, After the last several weeks, I am especially humbled by the spirit of kindness in our community. While we’ve faced significant challenges in Rhode Island, across the country, and around the world, I’m certain that there will be better days ahead. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121848425/590778496/-1283252511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDQ3MjkzZmItMTdlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aqdJTMJ6hildjjs9lGM6KCua9JqYwzcBYe7hWiSuHQs=&emci=62f3d7da-10e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=447293fb-17e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=12466492)
---
| | Friend,
---
After the last several weeks, I’m especially humbled by the spirit of kindness in our community.
---
While we’ve faced significant challenges in Rhode Island, across the country, and around the world, I’m certain that there will be better days ahead.
---
My optimism is only possible because of the resilience, generosity, and commitment of our neighbors.
---
You always step up — and we’re all better off because of those efforts. It’s your example that inspires my work.
---
However you celebrate, I hope you get to enjoy the season. Wishing you and yours happy holidays.
---
Gabe
---

subject: Warm Wishes from the Massachusetts Democratic Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Peter,
The holiday season is a time to pause and reflect on the importance of community, kindness and looking out for one another.
Across Massachusetts, families, friends and neighbors are coming together to share traditions, offer support and extend care to those who need it most. That spirit of generosity reflects the values that unite us and strengthen our Commonwealth.
In a year marked by uncertainty and upheaval around the world, Democrats across Massachusetts stayed focused on what matters most. We have been and will remain committed to organizing in our communities, reaching new voters, and showing up for one another. Through sustained outreach, deep listening and grassroots actions, our party continued to defend democratic values and fight for the issues Massachusetts families care about. The commitment, resilience and collective energy of our community drove this progress.
I want to thank you for being part of this community. Your engagement, compassion and commitment to fairness help make Massachusetts a place where people show up for one another, during the holidays and throughout the year.
I hope this season brings warmth, comfort and meaningful time with loved ones, along with moments of rest and renewal.
>From all of us at the Massachusetts Democratic Party, we wish you a joyful and peaceful holiday season.
Warm wishes,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party

name: Voter Action Project
subject: MAGA is already subverting the midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Atlantic: Donald Trump’s Plan to Subvert the Midterms Is Already Under Way [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122325_1&amount=25]
Team, that headline from The Atlantic says it all.
Donald Trump already promised last year that “w e’ll have it fixed so good, you’re not gonna have to vote .” Watching his actions after he lost in 2020 -- lies, denial, rallies, all leading to January 6th -- it's not hard to imagine what he's got in mind for next year.
Our states run our elections. But that doesn't mean that MAGA-aligned politicians won't follow his illegal orders to interfere. It doesn't stop him from using ICE agents to intimidate at the polls or threaten eligible voters. And it doesn't stop his Department of Justice from trying to interfere through the courts, especially when more than half of the suppressive lawsuits brought to court this year were brought by the very federal department that's supposed to protect our rights.
None of that takes into account the highly partisan efforts for mid-decade redistricting as well. It's clear that the threats to the next election aren't going to stop. That's where we come in.
We must inform voters, defend our elections, and make sure every eligible vote counts. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to fuel our voting rights work for 2026 and beyond >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122325_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122325_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122325_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122325_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122325_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122325_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122325_1&amount=35]
Our democracy, our elections, and our fundamental right to vote have been under attack for more than a decade. Our electoral system is reaching a breaking point, and it's hard to predict exactly where the next set of electoral shenanigans will come from.
Are we destined to watch our elections break down? Absolutely not. We still have the time and the people to win. What we need most is the resources to carry on this fight for our democracy and the work to make every voice heard in our elections.
Stopping their attempts to subvert the midterms will require courage and integrity across the board. Most of all, it will depend on individual Americans like us to stand up for our rights and demand that our votes are counted.
This is a fight we can and will win. Stand with us to protect the right to vote by pitching in with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122325_1&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122325_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122325_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.

December 23, 2025 • Newsletter

Dear Moms,

>From all of us at Moms for America, we wish you a Merry Christmas and a blessed New Year. Amid all the last minute preparations
and final touches, let's not forget that the most precious gifts in our home on Christmas morning will be our children and our
families.

Mamas, enjoy the moments; savor the church services. When you sit down to Christmas dinner remember the true meaning of Christmas
and the legacy we are building for our children.

Moms for America Weekly Blog [http://email.mg.momsforamerica.us/c/eJxsU02TqygA_DV4m5SgQT1weM7EeXEqm_fy9TJzSSGgMgo4gPn69VvObm3tIUe6uunqpmEnycmxPveQ-_kb_dqt62Py8ZGdA05qmPAYBtwoKjVRzUwZ5WpjqRJWMjobXSAITDCeh_MkjQKhqOxPSjhHGzHd-0GtX9z2bcx_bTb2iuQnvf7L8rdBEEbVQGWj_4dNMpzFKcrgHIahSHga1TgKochwIPRZWqOV0J4M1vCReWl00BJcVQkSsKIxhlkWJbgSVY0FpnVYV7CCgSQoRHOIUARxGIXRDMUMRQlGnFWUcRGDOHwYsCet94MD0Q-ACoAK542ljZg1xjS9oIN0M2YUQIVyjdPcAlQMXuNhsVWH13iV4OEzFs9iIgguKUDFlK6CFUoZFWnNohrhMK6zZPY5NEHPTv90IbUXVtOe7FHh-OuhO0KAcnFbjleWQ57jxu__LNfzka86qnF82H2VAOX3-zYtyluKWbtMPyV1h8uia9eXtIhbm5pmKXc3v1nRj6UqDs16xap7Xda_b-FXWv6mWpls-2t1BSh_G_xPC1C-bm-8yeUaoKKcvwGUL9vwBaBih5PwfnzWu9LzqPjB9_VqKLM_f6URVZ3ovmI7LksrovLW1gzeabN9XeRrLPvrcfd8Ztt9ttPrFUD5gZmMX36-O2aPG7Vxdff-gtWxGy8LEL0Evfle6KNOAyV8azihgwyMlY3UpBr77um7wGCw5iy5sGQ6NaMOLOHDRfa9dDgBcdhM-PR2gTOjZYJ8y56kOz9djO2EDTyZzB86e8KMOj38Np4If_pv2GeC_g4AAP__vlkjng]

A Look At Christmas Past

Christmas is such a special time. As moms, we plot and plan to make every detail shine – from finding the right gift, the most
magical décor, to the perfect recipe for our Christmas feast. Families gather with love and warm wishes shared – and connections
are deepened around the glow of a tree representing the Light of the World, who came to mankind as a baby.

Your unique style of celebrating makes a lasting imprint on your children. The memories, laughter, and traditions of your family’s
holiday season will be carried forward by them, treasures for generations to come.

Then there are the historical connections to the Christmas season with events that have marked our world and future. We thought it
was a good time to share 12 unique stories of Christmases gone by that, in their own way, helped change the course of history.

A Maine District Court has banned Emily Bickford from bringing her 12-year-old daughter to her mainstream, Evangelical church.
She’s appealing before the Maine Supreme Court. Emily and her lawyer, Mat Staver of Liberty Counsel, join us to talk about the
district court’s flagrant disregard of Emily’s First Amendment rights. What does this case mean for other parents and the threats
to religious liberty? Listen in. Like, subscribe and share.

clean_body: A special Christmas message from all of us at Moms for America. Plus, the latest from our blog and podcast! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] December 23, 2025 • Newsletter Dear Moms, From all of us at Moms for America, we wish you a Merry Christmas and a blessed New Year. Amid all the last minute preparations and final touches, let's not forget that the most precious gifts in our home on Christmas morning will be our children and our families. Mamas, enjoy the moments; savor the church services. When you sit down to Christmas dinner remember the true meaning of Christmas and the legacy we are building for our children. Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] A Look At Christmas Past Christmas is such a special time. As moms, we plot and plan to make every detail shine – from finding the right gift, the most magical décor, to the perfect recipe for our Christmas feast. Families gather with love and warm wishes shared – and connections are deepened around the glow of a tree representing the Light of the World, who came to mankind as a baby. Your unique style of celebrating makes a lasting imprint on your children. The memories, laughter, and traditions of your family’s holiday season will be carried forward by them, treasures for generations to come. Then there are the historical connections to the Christmas season with events that have marked our world and future. We thought it was a good time to share 12 unique stories of Christmases gone by that, in their own way, helped change the course of history. Read the Blog [] Court Bans Mom from Bringing Daughter to Church Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] A Maine District Court has banned Emily Bickford from bringing her 12-year-old daughter to her mainstream, Evangelical church. She’s appealing before the Maine Supreme Court. Emily and her lawyer, Mat Staver of Liberty Counsel, join us to talk about the district court’s flagrant disregard of Emily’s First Amendment rights. What does this case mean for other parents and the threats to religious liberty? Listen in. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: Keeping the magic alive
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
The spirit of the season

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121851570/590786799/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjdkMzYwOC0xOWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JTbRgA0jmnX02DP9l5ILYnw_kPq6zf1lU1o9N2Zu7dY=)

Peter,

To me, the holiday season has always been about giving and showing those in our lives just how much they mean to us.

I think about my mom in the kitchen, year after year, cooking Christmas dinner with so much love that it practically glowed. Her care was the backdrop of my childhood holidays, steady and comforting, no matter what was happening in the world outside.

I think about the years when my daughter was little, and I'd tiptoe through the house late on Christmas Eve, making sure she didn't catch me putting “Santa's” presents under the tree. I remember holding my breath as I placed each gift down, hoping to keep the magic alive for one more year.

And I think about the mad scramble so many of us know well, the anxiety-ridden dash to clean the house before guests arrive and trying to make everything feel just right. **We pour our hearts into making the season special and bright, because that's what you do for the people you love.**

I believe our leaders should work with that same spirit. Iowans deserve a leader who approaches the work with the same intention and care that we bring to our own homes during this season. That is why I'm running. I want you to feel confident that someone who understands this community is in Washington working for a better future.

Wishing you and your loved ones a warm, peaceful, and joyful holiday season!

Thank you,

Christina

| The gears are turning.
Just days ago at a White House reception, billionaire megadonor Miriam Adelson stood on stage and offered Donald Trump a $250 million check to run for a third term.
Now, reports are coming out that Trump met in private with Alan Dershowitz, Jeffrey Epstein's former lawyer, to plot loopholes for Trump to run for a third term. Dershowitz is currently working on a book set to be released this Spring titled Could President Trump Constitutionally Serve a Third Term?

Defend Our Courts just helped orchestrate a massive victory in Pennsylvania's Supreme Court election, but the fight has already moved. Trump's billionaire-back machine is now laser-focused on flipping the Supreme Courts in Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan in 2026.
If we don't hold the line in these three critical swing states, MAGA will be able to secure the courts they need to give Trump another viable path to secure power for as long as he wants.
[Our courts are the only thing standing between us and a permanent MAGA dictatorship. name: Chris Pappas
subject: We won’t give an inch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
This is the most important fundraising deadline of the year, and your support can make all the difference.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=4192%2E582294%2EuDipD3)
I’m going to share more about why I’m running for U.S. Senate, but if you’re already on board, **[please make a year-end contribution of $5 before our critical December 31st deadline.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251223_1.VKI3eo&refcode=em20251223-1&t=2&akid=4192%2E582294%2EuDipD3)**
I’m running because the stakes in this race couldn’t be higher. Our economy, our democracy, and our basic freedoms are all on the line — and control of the Senate could come down to New Hampshire. Granite Staters deserve a Senator who understands our communities, lives our values, and is ready to deliver on day one.
This isn’t just any deadline. **December 31st is our final public fundraising deadline of the year, and it will shape how this campaign is viewed going into 2026.** National Republicans and their right-wing billionaire allies are watching to see if we meet our goals or if we fall short. We can’t let that happen.
**My likely opponent is John Sununu, part of a political dynasty with a national fundraising machine and support from Trump-aligned groups.** He’s exactly the kind of candidate national Republicans want to help them cling to Senate control, and he’s exactly the wrong choice for New Hampshire.
**[Can I count on you to back this campaign with a $5 contribution right before our deadline?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251223_1.VKI3eo&refcode=em20251223-1&t=3&akid=4192%2E582294%2EuDipD3)**
**These fights are deeply personal to me.** My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester over a century ago — the same business we run today. That restaurant taught me the power of hard work and community. But that promise of opportunity that drew my family here is slipping further out of reach for too many Granite Staters, while Republicans hand out tax breaks to billionaires and the biggest corporations.
I’m also happily married to my husband, Vann. I know how important visibility and leadership are. **If elected I’d be the first out gay man to serve in the U.S. Senate** — and I’d carry that responsibility with pride as I fight for full equality.
I’ve won tough races in one of the most competitive districts in the country — a district no one held for more than one term in over a decade before I flipped it in 2018 and won it four times in a row. **Now I’m stepping up to help flip the Senate, and I need your help to do it.**
If Democrats lose this open seat in New Hampshire, there is no path to winning back Senate control. So let’s make sure our next public report shows the strength of our grassroots campaign and that we’re not giving an inch to national Republicans.
**[Can you chip in $5 or more before the December 31st deadline to help us finish this year strong?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251223_1.VKI3eo&refcode=em20251223-1&t=4&akid=4192%2E582294%2EuDipD3)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251223_1.VKI3eo&amount=5&refcode=em20251223-1&t=23&akid=4192%2E582294%2EuDipD3)**
With gratitude,
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251223-1&t=24&refcode2=4192_582294_uDipD3&akid=4192%2E582294%2EuDipD3)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Cori Bush
subject: St. Louis decides its future, not billionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251223_happyholidays_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251223_happyholidays_act]
Hi Peter,
I can’t believe we’re already approaching 2026. What a year.
And this year, Peter, we showed up . We helped neighbors stay warm, supported families in need, and showed up with hands, hearts, and hope when disaster struck with historic flooding here in St. Louis. I’m so grateful to be part of a community that doesn’t just talk about caring, we act .
But let’s be real: too many people are still struggling. Rent continues to rise, groceries are more expensive, seniors are forgoing critical care, and families are making impossible choices. I know what that’s like. That’s not okay, and we’re not going to sit by and let it continue.
That’s why I’m running for Congress again. I’ll keep fighting to lower costs, lift burdens, and deliver results for every family in St. Louis. While my opponent and his dark-money backers try to drown out our message, we’re building this campaign from the ground up. We’re powered by the people, not billionaire checks.
With only EIGHT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251223_happyholidays_act] days until our end-of-year FEC deadline, now is the time to step up.
Chip in $5, $10, or $25 today to keep our movement strong and prove to everyone that St. Louis decides its own future. I need you in this with me. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251223_happyholidays_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=&refcode=x_251223_happyholidays_act] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=&refcode=x_251223_happyholidays_act]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=x_251223_happyholidays_act] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=x_251223_happyholidays_act]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=x_251223_happyholidays_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane_other=true&refcode=x_251223_happyholidays_act]
We’ll keep building. Together, we got us.
Thanks for being in this with me. Happy holidays and stay warm, everybody!
— Cori
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251223_happyholidays_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251223_happyholidays_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Visit CoriBush.org [https://www.coribush.org] to learn more.

name: James Talarico
subject: A different approach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
If your inbox is anything like mine, it feels like a constant barrage of emails from campaigns to sort through. A lot of them with such extreme and exaggerated language that it raises your blood pressure.
It’s hard to separate the noise from the truth. What’s really worth investing your time and treasure in?
That’s why it’s important to me that we approach this campaign differently. Yes, we have to raise money. Yes, that requires sending more emails and texts than I would like to.
But we’re never going to do what so many other politicians do — like send you five emails a day or lie to you about the “sky falling” constantly.
You’ll never see us do a “triple match” (those are fake) or try to scam you into donating. If you’ve seen campaigns talk about “mid-month” or “daily” deadlines...yeah, we won’t do that either. Those are also made up by DC consultants to create fake urgency.
But when it’s urgent, like it is right now with our FEC deadline coming up, I’m going to be honest with you about what we need to reach our fundraising goals and win this race.
[**If this approach resonates with you, I hope you’ll consider making a contribution to our campaign for the U.S. Senate. I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. clean_body: Peter — If your inbox is anything like mine, it feels like a constant barrage of emails from campaigns to sort through. A lot of them with such extreme and exaggerated language that it raises your blood pressure. It’s hard to separate the noise from the truth. What’s really worth investing your time and treasure in? That’s why it’s important to me that we approach this campaign differently. Yes, we have to raise money. Yes, that requires sending more emails and texts than I would like to. But we’re never going to do what so many other politicians do — like send you five emails a day or lie to you about the “sky falling” constantly. You’ll never see us do a “triple match” (those are fake) or try to scam you into donating. If you’ve seen campaigns talk about “mid-month” or “daily” deadlines...yeah, we won’t do that either. Those are also made up by DC consultants to create fake urgency. But when it’s urgent, like it is right now with our FEC deadline coming up, I’m going to be honest with you about what we need to reach our fundraising goals and win this race. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | A lot of candidates raise a lot of money from corporate PACs. name: Elizabeth Guzman
subject: MAGA is rigging the maps. Virginia is fighting back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | Friend — Across the country, Republicans are doing exactly what bullies do when they’re scared to lose and can’t win on their own merits: **they’re rigging the maps.** In Texas.
In Missouri.
In North Carolina.
In red state after red state. They’re redrawing congressional lines to lock in power _before a single vote is cast_ — silencing voters, targeting Democrats, and trying to rig the 2026 midterms in Trump’s favor. **So let me be crystal clear:****_when Trump and MAGA attack our democracy, Democrats will not back down._** In Virginia, we are preparing to fight back — **including by****considering a new congressional map and advancing a constitutional amendment to stop rigged Republican maps statewide, which will restore balance in Congress.** We will not play nice while they cheat. We will not unilaterally disarm. This is about fighting fire with fire to protect voters and give Virginians a real choice. But here’s the thing: _**Virginia’s legislative****session is about to begin — and once it does, a fundraising ban kicks in.**_ I will be legally barred from raising money just as MAGA ramps up its attacks and pours resources into flipping seats like mine. _And my district is a frontline target because I’m willing to stand up, push back, and refuse to be intimidated._ [**I need your help RIGHT NOW to stay in this fight. Can you chip in now — before the fundraising ban hits — and help me fight back?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6EamYIQ3Jhpog8q_lJ17iZtLXjC4wWh1DGBixk06XvlZMr7qH_5adVJKcxO6xNBx6t8s93oBHT5YPw_1uovbjg1rAtPdHI7f7r-Zg_tWI83qfoY8NGUOcgya1XacwC-ggwPqv52-xN06y14pgLJA3SLyhC4WExNyYiSmTpWCW-Q1G4HFfuaPyM-2JMiQ0bfhkQC2B6RhgKPnv8exQlLg4oN7orH5_5-GlE5cn8HNpQVZ6kpdumiyS89ocwFaWtKzZQ/4mo/vpNLeUoGTperioN2YBrNEg/h0/h001.aHzzY5l7dOXANJ6a_ENlGjWWol3C50HpPZ_MeOaY4QM)****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | Friend — Across the country, Republicans are doing exactly what bullies do when they’re scared to lose and can’t win on their own merits: they’re rigging the maps. In Texas. In Missouri. In North Carolina. In red state after red state. They’re redrawing congressional lines to lock in power before a single vote is cast — silencing voters, targeting Democrats, and trying to rig the 2026 midterms in Trump’s favor. So let me be crystal clear:when Trump and MAGA attack our democracy, Democrats will not back down. In Virginia, we are preparing to fight back — including byconsidering a new congressional map and advancing a constitutional amendment to stop rigged Republican maps statewide, which will restore balance in Congress. We will not play nice while they cheat. We will not unilaterally disarm. This is about fighting fire with fire to protect voters and give Virginians a real choice. But here’s the thing: Virginia’s legislativesession is about to begin — and once it does, a fundraising ban kicks in. I will be legally barred from raising money just as MAGA ramps up its attacks and pours resources into flipping seats like mine. And my district is a frontline target because I’m willing to stand up, push back, and refuse to be intimidated. you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Republicans want to rig the system so they can’t lose. We refuse to let them. Thanks for your support. — Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Elizabeth Guzman, please .

* Massive tax cuts for billionaires while kicking millions of Americans off of their health insurance.
* Federal officers fired for being “disloyal.”
* Civil servants purged.
* Critics arrested.
* Trump’s DOJ used to retaliate against political enemies.
* The economy tanked with reckless tariffs and chaos.
* **And worst of all: no one’s stopping him.**

The Supreme Court ruled he has absolute immunity. The Republican Congress cheers him on. And Democrats in the Senate? Despite fighting like hell, we’re outnumbered, losing vote after vote while Trump rewrites laws by executive order. Social Security? On the chopping block. The Department of Education? Dismantled. Women’s rights, gun safety, and climate progress? **All at risk.** This isn’t politics as usual. This is authoritarianism. And pretending democracy will fix itself? That’s a fantasy. Here’s the truth: **Flipping the Senate in 2026 is our last, best shot.** **That’s why Flip the Senate exists. ** They’re not the DNC. name: Connor Miller
subject: Sarah won’t back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
This cruelty is a distraction from their failure to govern, and Sarah won’t back down.
#
Hi — Connor here, Finance Director for Team McBride. I wanted to send a quick note before you log off for the holidays.
Next Wednesday is our end-of-year FEC deadline, and we still need 8,000 of Sarah’s supporters to pitch in to reach our goal of 50,000 donations this year. [**If you’re able, could you pitch in $5 or even $1 right now?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251223-1.QlFlIk&refcode=em20251223-2611&amount=5&t=1&akid=2611%2E21716%2EKLTlIK)
In just days, millions of Americans will see their health insurance premiums skyrocket. And instead of doing something about it, **House Republicans pushed through some of the most extreme anti-trans legislation we’ve ever seen** — targeting health care providers, families, and a community they’re obsessed with politicizing.
But fighting back takes resources. Meeting our end-of-year goal ensures Sarah can continue standing up against the GOP’s unhinged hatred, keep up the fight for Delawareans and working people everywhere, and help Democrats take back control of the House.
**We can’t do it without you.** [**If you can, please chip in $5 before you log off today to help us finish the year strong and give Sarah the support she needs right now.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251223-1.QlFlIk&refcode=em20251223-2611&amount=5&t=2&akid=2611%2E21716%2EKLTlIK)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251223-1.QlFlIk&amount=5&refcode=em20251223-2611&t=21&akid=2611%2E21716%2EKLTlIK)**
Thanks,
Connor Miller
Finance Director, Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251223-1&t=22&refcode2=2611_21716_KLTlIK&akid=2611%2E21716%2EKLTlIK)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=2611%2E21716%2EKLTlIK)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=24&akid=2611%2E21716%2EKLTlIK)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2611%2E21716%2EKLTlIK)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

Friends,
Since the beginning of this year, we have witnessed the Trump Administration attack our federal institutions, sabotage our economy with chaotic tariffs, and hand out more tax breaks to billionaires while slashing health care for millions of Americans.
Instead of standing up for the people, Washington Republicans are bowing at Trump’s feet. This is a democracy — of the people, by the people, for the people — and next November, voters will have the final say.

clean_body: | | | | Friends, Since the beginning of this year, we have witnessed the Trump Administration attack our federal institutions, sabotage our economy with chaotic tariffs, and hand out more tax breaks to billionaires while slashing health care for millions of Americans. Instead of standing up for the people, Washington Republicans are bowing at Trump’s feet. This is a democracy — of the people, by the people, for the people — and next November, voters will have the final say. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Control of the House will run through Nevada in 2026, and every single one of our statewide constitutional offices will be on the ballot. With your support, we’ll elect strong Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight back against corruption and make life more affordable for the middle class. Let’s win this, together. — Jacky The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. name: Laura Friedman
subject: Scenes from around our district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121855261/590796963/-1798313451?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDIxZmVmM2MtMWRlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9dFC7FaEGKuK8qQsmVHI_aNILTVIgcRZVPyFHzkaBRo=) Friend, It has been an eventful first year in Congress. I have been actively working to be part of the solution for our district, and find ways to advance our values in spite of an unstable administration. There are few things I value more than meeting people, hearing their biggest challenges, and helping make sure their government can work for them. I am grateful to learn everyone’s stories, experiences, and challenges – and to have the opportunity to make their lives better. Here are just a few updates from the past few weeks across the district. Stay tuned for more!
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121855263/590796964/-1798313451?refcode=em-12.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDIxZmVmM2MtMWRlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9dFC7FaEGKuK8qQsmVHI_aNILTVIgcRZVPyFHzkaBRo=) Everyone deserves a warm meal. That's even more true during the holidays. I was privileged to help serve meals for our community at Hollywood Food Coalition's Thanksgiving Meal Service. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121855265/590796966/-1798313451?refcode=em-12.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDIxZmVmM2MtMWRlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9dFC7FaEGKuK8qQsmVHI_aNILTVIgcRZVPyFHzkaBRo=) In the same spirit of service, I was grateful to join Union Station Homeless Services, where we prepared meals for Angelenos who just need a little help right now. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121855267/590796968/-1798313451?refcode=em-12.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDIxZmVmM2MtMWRlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9dFC7FaEGKuK8qQsmVHI_aNILTVIgcRZVPyFHzkaBRo=) I joined the San Fernando Valley Democrats for their Truman Awards, honoring local leaders for their public service. My sincerest congratulations to everyone honored! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121855269/590796970/-1798313451?refcode=em-12.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDIxZmVmM2MtMWRlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9dFC7FaEGKuK8qQsmVHI_aNILTVIgcRZVPyFHzkaBRo=) I stood with the California Nurses Association to demand the Trump administration properly and fairly address the nursing shortages he is intensifying by restricting access to training and funding. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121855271/590796972/-1798313451?refcode=em-12.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDIxZmVmM2MtMWRlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9dFC7FaEGKuK8qQsmVHI_aNILTVIgcRZVPyFHzkaBRo=) I joined our Jewish community to stand together and choose light and hope during Hanukkah. We will not be deterred by the rising antisemitic threats. Chag Sameach to all who celebrated. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121855273/590796974/-1798313451?refcode=em-12.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDIxZmVmM2MtMWRlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9dFC7FaEGKuK8qQsmVHI_aNILTVIgcRZVPyFHzkaBRo=) And I had a lovely time this weekend celebrating the holidays with multiple Democratic Clubs around Los Angeles, who are actively creating next year’s blue wave. Every day I get to serve this community is a blessing, and I thank you for giving me that trust. Laura __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__ | ****[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121855275/590796976/-1798313451?refcode=em-12.23.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDIxZmVmM2MtMWRlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9dFC7FaEGKuK8qQsmVHI_aNILTVIgcRZVPyFHzkaBRo=)**** | ****[$35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121855277/590796978/-1798313451?refcode=em-12.23.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDIxZmVmM2MtMWRlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9dFC7FaEGKuK8qQsmVHI_aNILTVIgcRZVPyFHzkaBRo=)****

clean_body: | = Friend, It has been an eventful first year in Congress. I have been actively working to be part of the solution for our district, and find ways to advance our values in spite of an unstable administration. There are few things I value more than meeting people, hearing their biggest challenges, and helping make sure their government can work for them. I am grateful to learn everyone’s stories, experiences, and challenges – and to have the opportunity to make their lives better. Here are just a few updates from the past few weeks across the district. Stay tuned for more! = Everyone deserves a warm meal. That's even more true during the holidays. I was privileged to help serve meals for our community at Hollywood Food Coalition's Thanksgiving Meal Service. = In the same spirit of service, I was grateful to join Union Station Homeless Services, where we prepared meals for Angelenos who just need a little help right now. = I joined the San Fernando Valley Democrats for their Truman Awards, honoring local leaders for their public service. My sincerest congratulations to everyone honored! = I stood with the California Nurses Association to demand the Trump administration properly and fairly address the nursing shortages he is intensifying by restricting access to training and funding. = I joined our Jewish community to stand together and choose light and hope during Hanukkah. We will not be deterred by the rising antisemitic threats. Chag Sameach to all who celebrated. = And I had a lovely time this weekend celebrating the holidays with multiple Democratic Clubs around Los Angeles, who are actively creating next year’s blue wave. Every day I get to serve this community is a blessing, and I thank you for giving me that trust. Laura If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! Peter,

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and our progressive champions need us
more than ever. The far-right isn’t slowing down, and neither can we.

Every fight the Squad takes on — from fighting for affordability and
defending healthcare to standing up for justice — is powered by people
like you. Grassroots support isn’t optional; it’s everything. It fuels
this movement and keeps progressive champions in the fight.

Take a look at some of the folks who have chipped in this month — [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251223-movement.1RjLjC&refcode=em20251223-1758&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1758%2E342411%2EjqoIeX ]will

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Americans know the President is screwing them over.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Trump and his allies lash out at me because they need a scapegoat.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2010%2E791427%2EdhukPR)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4754?t=2&akid=2010%2E791427%2EdhukPR)
Friend — After the last month, it shouldn’t surprise you that Trump attacked me with personal insults and threats to deport me once again this weekend.
JD Vance joined the fray this time too, referring to Minneapolis as “Mogadishu” in a racist joke for his far-right buddies.
Randy Fine added his two cents on the right-wing TV channel NewsMax, saying that I “shouldn’t be an American” and that Somali-Americans “need to go home, starting with her.”
**[If you’re fed up with all of this MAGA cruelty chip in $10 to my campaign.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251223-1-180&t=3&akid=2010%2E791427%2EdhukPR) **Let me explain.**
Trump and his allies lash out at me because they need a scapegoat. They need a distraction to direct attention away from their failures.
They tell hardworking Americans that the reason they can’t get ahead is because of immigrants and Somali people.
That’s a much easier sell than explaining to your supporters that you are kicking them off their healthcare, skyrocketing the cost of living, slashing their food assistance, and lining the pockets of billionaires at their expense.
But rhetoric eventually meets reality. Nobody thinks about Somali-Americans when they see their energy bill has doubled due to Trump’s AI data center expansions. Nobody is going to think of my name when they see their insurance premium double after the GOP’s budget cuts, and have to decide to go uninsured.
**Americans are smart enough to know when the President is screwing them over.**
It’s our job and the job of this entire progressive movement to continue to push people toward that fundamental truth, and rally behind a positive message for an affordable America where immigrants are recognized for their contributions to our prosperity, not scapegoated.
**[So please: If you want to help me fight back against racist attacks against myself and immigrants of all kinds, chip in to my campaign. We are going to defeat these liars, cheaters, and scammers, and deliver on a truly progressive vision for the future of this country.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251223-1-180&t=4&akid=2010%2E791427%2EdhukPR)
