name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: “We’re killing all the right people” - Lindsey Graham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121863603/590824434/899181852?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.23_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmNjMTU5Yy0yYmUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B9BetvDB8tvAAHtyf0VEVWecw37_qjBw1zgB--DAiJ4=) Lindsey Graham stood on stage and **_bragged about “killing all the right people.”_**

Who exactly are the “ _right people_ ,” Lindsey?

The child shot in their classroom because you refuse to pass common sense gun legislation? The teenage girl who was refused care while suffering a miscarriage and died because of your extreme abortion bans? The millions of Americans who can’t get the care they need because they don’t have health insurance?

As a pediatrician, I’ve spent my entire career saving lives, fighting to keep kids healthy, and advocating for families who can’t afford basic care.

So when I hear Lindsey Graham, a sitting U.S. Senator, bragging about killing “the right people,” it makes me sick to my stomach and reminds me exactly why I’m running for Senate.

**Because public service should be about compassion, not cruelty. It should be about enriching lives, not glorifying death.**

[**_But to replace Lindsey Graham and restore decency to South Carolina’s Senate seat, I need your help. Will you split a $10 donation or whatever you can between my campaign and Maggie Hassan before our final public fundraising deadlines of the year to help us fight back against this cruelty and elect a Senator who actually values human life?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121863604/590824435/899181852?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.23_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmNjMTU5Yy0yYmUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B9BetvDB8tvAAHtyf0VEVWecw37_qjBw1zgB--DAiJ4=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Annie Andrews and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121863605/590824436/899181852?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.23_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmNjMTU5Yy0yYmUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B9BetvDB8tvAAHtyf0VEVWecw37_qjBw1zgB--DAiJ4=)

name: Team Marsha Blackburn
subject: One dollar?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARSHA FOR GOVERNOR - GLENN JACOBS, TREASURER

name: Charlene Fernandez, Chair
subject: Happy Holidays from AZ Dems!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121863616/590824476/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20251223_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWRjYmQ4ZTAtMmJlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BdVhfAYlbD6-0eek-YL7Wnjq4tKBuFpWpKcVoYy90gw=)
---
**Happy holidays to you and yours!** As 2025 winds to a close, I’m reflecting on what Arizona Democrats do every year — from supporting Democratic candidates across Arizona, to protecting Arizonans’ rights and defending our public lands, to helping expand opportunity for workers and their families. I’m thinking about everyone across the state who hold our civic fabric together — every day, in ways big and small. These are the neighbors who knock on doors, the volunteers who phonebank after work, and the families who show up at town halls, ready to be heard. But most of all, **I’m feeling gratitude for the people like you who step up to support the Arizona Democratic Party directly.** I’m so thankful for your generosity and for your commitment to our shared values. Over the holidays, I hope you find time to rest, reconnect with the people and places that sustain you, and recharge for the work ahead. **Arizona’s future is bright because of the community we’re building together, and I can’t wait to see what we build in the new year.** Enjoy your holidays. I'm grateful to be in this fight with you. Charlene Fernandez
Chair, Arizona Democratic Party | [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121863617/590824477/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20251223_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWRjYmQ4ZTAtMmJlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BdVhfAYlbD6-0eek-YL7Wnjq4tKBuFpWpKcVoYy90gw=)

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: Affordability is THE issue.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Tennessee families needs strong allies this holiday season
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KD66RNDAE89TEMSHH0NTEYE4_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KD66RNDAE89TEMSHH0NTEYE4_1)
---
| | | | Dear Peter, The holiday season is here but many families feel the pressure of skyrocketing costs and limited public services. From groceries to utilities, Tennesseans are being stretched thin.

While Donald Trump referred to “affordability” as a “con job” and “scam,” we Democrats know that the concerns in every community about increased costs of living are very real. The president and Republicans made promises to decrease prices, but, as always, they lied and failed to deliver for working families.

**Republican lawmakers continue to block relief while communities ask for help.** They protect corporate profits while working families struggle to make ends meet.

**We are fighting for a state that supports every family, no matter their zip code.** Can you fuel our fight for affordability?
---
| | [ Donate $10 for Working Families ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KD66RNDAE89TEMSHH0NTEYE4_2)
---
| The Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
---

name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: Christmas note from the Biancos
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIANCO FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC # 1479095
body:

body:
2025 was the year that redefined redistricting.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121864278/590826585/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4NDhlYzMxLTJlZTAtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RZbtHscLXPmsUlke_aUtXWULP6Vfesb9B1Kezz1z74c=&emci=66df2765-7cdf-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=d848ec31-2ee0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8431045)

Peter — 2025 was a year we’ll remember. It was the year Republicans, led by the Trump White House, tried to reinvent redistricting. What should be a once-a-decade process to ensure fairness in our elections became a tool to help cynical politicians keep their grip on power. But 2025 proved to be something else, too. It was the year that Americans in states across the country woke up to the attacks on our democracy by map manipulators and anti-democracy forces. We witnessed voters across the country stand up and refuse to be silenced. **[Reflect on all we accomplished together in 2025 in your “NDRC Wrapped” below — then, if you can, chip in to help this movement take on some of our toughest challenges yet in 2026.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121864279/590826586/-1027206931?refcode=cul_ndrc_tier1_email_NDRCWrappedKicker_email_20251223-NDRC-Tier1-NDRCWrappedKicker_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=cul&utm_content=20251223-NDRC-Tier1-NDRCWrappedKicker_&utm_campaign=NDRCWrappedKicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4NDhlYzMxLTJlZTAtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RZbtHscLXPmsUlke_aUtXWULP6Vfesb9B1Kezz1z74c=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: 2025 was the year that redefined redistricting. | Peter — 2025 was a year we’ll remember. It was the year Republicans, led by the Trump White House, tried to reinvent redistricting. What should be a once-a-decade process to ensure fairness in our elections became a tool to help cynical politicians keep their grip on power. But 2025 proved to be something else, too. It was the year that Americans in states across the country woke up to the attacks on our democracy by map manipulators and anti-democracy forces. We witnessed voters across the country stand up and refuse to be silenced. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = \----- ORIGINAL MESSAGE ------ From: NDRC Subject: Introducing: Your 2025 NDRC Wrapped Date: Monday, December 22 = = = = = = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: You weren’t supposed to see this. A terrifying new video shows what looks like the first real engagement of AI-guided laser warfare — and it’s unfolding dangerously close to Chinese territory.| | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | You weren’t supposed to see this. name: Save NPR and PBS via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Stop the attacks on NPR and PBS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Trump and his cronies aren't done yet with their push to wipe out PBS and
NPR for good. But now we have a chance to stop them, before it's too late.

A conservative group just filed a petition urging the FCC to strip NPR and
PBS stations of their licenses. Their plan: kick trusted local voices off
the air, and hand our public airwaves to MAGA mouthpieces.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34901?source=email-20251223&t=1011&akid=10005%2E5885482%2EHi8oEs ]Headline: After NPR and PBS defunding, FCC recieves call to take away
station licenses

Here's our chance to stop them: Congress is negotiating its 2026 budget
right now and can restore funding to keep local stations afloat. But it
will only happen if enough of us come together to demand our
representatives save NPR and PBS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34901?source=email-20251223&t=1012&akid=10005%2E5885482%2EHi8oEs ]Add your name now to demand Congress restore public media funding and
protect our free press from Trump's oligarchs.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34901?source=email-20251223&t=1013&akid=10005%2E5885482%2EHi8oEs ]ADD YOUR NAME

This new attempt to take away PBS and NPR station licenses isn't coming
out of nowhere. Trump and his cronies in Congress already slashed public
media funding and now MAGA is busy trying to claim these stations have
failed to "serve the public interest."

It's a lie. For years, NPR and PBS have brought us fact-based news,
world-class documentaries, educational shows for children, and critical
local reporting.

But right now public media is hanging on by a thread after Trump's $1.1
BILLION in funding cuts earlier this year. Local stations are being forced
to close their doors — Arkansas' statewide public television network just
announced it will end its affiliation with PBS thanks to funding cuts,
saying it cannot afford PBS membership fees.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34901?source=email-20251223&t=1014&akid=10005%2E5885482%2EHi8oEs ]Headline: Arkansas will become first state to end PBS affiliation

Meanwhile, Trump's busy rubber stamping mega-mergers for his oligarch
media buddies – tightening their grip on what we see, hear, and read. We
CANNOT let Trump and his oligarchs hand our public media over to private
billionaires.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34901?source=email-20251223&t=1015&akid=10005%2E5885482%2EHi8oEs ]Add your name now to demand Congress restore public media funding and
protect the future of NPR and PBS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34901?source=email-20251223&t=1016&akid=10005%2E5885482%2EHi8oEs ]ADD YOUR NAME

This is bigger than politics. This is about defending the last thread of
non-commercial, community-supported journalism in America from an all-out
assault by the MAGA right. Together, we're not just defending TV and radio
stations. We're fighting for the real, trusted news our families, our
neighbors, and our democracy need to survive.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=10005%2E5885482%2EHi8oEs ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=10005%2E5885482%2EHi8oEs ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=10005%2E5885482%2EHi8oEs ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=10005%2E5885482%2EHi8oEs ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=10005%2E5885482%2EHi8oEs ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251223.ysDvEx&t=1008&akid=10005%2E5885482%2EHi8oEs ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20251223.Gn40_D&t=1009&akid=10005%2E5885482%2EHi8oEs ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20251223.CR0pXR&t=1010&akid=10005%2E5885482%2EHi8oEs ]GIVE ONCE

subject: 3 reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40606%2E3422442%2EtgktI8)
Peter,
Before you log off for the holidays, we want to give you three reasons why it’s important to donate to Katie Porter today:
1) **Our billionaire opponent recently dumped $20 million into his campaign.** Katie can’t self fund her campaign with a huge check, this is a grassroots campaign.
2) **A recent poll showed Katie statistically tied with two Republicans.** We can’t let two Republicans win in June and flip the governor’s office red.

name: Autism Health
subject: Adopt-A-Family for the Holidays!
body:
A Holiday Message from Autism Health Inc.

As we move into this season of light, hope, and reflection, all of us at Autism Health Inc. want to extend our warmest wishes to you and your family. Merry Christmas to those who celebrate, Happy Hanukkah to our friends observing the Festival of Lights, and heartfelt blessings to those who honor this time of year in their own meaningful way. We see you, we respect you, and we honor all your unique traditions.

This season, we want to especially acknowledge the incredible families in our community... the parents, caregivers, and loved ones who go the distance every single day for their children with autism or any neurological disorder. Your dedication, strength, sacrifice, and unwavering love are the true embodiment of the holiday spirit. You inspire us. You guide our mission. And you remind us what resilience looks like in its purest form.

As we close out the year, please know how grateful we are for your trust and your support. It is because of you that we can continue advancing research, education, and resources that bring hope and healing to families across the country.

>From our hearts to yours, we wish you peace, comfort, and moments of joy throughout this season and into the New Year.

With gratitude,
Steve & Tracy Slepcevic
Founders of Autism Health Inc.

Adopt-A-Family for the Holidays!

Support Families. Restore Hope. Change Lives.

This holiday season, Autism Health & Dr. Goodenowe Enterprises are launching our Adopt-A-Family initiative to help children and adults with autism access care that can truly change the trajectory of their lives. Many families in our community are struggling... financially, emotionally, and physically. But too often, the resources they need are out of reach.

To meet this need, we have partnered with Dr. Goodenowe Enterprises and the Dr. Goodenowe Community Health Initiative to provide families with a comprehensive support system that includes plasmalogen precursor supplementation, community education, monthly mentorship, and guidance from trained navigators who walk alongside families every step of the way.

These programs are already helping individuals experience improvements in focus, communication, sleep, mood, anxiety levels, and overall daily functioning. When you adopt a family for the holidays, you are directly funding access to this full restorative support system.

Here is the link to the recent press release with more details...
PRESS RELEASE (https://world.einnews.com/pr_news/877481253/dr-dayan-goodenowe-and-autism-health-announce-dr-goodenowe-childhood-neurodevelopmental-support-program-neurosupport?mc_cid=7c9f3f326e&mc_eid=UNIQID)

How You Can Help

By adopting a family, you provide three months or more of life-changing support, including:

• Plasmalogen precursor supplements

• Access to the Engage community platform

• Monthly mentorship through the Community Health Navigator program

• Education, guidance, and community connection

Whether you support one individual or multiple families, your contribution will bring hope and stability to those who need it most this holiday season.
DONATE HERE (https://givebutter.com/goodenowe?gbtid=145aa5eb-55ab-435c-bf02-41ab0d50b2a9&mc_cid=7c9f3f326e&mc_eid=UNIQID)

** Autism Health Summit 2026 – Last Month for Discounted Tickets
------------------------------------------------------------

The countdown is on! This is the final month to purchase your tickets to the Autism Health Summit 2026 at the discounted rate. Beginning January 1st, ticket prices will increase by $50, so now is the perfect time to secure your spot.

For this month only, you can take an additional $25 off your ticket with promo code Holiday25 at checkout.

Join us April 24–26, 2026 at the beautiful Legacy Center Resort & Spa in San Diego, California, for a powerful three-day event bringing together leading voices in advocacy, research, and integrative health.

Our headline speakers include:

• Aaron Siri, Esq. – Medical freedom attorney

• Del Bigtree – Investigative journalist and host of The HighWire

• Dr. Toby Rogers – Researcher and public health analyst

Seats are limited, and the Summit is expected to sell out. Reserve your spot today and be part of a transformative weekend of education, empowerment, and community.
REGISTER HERE (https://ahsconference.com/?mc_cid=7c9f3f326e&mc_eid=UNIQID)

About Autism Health Inc.
Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events, research, and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.
DONATE HERE (https://autismhealth.com/donations/?mc_cid=7c9f3f326e&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance! For more information about Autism Health, visit www.AutismHealth.com
(https://track.pstmrk.it/3s/track.pstmrk.it%2F3s%2Ftrack.pstmrk.it%252F3s%252Ftrack.pstmrk.it%25252F3s%25252Ftrack.pstmrk.it%2525252F3s%2525252Ftrack.pstmrk.it%252525252F3s%252525252Ftrack.pstmrk.it%25252525252F3s%25252525252Ftrack.pstmrk.it%2525252525252F3s%2525252525252Ftrack.pstmrk.it%252525252525252F3s%252525252525252Ftrack.pstmrk.it%25252525252525252F3s%25252525252525252Ftrack.pstmrk.it%2525252525252525252F3s%2525252525252525252Ftrack.pstmrk.it%252525252525252525252F3s%252525252525252525252Ftrack.pstmrk.it%25252525252525252525252F3s%25252525252525252525252Fwww.AutismHealth.com%25252525252525252525252Fb43o%25252525252525252525252FD_6-AQ%25252525252525252525252FAQ%25252525252525252525252Fa5b69cac-ff7c-4ec9-aac6-44b40fec951c%25252525252525252525252F7%25252525252525252525252FoVEfE-VS5D%252525252525252525252Fb43o%252525252525252525252FxRTAAQ%252525252525252525252FAQ%252525252525252525252Fc672640d-97e5-43e3-8630-7c85d7d3632b%252525252525252525252F7%252525252525252525252FLYuCcxT524%2525252525?mc_cid=7c9f3f326e&mc_eid=UNIQID

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.
http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6d4f501b43-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 X (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6d4f501b43-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)

Fox News Interview Sparks Trump Response After Blagojevich Blasts Pritzker, Democrats (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/12/fox-news-interview-sparks-trump-response-after-blagojevich-blasts-pritzker-democrats.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6d4f501b43-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/12/fox-news-interview-sparks-trump-response-after-blagojevich-blasts-pritzker-democrats.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6d4f501b43-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(The White House / X)
By Illinois Review

Former Illinois Gov. Rod Blagojevich returned to the national spotlight Tuesday night with a fiery appearance on The Ingraham Angle, delivering blistering criticism of Illinois Democrats and Gov. JB Pritzker while defending President Donald Trump and calling out what he described as Democratic lies and deliberate chaos.

Speaking with host Laura Ingraham, Blagojevich mocked Pritzker’s public claims of personal discipline and accused the governor of embodying what he called the Democratic Party’s dishonesty and contempt for working families.

https://youtu.be/c9AfW0Txzv4?si=ysBiRG5P7IaT_Ztb&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=6d4f501b43-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823

Former IL Governor Rod Blagojevich appears on Fox News to deliver a fiery rebuke of Illinois Democrats and Governor JB Pritzker.

“I’m calling out Gov. Pritzker, who I knew very well,” Blagojevich said. “He’s not walking five miles a day. He’s proof positive that Ozempic works. He’s not on a diet and he’s certainly not exercising.”

Blagojevich went further, tying Pritzker’s personal claims to what he described as a broader pattern of deception by Democratic leaders.

“He has the kind of contempt for exercise that he has with his deranged hatred of President Trump,” Blagojevich said.

“These lies are really what the Democratic Party has become. It’s never about solving problems. They don’t want to solve problems because they don’t want to lose the issues. They’re all about creating havoc and chaos rather than solving problems and doing things that actually improve the lives of people – like what President Trump is doing.”

clean_body: view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This IR e-Blast Powered By: Dear Peter, We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert. Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. X () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Fox News Interview Sparks Trump Response After Blagojevich Blasts Pritzker, Democrats () (The White House / X) By Illinois Review Former Illinois Gov. Rod Blagojevich returned to the national spotlight Tuesday night with a fiery appearance on The Ingraham Angle, delivering blistering criticism of Illinois Democrats and Gov. JB Pritzker while defending President Donald Trump and calling out what he described as Democratic lies and deliberate chaos. Speaking with host Laura Ingraham, Blagojevich mocked Pritzker’s public claims of personal discipline and accused the governor of embodying what he called the Democratic Party’s dishonesty and contempt for working families. Former IL Governor Rod Blagojevich appears on Fox News to deliver a fiery rebuke of Illinois Democrats and Governor JB Pritzker. “I’m calling out Gov. Pritzker, who I knew very well,” Blagojevich said. “He’s not walking five miles a day. He’s proof positive that Ozempic works. He’s not on a diet and he’s certainly not exercising.” Blagojevich went further, tying Pritzker’s personal claims to what he described as a broader pattern of deception by Democratic leaders. “He has the kind of contempt for exercise that he has with his deranged hatred of President Trump,” Blagojevich said. “These lies are really what the Democratic Party has become. It’s never about solving problems. They don’t want to solve problems because they don’t want to lose the issues. They’re all about creating havoc and chaos rather than solving problems and doing things that actually improve the lives of people – like what President Trump is doing.” CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE () CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE ON FACEBOOK AND "LIKE" AND SHARE WITH YOUR FRIENDS () CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE ON X AND "LIKE" AND SHARE WITH YOUR FRIENDS () IR editor-in-chief Mark Vargas, left, and general counsel Scott Kaspar were honored to be part of the Christmas celebration at the White House, prior to President Donald Trump's national address on December 17, 2025. name: Becky C., Advocates Council
subject: We swing the pendulum of history
body:
Multiply your impact 5X | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121864953/590828961/1141910609?sourceid=1151051&utm_campaign=26emjge-1213aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDk1MGI1Ny0zMWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-SVUBkc5gdzH0UqMlIiP4i0zYcfq2xnuj3lMejp7Ks=&emci=43321019-62df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=7d950b57-31e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=954237)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,

I always felt it was common sense that reproductive rights are essential human rights.

[Today, I am gobsmacked that young people today have vastly fewer reproductive rights and options than I did growing up.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121864954/590828962/1141910609?sourceid=1151051&utm_campaign=26emjge-1213aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDk1MGI1Ny0zMWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-SVUBkc5gdzH0UqMlIiP4i0zYcfq2xnuj3lMejp7Ks=&emci=43321019-62df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=7d950b57-31e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=954237)

My belief in reproductive rights drove me to get involved at an early age in this work. I made the decision to donate to the Center for Reproductive Rights because of their dedication to addressing reproductive rights as _human rights._

We are at a moment when these rights you and I care so deeply about are under attack, at levels often unfathomable. [But I believe we can swing the pendulum of history with the actions we take today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121864955/590828963/1141910609?sourceid=1151051&utm_campaign=26emjge-1213aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDk1MGI1Ny0zMWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-SVUBkc5gdzH0UqMlIiP4i0zYcfq2xnuj3lMejp7Ks=&emci=43321019-62df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=7d950b57-31e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=954237) All gifts will be matched 5X multiplying your impact for reproductive freedom until December 31. | [FUEL THE FIGHT 5X](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121864956/590828964/1141910609?sourceid=1151051&utm_campaign=26emjge-1213aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDk1MGI1Ny0zMWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-SVUBkc5gdzH0UqMlIiP4i0zYcfq2xnuj3lMejp7Ks=&emci=43321019-62df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=7d950b57-31e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=954237)
---
We lose so much potential as a society as long as reproductive rights are not recognized as human rights and protected as such. That is why I am a proud member of the _Advocates Council,_ because I believe the Center has the expertise, dedication, and courage to lead us forward.

This is a long-term, multi-generational fight—one that will require all of us to fight for what we believe in. [Will you pitch in before 2025 ends? All gifts will be multiplied 5X, so your impact goes even further.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121864957/590828965/1141910609?sourceid=1151051&utm_campaign=26emjge-1213aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDk1MGI1Ny0zMWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-SVUBkc5gdzH0UqMlIiP4i0zYcfq2xnuj3lMejp7Ks=&emci=43321019-62df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=7d950b57-31e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=954237)

Together, we can swing the pendulum of history and build a future where reproductive rights are rightfully recognized as essential, unalienable human rights. Thank you in advance for your support.

Sincerely,

Becky C.
_Advocates Council_ Member
[DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121864958/590828966/1141910609?sourceid=1151051&utm_campaign=26emjge-1213aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDk1MGI1Ny0zMWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-SVUBkc5gdzH0UqMlIiP4i0zYcfq2xnuj3lMejp7Ks=&emci=43321019-62df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=7d950b57-31e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=954237)

# Trump's "Golden Fleet" warship unveiled
In a push to reclaim U.S. shipbuilding supremacy amid China's dominance, the Navy **[unveiled plans for a new FF(X) warship class](https://substack.com/redirect/b19871a6-9de3-4884-a683-a0b16c14b243?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** under President Trump's "Golden Fleet" initiative, targeting the first vessel's readiness by 2028.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b19871a6-9de3-4884-a683-a0b16c14b243?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Navy Fleet Critically Undersized** : The U.S. Navy's small surface combatant fleet stands at just one-third of the needed size, prompting urgent action through the new shipbuilding program.
* **HII Leads Construction Effort** : Huntington Ingalls Industries in Virginia will build the FF(X) using the Legend-class cutter as its base, focusing on modular upgrades as threats evolve.
* **Contractors Face Performance Pressure** : Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth warns contractors to speed up weapons development or lose contracts, following recent cuts to the Constellation-class frigate orders due to delays.
* **China Outpaces U.S. Dramatically** : China holds 53% of global shipbuilding capacity (versus America's 0.1%,) with its top firm producing more tonnage last year than the entire U.S. industry since World War II.

# Gold and Silver smash records AGAIN
Gold and silver prices soared to **[fresh all-time highs for the second straight day](https://substack.com/redirect/fc02ab7f-ff00-47f7-ae57-a1b8926c5d6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** amid fears of an AI bubble and Fed uncertainty, with experts forecasting continued climbs as safe-haven demand surges.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fc02ab7f-ff00-47f7-ae57-a1b8926c5d6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Prices Hit Specific Peaks:** Gold futures reached $4,530.80 per ounce while silver topped $70.80, marking significant intraday milestones in the ongoing rally.
* **Year-Long Metals Surge:** Both metals have climbed dramatically throughout 2025, repeatedly breaking records due to persistent investor interest in hedges.
* **Global Debt Drives Rise:** Exploding worldwide debt levels are fueling the uptrend, as under-owned assets like gold protect against currency debasement.
* **Expert Eyes $6,000 Gold:** CIO David Neuhauser predicts gold could climb to $6,000 per ounce, signaling potential for prolonged gains ahead.

## [These "Hard Asset Superheroes" reign in the age of debt and uncertainty ](https://substack.com/redirect/9c8d5d25-2a23-4c33-a444-52e643a241e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [The Capitalist](https://substack.com/profile/333697867-the-capitalist)| | *
---|---|---
| Oct 11
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9c8d5d25-2a23-4c33-a444-52e643a241e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[The world is drowning in debt and investors are seeking refuge in assets that promise stability amid economic turmoil. The so-called "debasement trade"--a strategic pivot toward hard assets like precious metals - and more recently Bitcoin - as hedges against fiat currency erosion--has gained unprecedented momentum.](https://substack.com/redirect/9c8d5d25-2a23-4c33-a444-52e643a241e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# US Economy Surges 4.3% Shocking Experts
The U.S. economy **[exploded at a 4.3% annualized growth rate](https://substack.com/redirect/2cf30e1a-bd50-420e-9077-7f93ebeaeb37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in the third quarter, smashing economists' 3.2% forecasts, a delayed Commerce Department report revealed Tuesday amid fallout from the recent government shutdown.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2cf30e1a-bd50-420e-9077-7f93ebeaeb37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Consumer Spending Drives Growth** : Personal consumption jumped 3.5% in Q3, up from 2.5% previously, bolstering overall expansion alongside boosts from exports and government outlays.
* **Inflation Signals Intensify** : The PCE price index climbed 2.8% while core hit 2.9%, both exceeding prior readings and the Fed's 2% goal, with chain-weighted prices up 3.8%.
* **Corporate Profits Explode** : Businesses saw earnings rise $166.1 billion or 4.2%, a sharp rebound from Q2's meager $6.8 billion gain.
* **Markets Shrug Off Data** : Backward-looking figures elicited minimal reaction, with stock futures dipping slightly and Treasury yields holding firm.

* * *
* * *
# Instacart axes AI pricing after outrage
Instacart **[halted its AI-driven pricing tests](https://substack.com/redirect/6161d22f-50f2-4415-ade1-6c4885c39f3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Monday after a Consumer Reports study exposed up to 7% cost variations for identical groceries, drawing lawmaker rebuke and FTC scrutiny over shopper trust.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6161d22f-50f2-4415-ade1-6c4885c39f3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Eversight Tech Acquired** : Instacart bought the $59 million software in 2022 to help retailers test price reactions and boost sales.
* **No Personal Data** : Instacart denied using individual user info for tests, rejecting labels like surveillance or dynamic pricing.
* **Retailer Price Control** : Instacart emphasized stores set app prices, with experiments limited to a few partners.
* **Separate FTC Settlement** : Instacart agreed to $60 million refunds for deceptive subscription ads, denying wrongdoing in unrelated claims.

* * *
* * *
# Lego accelerates its F1 revolution plans
In a bold push for diversity in motorsports, **[Lego announced it will sponsor](https://substack.com/redirect/6cec225a-da62-4347-9fe7-90aa92a93245?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/6cec225a-da62-4347-9fe7-90aa92a93245?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)an all-female F1 Academy car and Dutch driver Esmee Kosterman starting in 2026, expanding its hit Formula 1 partnership to shatter gender barriers.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6cec225a-da62-4347-9fe7-90aa92a93245?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Partnership Launches Brick Sets** : Lego introduced licensed F1 car models across Duplo, standard, and Technic lines, featuring team liveries for all ages and skill levels.
* **Activations Thrill Race Fans** : A life-size pink Lego Cadillac with chauffeured drivers was on display at the Las Vegas Grand Prix, while brick trophies were awarded at the British Grand Prix at Silverstone has boosted the immersive experiences.
* **Revenue Surges From Collaboration** : Lego's first-half 2025 revenue hit $5.4 billion, up 12%, fueled partly by F1 sets amid ESPN's record 1.3 million average viewers.
* **Synergies Drive Fan Growth** : Executives highlight mutual audience expansion, with F1's female fan base rising as Lego promotes inclusivity through authentic motorsport support.

Happy Holidays!

As we close out the year, I want to personally thank you for your continued support.

This time of year always reminds me of why I do this work. It’s for every part of our community in Illinois’ 13th Congressional District -- farmers, veterans, families, immigrants, teachers, and so much more. I go to Washington to go to bat for you and your interests.

So right now, I want to wish you a happy holiday season -- however you celebrate. I hope you are able to spend meaningful time with your loved ones and reflect on the year.

Your support means everything. I’m grateful to stand shoulder to shoulder with you in this fight, and looking ahead to 2026, I know you have my back.

Thank you,

Nikki

clean_body: | = = Happy Holidays! As we close out the year, I want to personally thank you for your continued support. This time of year always reminds me of why I do this work. It’s for every part of our community in Illinois’ 13th Congressional District -- farmers, veterans, families, immigrants, teachers, and so much more. I go to Washington to go to bat for you and your interests. So right now, I want to wish you a happy holiday season -- however you celebrate. I hope you are able to spend meaningful time with your loved ones and reflect on the year. Your support means everything. I’m grateful to stand shoulder to shoulder with you in this fight, and looking ahead to 2026, I know you have my back. Thank you, Nikki | = | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. name: Derek Tran
subject: From my family to yours, happy holidays!
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121865264/590830201/-1516755731?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjFjYjIwOWYtMzFlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NLBx0Hq6EY-Gua_j9at9QOEAQYRG147EqzQuiKq4X0Y=)
Hi friend,

As we close out the year, I want to take a moment to personally thank you.

Running for office is tough, but being surrounded by a community that shows up, speaks out, and believes in building something better makes all the difference. I’m deeply grateful for your support, and for the chance to represent a district that reflects the heart and grit of Orange County.

From my family to yours, we’re wishing you peace, joy, and time to recharge this holiday season.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121865266/590830212/-1516755731?refcode=em-12.23.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjFjYjIwOWYtMzFlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NLBx0Hq6EY-Gua_j9at9QOEAQYRG147EqzQuiKq4X0Y=)
No matter how you celebrate, I hope the next few days bring you rest and time with the people you love. And as we look ahead to an election year that’s going to demand a lot from all of us, I’m grateful to know we’re in this fight together.

Happy holidays,

Derek

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Happy Holidays!
body:
|
#
Hi friend, Happy Holidays! I wanted to extend my warmest wishes to you and family, and I hope you’re all enjoying being together during this time. Joseph and I are looking forward to spending time with the kids, slowing down a bit, and soaking up those moments that matter most. As the year comes to a close, I just wanted to say thank you. This campaign is possible because of folks like you – whether you’ve donated, shared an update with a friend, or simply stayed engaged along the way. I’m deeply grateful to have your support and to be part of a community that cares so much about making mid-Michigan a fairer, stronger place to live. Looking ahead to the new year, I’m excited to keep building on the work we’ve started together. There’s a lot more to do, and I’m grateful to be in this fight with you. Thank you, Kristen
---

name: The Flyover
subject: Our Funding Round Is Closing Next Month
body:
Over 60% of shares are spoken for. Bonus shares available through year-end.

---
| | |
---
| |
#
---
Dear _Flyover_ Reader, I'm writing to you personally because this is important -- and because I don't want you to miss an opportunity that may not come again. You may have seen the "Own _The Flyover_ " message in today's edition. I wanted to follow up directly because our current funding round is closing next month, and we believe it will fill. More than 60% of the round is already subscribed. Once it's closed, that's it -- there won't be additional shares available in this offering. As we head toward the end of the year, we're making a strong [end-of-year push](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskbGO3CAQhp8Gd7syg23sgiKK426zKSJFqRCGwSbCsAK8q7x95Nyurrnyqim-mU_z6_91kRflvAvLd7WhKDZKg8ZpVdDIgI_ssRRMMu7J7sG4sKR4zKx9zC4sQUIN7YnCCZj8Otnd-_d72lRGWERAVqGgvOta2rUNVKvQteVzNwx6gGG2DbW14nRm1NAeLUNdOXGIKQCjQw10OPPOAJ971XPe9jjMpKnRuBLT-U90oaxo_d94x3TWcau8WEu5ZcK-EJgITC7cMZcPNg_Mpr1sMsc9aSRsHF__E-gOsKFx-0bYeH0ENKcLGqeeSKvtptwSCBunN-cLxFAwFMLGb9ffP_a80icomA7Vz-k6yiMctFUS5vZw3rvccdLUy6ac_x-ifH4ddwH_AgAA__-zeKmD). Quite simply, we'd love to welcome as many _Flyover_ readers as possible become owners before the calendar turns.
* * *
**An End-of-Year Bonus for Readers** To make that easier, we're extending our bonus shares through the New Year:
* +10% End-of-Year Bonus Shares
* +5% Reader Bonus Shares
-> 15% total bonus shares, with additional bonuses available for larger investments

This bonus is available only while shares remain and as part of this year-end push.
* * *
**What Reader-Owners Have Already Made Possible** _The Flyover 's_ growth this year has been extraordinary -- and it was made possible by [readers who stepped up and became owners:](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskbGO3CAQhp8Gd7syg23sgiKK426zKSJFqRCGwSbCsAK8q7x95Nyurrnyqim-mU_z6_91kRflvAvLd7WhKDZKg8ZpVdDIgI_ssRRMMu7J7sG4sKR4zKx9zC4sQUIN7YnCCZj8Otnd-_d72lRGWERAVqGgvOta2rUNVKvQteVzNwx6gGG2DbW14nRm1NAeLUNdOXGIKQCjQw10OPPOAJ971XPe9jjMpKnRuBLT-U90oaxo_d94x3TWcau8WEu5ZcK-EJgITC7cMZcPNg_Mpr1sMsc9aSRsHF__E-gOsKFx-0bYeH0ENKcLGqeeSKvtptwSCBunN-cLxFAwFMLGb9ffP_a80icomA7Vz-k6yiMctFUS5vZw3rvccdLUy6ac_x-ifH4ddwH_AgAA__-zeKmD)
* Over $3.1 million invested
* More than 2,100 investors
* Reader growth from ~1.5M to 3.6M+ in one year
* 73% year-over-year revenue growth
* 88% year-over-year gross profit growth
* Podcast launched from zero to nearly 500,000 monthly views/listens

This didn't happen by accident. It happened because readers believed in building something different -- and backed it.
* * *
**Why This Matters** Legacy media continues to lose trust, lose audience, and lose relevance -- doubling down on bias, spin, and click-driven outrage. _The Flyover_ is doing the opposite. In 2025, we put legacy media on notice by building one of the fastest-growing, fact-first, common-sense news sources in America -- for people who are tired of being lectured to, manipulated, or misled. If you believe news should inform, not inflame...
If _The Flyover_ has become part of your daily routine...
If you want to help build the alternative millions of Americans are looking for... This is your opportunity to become an owner before the end of the year -- and before this round closes next month. 👉[ Own _The Flyover_ -- Click here to invest](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskbGO3CAQhp8Gd7syg23sgiKK426zKSJFqRCGwSbCsAK8q7x95Nyurrnyqim-mU_z6_91kRflvAvLd7WhKDZKg8ZpVdDIgI_ssRRMMu7J7sG4sKR4zKx9zC4sQUIN7YnCCZj8Otnd-_d72lRGWERAVqGgvOta2rUNVKvQteVzNwx6gGG2DbW14nRm1NAeLUNdOXGIKQCjQw10OPPOAJ971XPe9jjMpKnRuBLT-U90oaxo_d94x3TWcau8WEu5ZcK-EJgITC7cMZcPNg_Mpr1sMsc9aSRsHF__E-gOsKFx-0bYeH0ENKcLGqeeSKvtptwSCBunN-cLxFAwFMLGb9ffP_a80icomA7Vz-k6yiMctFUS5vZw3rvccdLUy6ac_x-ifH4ddwH_AgAA__-zeKmD) Thank you for reading, for supporting honest journalism, and for considering becoming part of this mission. Warm regards,
Cole
CEO, _The Flyover_
* * *

clean_body: Over 60% of shares are spoken for. Bonus shares available through year-end. | | | | | Dear Flyover Reader, I'm writing to you personally because this is important -- and because I don't want you to miss an opportunity that may not come again. You may have seen the "Own The Flyover " message in today's edition. I wanted to follow up directly because our current funding round is closing next month, and we believe it will fill. More than 60% of the round is already subscribed. Once it's closed, that's it -- there won't be additional shares available in this offering. As we head toward the end of the year, we're making a strong . Quite simply, we'd love to welcome as many Flyover readers as possible become owners before the calendar turns. An End-of-Year Bonus for Readers To make that easier, we're extending our bonus shares through the New Year: +10% End-of-Year Bonus Shares +5% Reader Bonus Shares -> 15% total bonus shares, with additional bonuses available for larger investments This bonus is available only while shares remain and as part of this year-end push. What Reader-Owners Have Already Made Possible The Flyover 's growth this year has been extraordinary -- and it was made possible by Over $3.1 million invested More than 2,100 investors Reader growth from ~1.5M to 3.6M+ in one year 73% year-over-year revenue growth 88% year-over-year gross profit growth Podcast launched from zero to nearly 500,000 monthly views/listens This didn't happen by accident. It happened because readers believed in building something different -- and backed it. Why This Matters Legacy media continues to lose trust, lose audience, and lose relevance -- doubling down on bias, spin, and click-driven outrage. The Flyover is doing the opposite. In 2025, we put legacy media on notice by building one of the fastest-growing, fact-first, common-sense news sources in America -- for people who are tired of being lectured to, manipulated, or misled. If you believe news should inform, not inflame... If The Flyover has become part of your daily routine... If you want to help build the alternative millions of Americans are looking for... This is your opportunity to become an owner before the end of the year -- and before this round closes next month. 👉 Thank you for reading, for supporting honest journalism, and for considering becoming part of this mission. Warm regards, Cole CEO, The Flyover | Equity crowdfunding investments in private placements, and start-up investments in particular, are speculative and involve a high degree of risk and those investors who cannot afford to lose their entire investment should not invest in start-ups. It’s the middle of the holiday season, Peter, and we want to know what’s on your holiday wishlist for our future.
Is it...

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: Shaving the edges of the electorate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Any voter suppression -- based on skin color, location, age, or otherwise -- is worth fighting against. Full stop.
Our fundamental right to vote needs to be inviolable to fulfill the promise of our democracy. RUSH $25 or more right now to make every vote count and every voice heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122325_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
TPM: Inside the GOP’s Assault on Youth Voting Rights [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122325_2&amount=25]
Team, we'll be blunt: The lies about a “ stolen ” 2020 election are still being used to justify “ election integrity ” efforts that are stripping Americans, particularly certain vulnerable populations, of their fundamental democratic rights.
We've seen this in the dismantling of the Voting Rights Act (VRA), it is part of the ongoing hyper-partisan redistricting efforts across the country, but the least visible front is the widespread assault on youth voting rights.
New “ voter integrity ” laws have hit college-age voters particularly hard across the country, but especially in states like North Carolina, Indiana, and Ohio. Cleta Mitchell, a lawyer, fundraiser, and Trump ally, has gone state to state, spreading the lies about the 2020 presidential election and calling for banning voting on college campuses, rolling back same-day voter registration, and ending the practice in some states of automatically mailing ballots to registered voters.
These are all attacks on youth voting. It's clear that opponents of voting rights see suppressing the youth vote as a key pillar in their attempts to hold onto power in perpetuity.
We need to spread the word and protect our fundamental right to vote regardless of age, but the corporate media isn't paying attention. Will you pitch in with $25 or whatever you can today to help us spread the word and fight back against these suppressive laws? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122325_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122325_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122325_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122325_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122325_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122325_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122325_2&amount=35]
Youth voting rights were part of the post-WWII expansion of voter inclusion and were realized through the 1971 passage of the 26th Amendment, which lowered the voting age from 21 to 18 and banned discrimination based on age in ballot access.
Even President Richard Nixon declared that “ America’s new voters, America’s young generation ” would bring “ moral courage ” and “ a spirit of high idealism ” to the country. It seems vengeful partisans in his party would rather win elections than uphold the ideals of our democracy.
These new state laws restrict basic election modernization tools that a new generation of voters expects, such as online voter registration or curing — essentially correcting minor errors — on vote-by-mail ballots. These bills ban polling places on college campuses and prevent voters from using their student I.D. — with their picture on it — as proof of identity. And some states are even considering physical residency time requirements, which would suppress college students who live both at school and at home with their parents.
Opponents of voting rights aren't going to stop their work to suppress their way to victory until we make them stop. Support our efforts to protect our fundamental right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122325_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122325_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122325_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: We need people like Bobby in Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter,
It's Ruben.
When I ran for this seat, I made it clear we needed leadership that truly represented us and our values – leaders who would stand up for affordable healthcare, better jobs and wages, and our democracy.
I stand by it. As the Trump administration continues its assault on our constitutional rights, and families across the country bear the brunt of Republican-led chaos, we need leaders in Congress who won’t back down when the going gets tough. **That’s why I couldn’t be prouder to support my friend, Bobby Pulido, in his congressional run for Texas’ 15th District.**
[SUPPORT BOBBY](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-bp-em.IsbVUv&refcode=em251223-1-160&t=1&akid=4051%2E734936%2EgW0_5G)
You may know him from his music, a distinct but familiar Tejano sound that made its way into our car radios, living rooms, and family get-togethers. What you may not know about him is his deep commitment to his faith, family, and community in South Texas, as well as his drive to make his community a place of opportunity where every family can thrive.
**These are all values that connect us and what we need more of in Washington. TX-15 is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and flipping it could mean regaining power in Congress.[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll join me in supporting Bobby’s campaign with a contribution of $10 or whatever you can give today:](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-bp-em.IsbVUv&refcode=em251223-1-160&t=2&akid=4051%2E734936%2EgW0_5G)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: President Trump
subject: re: Please confirm receipt of this email...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
I’m going to attempt to receive a response, but this might be your final chance.
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

subject: Two very different categories
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
There are two very different kinds of politicians right now

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121865972/590832783/1357372322?refcode=email_122325_categories&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGYxNDdiZC0zMmUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AWaS79cDXX4xz8pIglimhlcp89mjNKRuCaohjZL2uS8=) **_[It’s Sharice. Can you chip in a donation to help me — and every family who calls Kansas home — keep fighting back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121865973/590832784/1357372322?refcode=email_122325_categories&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGYxNDdiZC0zMmUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AWaS79cDXX4xz8pIglimhlcp89mjNKRuCaohjZL2uS8=)_** | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121865974/590832785/1357372322?refcode=email_122325_categories&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGYxNDdiZC0zMmUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AWaS79cDXX4xz8pIglimhlcp89mjNKRuCaohjZL2uS8=)

Listen, there are two very different kinds of politicians in our government right now: The ones who treat elected office like a job — and the ones who treat it like an audition.
I’m proud to be part of the first category. For years, I’ve stayed focused on the issues that really matter, not the partisan talking point of the day.
That’s how I helped create thousands of clean-energy jobs here in KS-03, secure millions of dollars to support early childhood education, and enact the most significant gun safety law in a generation.
But right now, far too many politicians are proud members of the _other_ category. Instead of focusing on what matters, they’re focused on... everything else.
Unfortunately, that mindset has spread all the way to the Kansas GOP. Instead of helping families pay their bills, extreme Republicans in Topeka are focused on one thing, and one thing only: _Kicking me out of office — all because Donald Trump told them to._
Let’s be real: Kansas Republicans know they can’t win here in KS-03 unless they cheat. So they’re trying to stack the deck and pray that Kansans won’t notice.
**That’s why I need your help. I know I’ve leaned on this team so many times over the years. But this moment — right here, right now — is just as important as every Election Day we’ve faced before.**
**_[Please, can you chip in and help me show these politicians that this team is ready to fight and win for Kansas? I can’t keep this seat blue without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121865975/590832786/1357372322?refcode=email_122325_categories&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGYxNDdiZC0zMmUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AWaS79cDXX4xz8pIglimhlcp89mjNKRuCaohjZL2uS8=)_**

name: Adem T. Bunkeddeko
subject: Grateful for this early momentum and wishing you a joyful holiday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adem for New York
body:
https://www.adembunkeddeko.com/ [https://www.adembunkeddeko.com/]
Peter,
As the year comes to a close, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you.
Over the past few weeks, we officially launched our campaign for New York State Comptroller and the response has been deeply encouraging. From conversations across the state to early press coverage and the energy we’ve felt in rooms large and small, it’s clear that New Yorkers are ready to reimagine what this office can be.
Together, we’re showing how public finance can be more than a tool for oversight — it can be a force for accountability, opportunity, shared prosperity, and the public good.
I’m incredibly grateful to everyone who has reached out, shared ideas, offered encouragement, or simply taken the time to learn more about this campaign. Early momentum like this matters and it’s because of you.
As we head into the holidays, I hope you’re able to rest, reflect, and spend time with the people who matter most. I’m excited for what’s ahead in the new year and honored to be building this effort alongside such a thoughtful, engaged community.
Wishing you and your loved ones a joyful holiday season and a strong start to the year ahead.
With gratitude,
Adem
Paid for by Adem for New York
Adem for New York
P.O. Box 130-427,
Brooklyn, NY 11213
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/qsoiMJoRDk2ALJbXbYe3DA2?unsubscribedata=YFITUC4SNYQWUEYTPbgK31VQomX92TeXdj%2Fn9oJ5JbRH1lHYRgXVHf0UQx3CB%2FbCqp%2B%2FW8a7bPREBw0AuhpDwC8z65fTioDgAQ2nwLJv6I7rJxyQNjvxl0fljmPERHmpVrHdTjRWgtUwiWYvtDwU3Cv72%2FAYWDXJQnKBIdCBExAgX7LVidVwksdHSjdUWZNUO4Ax12o2PUBxi7vj%2BwVbyaKWqkHH3BmUweTCq0bOE%2B3Q29cRPClL4%2BxThOGioKxppX%2FEzvX7pei4AtZnMvdq1Fhwe%2BL%2FO7sYyivrHEbesLCvho3TGxckzWgH%2BgcpNknH%2FxgbDBihjBgdG1NAFBNcQerZZjPtHsgFBs2ba%2FZGtYypp%2FFEoJth%2BFYW5Dehc%2F5DoiA0eeXfx8Q0bN7zfgTDrIb2E6QcUTy2lWIs76N2bHnP3JFpQwxmaxCdl4n3Jc1n .

I’m excited for what’s ahead in the new year and honored to be building this effort alongside such a thoughtful, engaged community. Wishing you and your loved ones a joyful holiday season and a strong start to the year ahead. With gratitude, Adem Paid for by Adem for New York Adem for New York P.O. Box 130-427, Brooklyn, NY 11213 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

body:
Your input will directly shape our message and strategy heading into 2026 – one of the most critical elections for Democrats in history.
#

**What are some of the top issues in your community right now?** As 2025 comes to a close, we want to hear more about what’s going on in your immediate community, your priorities for 2026, and whether or not you trust your elected leaders to take action. The survey is just five questions. It takes less than five minutes. And anything you’re willing to share will give us a direct look into the everyday lives of Americans all across the country. name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: RFK Jr.'s latest decision is dangerous.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
As a doctor, I can't stay quiet about this: [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121866739/590835288/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODA1ZDAxNC0zNmUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lCAgyWH1qDpiCwkzwTPSWyST8LzSAr4_MtLjREqhl2c=&emci=8bc43275-86db-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=0805d014-36e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

I've sounded the alarm on Robert F. Kennedy Jr. many times, Peter, but this latest news should concern everyone.

In an unprecedented move, RFK Jr. and his panel of anti-science extremists have just eliminated the recommendation that all newborns receive the Hepatitis B vaccine. Once again, he's working to stop parents from giving the care their children need at their most vulnerable stage of life.

I want to be very clear: **RFK Jr. is anti-vaccine. Period.**

At his confirmation hearings, he pledged to _"follow the science,"_ but every action he has taken since has been a slap in the face to decades of medical research and public health progress.

As a pediatrician, I've given the Hep B vaccine to countless newborns. I've sat with new parents, answered their questions, and reassured them with the facts: _This vaccine is safe, it's effective, and it protects children from a harmful and potentially lifelong disease._

**Anyone who tells you otherwise is simply wrong.** And that includes RFK Jr. When leaders choose ideology and conspiracy theories over evidence and children's health, real people get hurt. We need leaders who will fight for our kids, defend science, and put the health of families first.

[**That starts with flipping the House and putting a check on this administration before more damage is done. clean_body: As a doctor, I can't stay quiet about this: Peter, I've sounded the alarm on Robert F. Kennedy Jr. many times, Peter, but this latest news should concern everyone. In an unprecedented move, RFK Jr. and his panel of anti-science extremists have just eliminated the recommendation that all newborns receive the Hepatitis B vaccine. Once again, he's working to stop parents from giving the care their children need at their most vulnerable stage of life. I want to be very clear: RFK Jr. is anti-vaccine. Period. At his confirmation hearings, he pledged to "follow the science," but every action he has taken since has been a slap in the face to decades of medical research and public health progress. As a pediatrician, I've given the Hep B vaccine to countless newborns. I've sat with new parents, answered their questions, and reassured them with the facts: This vaccine is safe, it's effective, and it protects children from a harmful and potentially lifelong disease. Anyone who tells you otherwise is simply wrong. And that includes RFK Jr. When leaders choose ideology and conspiracy theories over evidence and children's health, real people get hurt. We need leaders who will fight for our kids, defend science, and put the health of families first. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States
