name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m grateful, Peter
body:
Couldn’t do this without you.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)
Hi Peter — _I want to say thank you._ I know you’re probably tired of seeing all my requests for your donation coming through your inbox (I wish I didn’t have to send them so often, either). But in a race this close, every dollar counts. Emails like this one are our best way of earning your financial investment. Although I will have to **[ask for your support](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3230?t=7&akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)** today as well — we have a huge end-of-quarter filing deadline in 8 days, after all — **my first priority today is to make sure you know how truly grateful I am.** The outpouring of support our campaign has received so far has surpassed all my hopes. We are in a strong position in this toss-up race, and that’s all because of the momentum we’re building together. You know, when I ran for public office the very first time in Nash County, NC, there were a lot of folks who had my back. Nash County is where I grew up. People there knew me and trusted me to do right by them. Without their help, I never could have won that first election. **The stakes are even higher now, and I’m humbled to say that more and more of you are putting your faith and trust in us every day. You are the reason that I know that we can win the most competitive U.S. Senate race of 2026.** In a race of national importance like this one, I don’t get as many chances to thank enough supporters personally, so it’s important to me to share my appreciation now. _Thank you._ Peter, if you’ve been thinking about making a donation to our campaign, it would mean a lot if you could do so right now. We set a big goal for this filing deadline — a million dollars. That’s what we need to raise to take on my far-right opponent, who has dark-money groups and PACs lined up and ready to spend _hundreds of millions_ against me. And after this deadline, we’ll need to file a public report, so falling short really isn’t an option. We can’t give the GOP that kind of opportunity to seize the momentum. **[Please, give anything that fits in your budget. Your investment in our campaign is what will make it possible for us to succeed.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3230?t=8&akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3231?t=9&akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3232?t=10&akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3233?t=11&akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)
---
[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3234?t=12&akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3235?t=13&akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3236?t=14&akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)
---
Thank you very much,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3230?t=15&akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=16&akid=207%2E124072%2EaMMY1C)

name: DNC HQ
subject: Logging off, Derek?
body:
---
Derek, We know this is a busy time of year, so we hope you’ll give us just a minute of your time before you log off for a well-deserved holiday break. First, we wanted to say _thank you_ for your support this year. Democrats won over 150 races this year — and overperformed in even more. We couldn’t have done that without supporters like you stepping up where you could, when you could. And with your help, we’ll build on those wins next year to take back Congress. To do that, we need to hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal — and we’ll be honest with you: We are running out of time. [**So before you log off today, we have to ask: Can you make a $7 contribution to support the DNC and our mission to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2026?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251223_5582_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5582_22930333_SORklo&akid=5582%2E22930333%2ESORklo) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251223_5582_fr&refcode2=5582_22930333_SORklo&akid=5582%2E22930333%2ESORklo)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20251223_5582_fr&refcode2=5582_22930333_SORklo&akid=5582%2E22930333%2ESORklo)**
---

| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20251223_5582_fr&refcode2=5582_22930333_SORklo&akid=5582%2E22930333%2ESORklo)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20251223_5582_fr&refcode2=5582_22930333_SORklo&akid=5582%2E22930333%2ESORklo)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20251223_5582_fr&refcode2=5582_22930333_SORklo&akid=5582%2E22930333%2ESORklo)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251223_5582_fr&refcode2=5582_22930333_SORklo&akid=5582%2E22930333%2ESORklo)**
---
****
With a critical election year starting in a matter of days, your support now is more critical than ever before — and a contribution now will go further than it will in six months, because it will allow us to make the necessary early investments we’ll need to win races up and down the ballot.
We know you may not have opened this email planning to make a contribution, but we hope this note has shown you how important your support is, especially right now.
Thank you for everything, and happy holidays!
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/24cb4c63-0708-436e-8c75-dc207d0092aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So as you must know, CBS News, run by Bari Weiss, who has a similar amount of news experience to Kid Rock's days without chlamydia psittaci, has become state tv. No different than Fox.
And it was proven this past Sunday night when CBS **banned** from its _60 Minutes_ tentpole show an expose proving The Trump Administration is lying about something horrific: **outsourced torture carried out with American money, American authority, and deliberate deniability**.
This suppressed **60 Minutes** investigation documents how hundreds of Venezuelan men--many with **no criminal records** --were deported not to their home country, but to **CECOT** , El Salvador's notorious "terrorism confinement center." This has got to be a crime against humanity.
For a group of people who have distinguished themselves with their incompetence, dumb-as-a-syphilitic-rock sensibilities and pure cruelty, this fits the pattern. I dunno, maybe Trump will have to return his prestigious FIFA Peace Award.
To get back to the sickening details: the prisoners were shackled, publicly humiliated, and subjected to months of physical, psychological, and sexual abuse. Guards allegedly beat detainees with batons, forced them into prolonged stress positions, denied clean water and medical care, and confined them in pitch-black isolation cells where prisoners were beaten repeatedly.
Survivors describe the experience not as imprisonment, but as **systematic torture. AND this is all being done in OUR name, folks. It is repulsive.**
This is not an isolated foreign human rights scandal. It is a **U.S. policy story**.
According to the report, the United States paid El Salvador millions of dollars to house the men--after branding them "terrorists" under a revived wartime authority that doesn't even have a whiff of due process. Independent investigations found that **nearly half had no criminal history** , and only a tiny fraction had ever been convicted of violent offenses.
U.S. government databases themselves contradict the claims used to justify their removal. In other words: **the U.S. sent people it knew were likely innocent into conditions it had already documented as torturous.**
**These fucking people are monsters.**
That is why this video should not merely be watched--it should be **[downloaded and preserved](https://substack.com/redirect/91730199-49fc-4ef5-8883-d130410d074f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.

* * *
Broadcast segments disappear. Links break. Platforms quietly remove "sensitive" content. Trump's piss-cotton candy hair stains documents.
What survives are copies people choose to keep and share. This footage represents **primary evidence** : survivor testimony, corroborated by satellite imagery, open-source video analysis, internal records, and prior U.S. State Department findings. It is the kind of documentation that later becomes indispensable--to journalists, historians, lawyers, and accountability efforts.
It is the kind of thing that keeps Stephen Miller awake as he's hanging upside down trying to sleep during the day.
Sharing this video is not about partisan politics. It is about refusing normalization of these atrocities. Torture does not become acceptable because it happens offshore. It does not become legal because it is labeled "immigration enforcement." And it does not become invisible simply because it is hidden behind euphemisms like "third-country transfers."
If Americans believe torture is wrong, then silence is complicity.
[Download the video](https://substack.com/redirect/91730199-49fc-4ef5-8883-d130410d074f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Save it. Share it with family and friends. History has shown us--again and again--that the most dangerous crimes are not the ones committed in secret, but the ones carried out **in plain sight, with public consent assumed**.
This is one of those moments.

I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you. Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW... But I know you haven’t abandoned me. I’m reaching out because YOUR NAME is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you. I know that you have never abandoned me and the MAGA Movement, but it’s been a while since I’ve heard from you... Please, I know that you’re a very busy person, but I could really use your response to some important questions that I have for you. I have always taken into account YOUR thoughts, and I need them now more than ever. THANK YOU. \- President Donald J. name: Forward Party
subject: Forward Wrapped! 2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | | | | |

---
| | | | |
---
| | |

---
| | |

---
| | | |
---
| |

---
| |
---
THIS IS A MOVEMENT, NOT A SPECTATOR SPORT

Thank you for showing up when it would have been easier to tune out. Thank you for believing that our politics doesn’t have to be this broken. And, thank you for helping prove, once again, that there is a growing community of Americans who want solutions over slogans and people over parties.

| |
---
WHAT WE BUILT TOGETHER THIS YEAR

2025 was the year Forward refined and scaled the model.

We didn’t just grow, we built real infrastructure : state leadership, ballot access, organizing capacity, and a candidate pipeline that proves independent-minded leadership isn’t a niche idea. It’s a national force.

| | | | | |
---
| | | Forward-aligned elected officials serving across 24 states.

---
| | | | |
---
| | Forward-aligned elected officials serving across 24 states.

---
| | | | | |
---
| | | candidates endorsed in 2025 with 26 wins.

---
| | | | |
---
| | candidates endorsed in 2025 with 26 wins.

---
| | | | | |
---
| | | candidate applications submitted since January 1, 2025

---
| | | | |
---
| | candidate applications submitted since January 1, 2025

---
| |
---
EXPANDING THE MAP

Forward’s footprint expanded meaningfully in 2025 .

| |
---
We now have ballot access in Arizona (via the Arizona Independent Party), Colorado, Connecticut, Florida, South Carolina, Utah, and Minnesota, with additional political entities or recognized status in California, Massachusetts, New Mexico, Nevada, North Carolina, and Texas.

Our strongest “turbo-charged” states, with robust leadership and organizing, include Maryland, Minnesota, Pennsylvania, and Virginia, while dozens more states are accelerating or emerging with new leadership teams.

This is how durable movements are built: state by state, community by community

| |
---
CANDIDATES AND LEADERS TO KNOW

Forward is attracting serious, credible leaders who take governing seriously and believe collaboration beats chaos.

This year, we were proud to elevate candidates like:

| |
---

A GROWING, DIVERSE MOVEMENT

Forward is powered by people, and that base grew significantly this year:

| |
---
| | | | Our committees now include nearly 1000 active members, spanning veterans and military families, women, young Forwardists, Black voters, Hispanic and Latino voters, with new AAPI and Native American initiatives launching in 2026\. College chapters expanded to campuses from Rutgers to BYU, Cornell to Duke, and beyond.

---
| | | | |
---
| | | Our committees now include nearly 1000 active members, spanning veterans and military families, women, young Forwardists, Black voters, Hispanic and Latino voters, with new AAPI and Native American initiatives launching in 2026\. College chapters expanded to campuses from Rutgers to BYU, Cornell to Duke, and beyond.

---
| | | |
---
| |
---
A MOVEMENT, NOT A MOMENT

What makes Forward different isn’t just what we believe, it’s how we show up.

This year, we saw Forwardists, Forward Democrats, Forward Republicans, and independents working side by side. We saw first-time candidates step forward and experienced leaders choose courage over comfort. We saw volunteers knock doors, text voters, host meetups, organize campus chapters, build coalitions, and create community in places where politics had previously pushed people apart.

Forward candidates and supporters showed that Americans don’t want more chaos or culture wars, they want leaders who take governing seriously and are willing to work with anyone to get results.

| |
---
GRATEFUL FOR YOU

Politics can be exhausting. We know that. And the fact that you chose to invest your time, energy, and trust in Forward means more than we can adequately put into words.

| |
---
LOOKING AHEAD

We’re entering the new year with clarity, confidence, and momentum.

There is more work to do — more candidates to recruit, more voters to reach, more barriers to break down — but we are stronger because of what we built together this year.

If 2025 showed us anything, it’s this:

| |
---
Thank you for believing in something better.
Thank you for helping prove that people-first politics can win.
And thank you for moving this country, and our democracy, forward.

With deep gratitude,

The Forward Party Team

| [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_wrapped_2025&n=1) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_wrapped_2025&n=2) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_wrapped_2025&n=3) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_wrapped_2025&n=4) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_wrapped_2025&n=5) Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. name: The VoteVets PX
subject: MORE MERCH: 250 - STILL NO KINGS - HOODIES - SWEATERS - SHIRTS - STICKERS - SIGNS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
#
Well, we sold out of the blue 250 hats. Well done.
But 250 years is still a lot to be proud of — no matter who sits in the White House. We’re going to celebrate our democracy next year by giving MAGA members of Congress the boot and retaking our majorities. **And while we’re doing it, we’ll be wearing this.**
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/19369?t=1&akid=34838%2E3013755%2E4ctBVt)
Trump might think he’s a king. He’s known for delusions of grandeur and a penchant for gold. But there are still no kings in the United States, and there never will be if we do our jobs next year.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/19370?t=2&akid=34838%2E3013755%2E4ctBVt)
[**If you haven’t given up on our country yet and you’re ready to make sure every boot licking MAGA weirdo knows it, pick up your 250 STILL NO KINGS merch here. Use the code FREESHIP25 so you can ship it home for free.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/19371?t=3&akid=34838%2E3013755%2E4ctBVt)
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/19375?t=4&akid=34838%2E3013755%2E4ctBVt)
But move quick, because these are going to go fast.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/19372?t=5&akid=34838%2E3013755%2E4ctBVt)

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=34838%2E3013755%2E4ctBVt).

body:
Yesterday, Emily asked about your hopes for 2026, and your responses are giving us that hopeful feeling that’s been missing for too much of the past year 😄

| Peter, what is this feeling? Is it HOPE?! 😮 Yesterday, [_**Emily asked about your hopes for 2026**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121867146/590836622/-480779055?contactdata=1pMsAKsCYXgGfnZTZZ8NR42Sd0v4XRLMq2LrbI6VcWVVDYWVN3KxCz1y+XtFl4jundSvcbqGydePwshlU8MFPEBf1cPI0sXjDQtY47Lx5RuFR1jDBYiRWC1KkT7VdOM8UK5m4jWdw2O0OaCMcs80ZdcCBSiXTdy4rBdmMAMj/6E=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.23_HopesFollowup_30do_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2IxODQxOC0zOWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLx_1Tejnp1gonp4UW-LugbdWkwtJNutC4Ga7xR5KDo=&emci=afb18418-39e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b3b18418-39e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=23483442), and your responses are giving us that hopeful feeling that’s been missing for too much of the past year 😄 A few of our faves: • Marilyn from Renton hopes for _**“complete change in this government leadership to one of competency, compassion, and justice.”**_ • Ronald from Bremerton hopes that _**“Democrats retake the House and Senate and this Administration starts being held accountable for their lawlessness.”**_ • Elizabeth from Tacoma hopes for _**“an expansion of union rights and a better life for working people.”**_ • Beatrice from Tracyton hopes for _**“less turmoil, good news, less hate, less fear, and exiting the grocery store for less than $100.00.”**_ Now, it’s your turn. Please share what you hope for in 2026 – and together, we can turn it into a reality! [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121867147/590836623/-1744008630?contactdata=1pMsAKsCYXgGfnZTZZ8NR42Sd0v4XRLMq2LrbI6VcWVVDYWVN3KxCz1y+XtFl4jundSvcbqGydePwshlU8MFPEBf1cPI0sXjDQtY47Lx5RuFR1jDBYiRWC1KkT7VdOM8UK5m4jWdw2O0OaCMcs80ZdcCBSiXTdy4rBdmMAMj/6E=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.23_HopesFollowup_30do_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2IxODQxOC0zOWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLx_1Tejnp1gonp4UW-LugbdWkwtJNutC4Ga7xR5KDo=&emci=afb18418-39e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b3b18418-39e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=23483442) Thank you so much 💙 – Team Emily
* * *
**PREVIOUS EMAIL:** Peter, **With a few days left in the year, I am asking you to fill out our quick end-of-year survey.** **→ _[What are your hopes for 2026?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121867148/590836624/-1744008630?contactdata=1pMsAKsCYXgGfnZTZZ8NR42Sd0v4XRLMq2LrbI6VcWVVDYWVN3KxCz1y+XtFl4jundSvcbqGydePwshlU8MFPEBf1cPI0sXjDQtY47Lx5RuFR1jDBYiRWC1KkT7VdOM8UK5m4jWdw2O0OaCMcs80ZdcCBSiXTdy4rBdmMAMj/6E=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.23_HopesFollowup_30do_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2IxODQxOC0zOWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLx_1Tejnp1gonp4UW-LugbdWkwtJNutC4Ga7xR5KDo=&emci=afb18418-39e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b3b18418-39e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=23483442)_** [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121867149/590836625/-1744008630?contactdata=1pMsAKsCYXgGfnZTZZ8NR42Sd0v4XRLMq2LrbI6VcWVVDYWVN3KxCz1y+XtFl4jundSvcbqGydePwshlU8MFPEBf1cPI0sXjDQtY47Lx5RuFR1jDBYiRWC1KkT7VdOM8UK5m4jWdw2O0OaCMcs80ZdcCBSiXTdy4rBdmMAMj/6E=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.23_HopesFollowup_30do_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2IxODQxOC0zOWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLx_1Tejnp1gonp4UW-LugbdWkwtJNutC4Ga7xR5KDo=&emci=afb18418-39e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b3b18418-39e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=23483442) I don’t need to tell you that 2025 has been a tough year (that’s an understatement). My first year in Congress was one of the wildest and strangest in American history. But the active, consistent engagement from supporters like you was a bright spot. Whether you came to town halls, responded to surveys, or replied to emails like this one, you truly embodied the saying: **“Democracy is not a spectator sport.”** As we close out the year, here are a few of my hopes for 2026: 🌟 We will end the GOP healthcare crisis and bring down health insurance premiums for millions of Americans. 🌟 My Republican colleagues will start acting like the Republicans I grew up with – committed to the Constitution, not any one person. 🌟 We will elect a new generation of Democratic leaders: folks like Jo Mendoza, Manny Rutinel, Marni von Wilpert, Denise Powell – and maybe even a Democrat in the Yakima Valley! 🌟 My neighbors will be safe from ICE abuses, and every person in the Northwest Detention Center will be treated with respect and dignity. 🌟 And of course, in November 2026, we will take back the House, replace Speaker Mike Johnson, and get to work for working people. (That includes campaign finance reform!) [_**Those are a few of (the MANY) things on my mind – how about you? Take our one-question survey about what you’re hoping for in 2026 →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121867150/590836626/-480779055?contactdata=1pMsAKsCYXgGfnZTZZ8NR42Sd0v4XRLMq2LrbI6VcWVVDYWVN3KxCz1y+XtFl4jundSvcbqGydePwshlU8MFPEBf1cPI0sXjDQtY47Lx5RuFR1jDBYiRWC1KkT7VdOM8UK5m4jWdw2O0OaCMcs80ZdcCBSiXTdy4rBdmMAMj/6E=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.23_HopesFollowup_30do_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2IxODQxOC0zOWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLx_1Tejnp1gonp4UW-LugbdWkwtJNutC4Ga7xR5KDo=&emci=afb18418-39e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b3b18418-39e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=23483442) Thank you so much for everything you do 💙 – Emily | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121867151/590836627/131447847?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.23_HopesFollowup_30do_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2IxODQxOC0zOWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLx_1Tejnp1gonp4UW-LugbdWkwtJNutC4Ga7xR5KDo=&emci=afb18418-39e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b3b18418-39e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=23483442) Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. clean_body: Yesterday, Emily asked about your hopes for 2026, and your responses are giving us that hopeful feeling that’s been missing for too much of the past year 😄 | Peter, what is this feeling? Is it HOPE?! 😮 Yesterday, , and your responses are giving us that hopeful feeling that’s been missing for too much of the past year 😄 A few of our faves: • Marilyn from Renton hopes for “complete change in this government leadership to one of competency, compassion, and justice.” • Ronald from Bremerton hopes that “Democrats retake the House and Senate and this Administration starts being held accountable for their lawlessness.” • Elizabeth from Tacoma hopes for “an expansion of union rights and a better life for working people.” • Beatrice from Tracyton hopes for “less turmoil, good news, less hate, less fear, and exiting the grocery store for less than $100.00.” Now, it’s your turn. Please share what you hope for in 2026 – and together, we can turn it into a reality! Thank you so much 💙 – Team Emily PREVIOUS EMAIL: Peter, With a few days left in the year, I am asking you to fill out our quick end-of-year survey. → I don’t need to tell you that 2025 has been a tough year (that’s an understatement). My first year in Congress was one of the wildest and strangest in American history. But the active, consistent engagement from supporters like you was a bright spot. Whether you came to town halls, responded to surveys, or replied to emails like this one, you truly embodied the saying: “Democracy is not a spectator sport.” As we close out the year, here are a few of my hopes for 2026: 🌟 We will end the GOP healthcare crisis and bring down health insurance premiums for millions of Americans. 🌟 My Republican colleagues will start acting like the Republicans I grew up with – committed to the Constitution, not any one person. 🌟 We will elect a new generation of Democratic leaders: folks like Jo Mendoza, Manny Rutinel, Marni von Wilpert, Denise Powell – and maybe even a Democrat in the Yakima Valley! 🌟 My neighbors will be safe from ICE abuses, and every person in the Northwest Detention Center will be treated with respect and dignity. 🌟 And of course, in November 2026, we will take back the House, replace Speaker Mike Johnson, and get to work for working people. (That includes campaign finance reform!) Thank you so much for everything you do 💙 – Emily | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. | | My friend, As we celebrate the birth of Jesus this week, I want to wish you and your family a very Merry Christmas. This season is a time to reflect on the birth of Jesus Christ. Each year, I am touched by the words of the Angel as it proclaimed the birth of our Savior to the shepherds... _"Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace, good will toward men." _ I hope this Christmas brings you peace, joy, and meaningful time with those you love most. From my family to yours, Merry Christmas and Happy New Year. **\- Glenn Grothman**
---

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. []() 🔵If DC became the 51st state, 700,000 Americans would get representation in Congress AND we’d gain 2 more Democratic Senators!

clean_body: | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending Citizens United state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, If you would like to unsubscribe, 🔵 Chuck Schumer, Jasmine Crockett, Joe Biden, and Elizabeth Warren all want Washington, DC to become the 51st STATE! []() 🔵If DC became the 51st state, 700,000 Americans would get representation in Congress AND we’d gain 2 more Democratic Senators! 🔵 Donald Trump and the GOP HATE the idea of DC becoming a state because it would WRECK their far-right agenda. | | | | | | | DC has a larger population than Vermont and Wyoming but they have absolutely 0 voting representation in Congress... It’s disgusting! Trump and his GOP are opposed to DC Statehood because they’re afraid of Democracy and giving power back to the people! But, we can’t stand by and idly watch for another second — we’re pulling out ALL the stops to win this fight. | | | | | | Let's get this done, Fight For Reform | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Mele Kalikimaka and Hauʻoli Makahiki Hou, During these stressful times, Leighton and I try to find joyfulness every day. He likes to watch basketball games and old movies on TCM; I like to do artsy things like making paper, greeting cards, and beaded “sisters in solidarity” bracelets that are gender-inclusive to give to others. During this holiday season, rest, rejuvenate, and relax with family and friends. Recharge too, since 2026 will present more challenges and obstacles for all of us to persevere, confront, and overcome. Stay safe, be kind. — Mazie and Leighton

clean_body: | Mele Kalikimaka and Hauʻoli Makahiki Hou, During these stressful times, Leighton and I try to find joyfulness every day. He likes to watch basketball games and old movies on TCM; I like to do artsy things like making paper, greeting cards, and beaded “sisters in solidarity” bracelets that are gender-inclusive to give to others. During this holiday season, rest, rejuvenate, and relax with family and friends. Recharge too, since 2026 will present more challenges and obstacles for all of us to persevere, confront, and overcome. Stay safe, be kind. — Mazie and Leighton Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Reaching out personally

body:
Republicans have been spending big in Georgia ... and much earlier than usual.

| Hi Peter, it’s Jon.

If you’ve been considering chipping in to my reelection campaign, now’s the time. I’ll explain more in just a moment, but if you’re ready to join the fight right now, you can split a donation between my reelection campaign and Linda Sánchez here: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-san-ossoff-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-12-23_1 &amount=25**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121867986/590840089/1184209682?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-12-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2JjZjg2Yi0zYWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QblFs2jqYOqdVlCmxc0y3bvPXCvTYkffneOBFuFoSOM=)

Here’s the deal: Republicans have been spending big in Georgia ... and much earlier than usual. They’re already running ads to attack me and lie about my record because they know flipping this Democratic Senate seat is their best chance to lock in a pro-MAGA Senate majority for the long-term.

There’s no doubt about it: I’m the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot in the midterm elections.

_But I have you, Peter._

Together, we’ve built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history, and in 2021 that organization won Georgia and the Senate majority.

Now, I need you more than ever: **I am literally MAGA’s #1 target.**

Yes, this election will be tough.

But we know how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before.

Let’s do it again.

So if you can, please chip in any amount to my campaign and Linda Sánchez today. Here’s the link again: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-san-ossoff-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-12-23_1 &amount=25**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121867988/590840090/1184209682?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-12-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2JjZjg2Yi0zYWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QblFs2jqYOqdVlCmxc0y3bvPXCvTYkffneOBFuFoSOM=)

Thank you,

Jon

name: Marc Elias
subject: re: Republican extremism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121868057/590840282/-248329304?refcode=em-12.23.25-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGJiNjNmYy0zOWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XG3646kNWEU_UET61QCYboAbQGvSahjIXGA-rRMR5FQ=) Hi there, it’s Marc Elias. I’m proud to be one of the leading lawyers in the ongoing fight to defend democracy and protect voting rights in the face of Republican extremism. Right now, we’re seeing Donald Trump and his cronies launch an assault on our government and the rule of law. They’re spreading dangerous lies, attacking our institutions, and working to undermine our democracy for _their_ own gain. **But here’s the truth: We’re not going to let them get away with it.** My friends at the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State are standing up to these ongoing threats, but they can’t do this alone. They need Democrats like you in this fight, friend. That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation to DASS today. Your support – right now – will help Democrats defend democracy in the courtroom and stop attacks on our elections. Here’s a good link to donate: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-q4-2025**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121868062/590840286/-248329304?refcode=em-12.23.25-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGJiNjNmYy0zOWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XG3646kNWEU_UET61QCYboAbQGvSahjIXGA-rRMR5FQ=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121868067/590840291/-248329304?refcode=em-12.23.25-rs&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGJiNjNmYy0zOWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XG3646kNWEU_UET61QCYboAbQGvSahjIXGA-rRMR5FQ=)**

null: RFK Jr. has absolutely no business anywhere near our public health system. Here’s why:
**👉 **He _fired_ the CDC director and replaced key health leaders with anti-vaccine extremists.
💉 He _canceled_ vaccine campaigns and downplayed deadly measles outbreaks as cases surged across the country.
🧬 He _shut_ down critical mRNA vaccine research, halting work on pediatric cancer, HIV, and public health innovation.
😷 He’s _blamed childhood vaccines and prenatal Tylenol for autism_ – even as real experts call his claims junk science.
📉 And his agency laid off hundreds of CDC staffers, crippling our response to the respiratory illness season.
Enough is enough, null.
**This isn’t just incompetence. It’s an attack on our health, our safety, and our future. It’s why Haley****Stevens introduced articles of impeachment against him.[_Now, we're calling on 100 respondents from 18326 to let us know what you think. Tell us before midnight, null:_](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10701?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1701%2E49239%2EpaasNZ)**

Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. Dear Friend,As we head into the final days of the year, we want to take a moment to thank you for being part of the Governing Group community. Your support makes it possible for us to back thoughtful, capable candidates who are committed to good governance and getting things done.As we look ahead to 2026, we also want to share two quick updates:**Thinking about running for office?
** The filing period for the 2026 election cycle is **January 2 through January 8**. If you’ve ever considered serving your community, next week is the moment to take that step. We would love to hear from you!**Stay connected with Governing Group
** Stay up to date with all the latest from Governing Group on your favorite social media platform. You’ll receive regular reminders about election deadlines and updates on how you can support Governing Group candidates across the state.As we close out the year, your end-of-year contribution helps ensure we can continue this work in the months ahead. If you’re able, we are deeply grateful for your support.Wishing you and your family a Merry Christmas and a joyful New Year.Warmly,Governing Group

name: Team Kelly
subject: Sign Mark and Gabby’s holiday card
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Every year we like to give Mark’s supporters the chance to sign his and Gabby’s holiday card. After an especially crazy year, this one has real significance.
#

Team,
Every year we like to give Mark’s supporters the chance to sign his and Gabby’s holiday card. After an especially crazy year, this one has real significance.
Back in January, it was hard to see how we’d make it this far. It wasn’t easy, but we held onto hope, planted our feet, found courage, and fought back.
You can be proud of that. We know Mark is, and he’s so grateful you’re a part of this team.
[**So, if you’d like to send Mark and Gabby some holiday wishes, use this link and sign his card. We know it would mean a lot to him to hear from you.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/holiday-card-dec25-em/?source=em251223-1-90&akid=6309%2E6688874%2ELBKZhA)
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=.0B8tYu&refcode=em251223-1-90&t=1&akid=6309%2E6688874%2ELBKZhA)

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=6309%2E6688874%2ELBKZhA).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

## [ U.S. Justice Department sues Georgia for state's voter registration rolls ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78535&L=36734&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JzbmV3cy5jb20vYXRsYW50YS9uZXdzL3Utcy1qdXN0aWNlLWRlcGFydG1lbnQtc3Vlcy1nZW9yZ2lhLWZvci1zdGF0ZXMtdm90ZXItcmVnaXN0cmF0aW9uLXJvbGxzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWNoYXRncHQuY29tJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1uZXdzbGluayZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=28fbf397a554847b19dc6a5251b8a9e7d2cacd3cd0882cffdb292554395f0316) The U.S. Justice Department has sued Georgia, Wisconsin, Illinois and the District of Columbia, accusing them of not turning over voter registration lists requested by the Trump administration. "The law is clear: states need to give us this information, so we can do our duty to protect American citizens from vote dilution," said Assistant Attorney General Harmeet K. Dhillon of the Justice Department's Civil Rights Division. (Source: CBS News) |

clean_body: Background on Justice Department suing states for voter information | | | | | Breaking News... | December 23, 2025 ---|--- The U.S. Justice Department has sued Georgia, Wisconsin, Illinois and the District of Columbia, accusing them of not turning over voter registration lists requested by the Trump administration. "The law is clear: states need to give us this information, so we can do our duty to protect American citizens from vote dilution," said Assistant Attorney General Harmeet K. Dhillon of the Justice Department's Civil Rights Division. (Source: CBS News) | | | | Background Notes from Judicial Watch Federal courts in California and Illinois separately ruled that Judicial Watch lawsuits may proceed to force them to clean up their voter rolls. The lawsuits allege that tne states violated the National Voter Registration Act, which requires states to “conduct a general program that makes a reasonable effort to remove” from the official voter rolls “the names of ineligible voters” who have died or changed residence. | Citing a separate Judicial Watch court victory in Maryland that opened up voter rolls to public scrutiny under federal law, the court recognized that restricting the use of the state’s voter rolls presented an obstacle to upholding federal voter roll maintenance as required by the National Voter Registration Act’s. | A federal court in Oregon ruled that a lawsuit filed on behalf of Judicial Watch, the Constitution Party of Oregon, and two registered voters to force the cleanup of Oregon’s voter rolls may proceed. | | | | | FOLLOW US | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St SW Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 | © 2025 | |

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

body:
|

name: Wes Moore
subject: I was pissed off
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1106%2E1086043%2ECnlTmT)
Do you know why I ran for governor, Peter?
I was leading the Robin Hood Foundation, one of the largest poverty fighting organizations in the country, and one of our biggest priorities was tackling child poverty.
We were trying to get a governor to work with us on the child tax credit. So for 6 months, we worked hard to get a _single line_ in this governor’s State of the State speech.
But when I got an advance copy of the speech, there was **nothing in there about child poverty or the child tax credit.**
I was pissed off. I’ll never be okay with allowing so many children to grow up in poverty, and all that work seemed to be tossed out the window. I called up our organization’s head of policy, and I’ll never forget what he said to me:
“Listen, we’ve worked for 6 months to try to get him to include a line in the speech. **_But what if you could write the whole speech?_** ”
I realized I could try to convince people on things until I'm blue in the face, or I could be the one who writes the whole speech. So I ran for governor, and with the help of this grassroots team, I won.
**Now, we’re able to launch a bipartisan, all-out assault on child poverty in the state of Maryland. And I announced it in**** _my own_****State of the State.**
Peter, I love this place too much to continue slow walking progress. I love our people too much to leave the real challenges they face without solutions.
[**That’s why I’m proud of the work we’ve done so far, and why I’m asking for your help to continue. Will you chip in any amount today to power my reelection campaign?**](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251223-1.3v8WNs&amount=5&refcode=em-20251223&t=2&akid=1106%2E1086043%2ECnlTmT)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251223-1.3v8WNs&amount=5&refcode=em-20251223&t=21&akid=1106%2E1086043%2ECnlTmT)**
Because of you, we’ve already launched the first-of-its-kind effort, ENOUGH, that’s invested **over $13 million** into communities right here in Maryland to fight childhood poverty and reached more than **12,000 Marylanders** _in just its inaugural year_.
Now, we’re building on that momentum with the next phase of ENOUGH, expanding what works and doubling down on community-led solutions that give every child a real chance to thrive. ENOUGH is already committed to pouring **$19 million** in funding to continue our mission of ending childhood poverty in Maryland.
This is just the beginning.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251223-1.3v8WNs&refcode=em-20251223&t=22&akid=1106%2E1086043%2ECnlTmT)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251223&t=23&refcode2=1106_1086043_CnlTmT&akid=1106%2E1086043%2ECnlTmT)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=1106%2E1086043%2ECnlTmT)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1106%2E1086043%2ECnlTmT)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: I’ll fight for our farmers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
Our farmers deserve stability, not chaos
| [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_122325_B1_Farmer&t=2&akid=5734%2E196590%2E7QlF2z) Hi, Last week, I was honored to join the Wisconsin Farmers Union at their annual convention in Wisconsin Dells. Their concerns are my concerns -- I’m committed to protecting the tens of thousands of farms here in Wisconsin, and that means defending them against Trump’s terrible and unpredictable tariff policies that continue to threaten their livelihoods. If that’s enough to convince you to help support our campaign, you can use this link: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/mb-em-fr-dec25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_122325_B1_Farmer&t=3&akid=5734%2E196590%2E7QlF2z)** Farmers are the backbone of our economy -- they feed our state, create jobs, and are an economic engine. I’m proud to have visited farms all across our state to thank them for their work and serve as a partner to helping them thrive. Over the last year, we have seen the chaos brought on by Donald Trump's disastrous tariff policies. Equipment is more expensive for farmers, there are fewer opportunities to sell their goods. Worse yet -- many have been forced to close down because they simply can’t keep up with the rising costs. This is absolutely unacceptable. We need to protect our family farms, not with haphazard announcements from the President that lead to damage and instability. **[As Governor, I’m committed to reversing the harm Trump has caused and providing real relief to farmers-- if you’re ready to stand with me, can I ask you to chip in $15 or $27 today?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_122325_B1_Farmer&t=4&akid=5734%2E196590%2E7QlF2z)** _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6574?amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_122325_B1_Farmer&t=5&akid=5734%2E196590%2E7QlF2z)

name: Seth Moulton
subject: Republicans don't care if families lose coverage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
They are inserting themselves between patients and doctors.

| |
---
Friend, Last week, House Republicans passed a healthcare bill that leaves millions of families at risk by refusing to extend Affordable Care Act tax credits that help people afford coverage. When those subsidies expire on January 1, premiums will rise, and families will lose insurance. That is the reality facing more than 20 million Americans. Instead of lowering costs, Republicans pushed a bill that keeps politicians between patients and their doctors and makes it harder for people to get the care they need, including restricting access to abortion. This wasn’t an accident. House Republicans have now voted 13 times against extending ACA tax credits, repeatedly choosing higher premiums over affordable care. We need a serious healthcare agenda. One that lowers costs, protects coverage, and gives people real choices, including a public option so Americans can choose Medicare if they want it. Healthcare should serve patients and families, not political ideology. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121869117/590844254/465683285?refcode=251223_sm_care&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDA4NjkwMy0zZmUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ki583IJYPU64UQziH1YBVaKTgwHUnZzAbt873b7MmRM=&emci=401d92b4-77df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=24086903-3fe0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=194769) I’m running for Senate because Massachusetts needs leadership that treats healthcare like the urgent issue it is and fights for affordable, accessible care for everyone. **[If you’re with me, can you chip in $15 or whatever you can today to help us take this fight to the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121869118/590844255/2090747700?refcode=251223_sm_care_l1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDA4NjkwMy0zZmUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ki583IJYPU64UQziH1YBVaKTgwHUnZzAbt873b7MmRM=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121869125/590844262/1375639745?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=251223_sm_care&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDA4NjkwMy0zZmUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ki583IJYPU64UQziH1YBVaKTgwHUnZzAbt873b7MmRM=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121869126/590844263/1375639745?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=251223_sm_care&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDA4NjkwMy0zZmUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ki583IJYPU64UQziH1YBVaKTgwHUnZzAbt873b7MmRM=)

### About Seth Moulton

clean_body: They are inserting themselves between patients and doctors. | | Friend, Last week, House Republicans passed a healthcare bill that leaves millions of families at risk by refusing to extend Affordable Care Act tax credits that help people afford coverage. When those subsidies expire on January 1, premiums will rise, and families will lose insurance. That is the reality facing more than 20 million Americans. Instead of lowering costs, Republicans pushed a bill that keeps politicians between patients and their doctors and makes it harder for people to get the care they need, including restricting access to abortion. This wasn’t an accident. House Republicans have now voted 13 times against extending ACA tax credits, repeatedly choosing higher premiums over affordable care. We need a serious healthcare agenda. One that lowers costs, protects coverage, and gives people real choices, including a public option so Americans can choose Medicare if they want it. Healthcare should serve patients and families, not political ideology. I’m running for Senate because Massachusetts needs leadership that treats healthcare like the urgent issue it is and fights for affordable, accessible care for everyone. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you for standing with me, Seth | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

subject: Momentum like this doesn’t happen by accident
body:
And now we need to build on it

Team, momentum matters in a race like ours. And for Nellie, it just keeps building. Throughout the year, she’s been endorsed by gun violence prevention orgs like GIFFORDS and Stop Gun Violence PAC, by EMILYs List, and by Latino organizations who know she listens, shows up, and fights for her community every single day. And recently, after winning the Gubernatorial election, Mikie Sherrill endorsed Nellie. That kind of support tells a clear story. This campaign has the momentum to tell Nellie's story in every corner of this district — one of the swingiest in the entire country. With that momentum, we’re officially launching our end-of-quarter fundraising push. This is one of the most important fundraising moments of the year. What we raise now will shape how strong this campaign looks heading into the election year. Our goal is ambitious because the stakes are high. clean_body: And now we need to build on it | | Team, momentum matters in a race like ours. And for Nellie, it just keeps building. Throughout the year, she’s been endorsed by gun violence prevention orgs like GIFFORDS and Stop Gun Violence PAC, by EMILYs List, and by Latino organizations who know she listens, shows up, and fights for her community every single day. And recently, after winning the Gubernatorial election, Mikie Sherrill endorsed Nellie. That kind of support tells a clear story. This campaign has the momentum to tell Nellie's story in every corner of this district — one of the swingiest in the entire country. With that momentum, we’re officially launching our end-of-quarter fundraising push. This is one of the most important fundraising moments of the year. What we raise now will shape how strong this campaign looks heading into the election year. Our goal is ambitious because the stakes are high. We need to raise $10,000 from grassroots donors before the end of the year to keep building, organizing, and reaching voters in a district that will decide control of the House. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. subject: Our district got tougher. Here's how we can win:

Friend, MAGA has had a target on Marcy's back for years. **But time and again, we've won against long odds because Ohioans know Marcy is one of our strongest champions for working people and Heartland communities.** They haven't been able to beat us at the ballot box, so now, MAGA Republicans have redrawn our district in an attempt to gerrymander Marcy out of Congress. We won't sugarcoat it, friend: this will be one of the toughest fights we've ever faced. **On paper, our new district is about four percentage points redder than before.** But the MAGA agenda has failed working people, and more and more Ohioans are ready for a change. We're building a people-powered campaign that can reach those voters wherever they are, in every corner of our new district. clean_body: | | Friend, MAGA has had a target on Marcy's back for years. But time and again, we've won against long odds because Ohioans know Marcy is one of our strongest champions for working people and Heartland communities. They haven't been able to beat us at the ballot box, so now, MAGA Republicans have redrawn our district in an attempt to gerrymander Marcy out of Congress. We won't sugarcoat it, friend: this will be one of the toughest fights we've ever faced. On paper, our new district is about four percentage points redder than before. But the MAGA agenda has failed working people, and more and more Ohioans are ready for a change. We're building a people-powered campaign that can reach those voters wherever they are, in every corner of our new district. With your support, we can defend this critical battleground seat in 2026 — and if we're going to take back the House, we must. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you, Team Kaptur | | | ---|---|--- About Marcy Kaptur Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House. | = | = ---|--- Follow Marcy | | ---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Kaptur for Congress - PO Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697 Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . If you would like to get less email, [click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121869505/590845454/1079316600?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.23_Ossoff-EOQ_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWNlZTA2Ny00MWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-VOZigzsLYrN6t5Ben_x5FOCANZP8GCVHT-DNU8kbyg=&emci=cc596004-39dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3ecee067-41e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=11913588) To unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/_6DeEby01kOvxTWj8qzW6A2?unsubscribedata=QRLSGFT6XoAllAO6L7s1NxY%2FztyRjitBBAoLiWTyig7N0RQyTIe%2FnvI9hMj23SxXwiZFt1cCXNl7rIy7mjN7wbUt1oVsQX9EZCnkN6oe%2FFj8dzDa9R5LsIPOOjsBBtNsQweegJT7zbMKlTAkdTAudvkN0xA1RIuE57gpAB5aTT6NpFrfHiHamUer%2FRQ5qTFTn2QPXfIFDkpMSYBAk18sBY1aIDprS7iQHscCy%2BjBdhYRyFWhLS0k6MmrmYcT25LUGrEVZyAyw9%2F9%2F8Wh5oTwatNOdSWmJwSbRRvqvmSxbAKdw1T0%2FLa9R3xF2NcthtQZkNtqM9iCgWX02dyQMgUWDoxCy27YrHyWYeh4%2FfC8FwKJZgarzQVFRYpFJzceeWJ1ywoJ6KTX3ri3hPQjDPk%2FtO16cbmmWn7OUQbViEpSSerQVIJzj6K0qceXWRmt%2Be6Z)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121869506/590845455/1918270835?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.23_Ossoff-EOQ_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWNlZTA2Ny00MWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-VOZigzsLYrN6t5Ben_x5FOCANZP8GCVHT-DNU8kbyg=) _Let me lay this out, clear as day:_

I am the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024.

This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.

**[If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight –– please split $5 between my reelection campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121869507/590845456/1918270835?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.23_Ossoff-EOQ_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWNlZTA2Ny00MWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-VOZigzsLYrN6t5Ben_x5FOCANZP8GCVHT-DNU8kbyg=)** | | [ SPLIT A DONATION ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121869508/590845457/1967428710?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.23_Ossoff-EOQ_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWNlZTA2Ny00MWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-VOZigzsLYrN6t5Ben_x5FOCANZP8GCVHT-DNU8kbyg=)
---
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.

Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.

More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.

Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.

I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.

I also ran — years before the Dobbs decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.

**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists — and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.

This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.

**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**

Now we must win again. And we will win again.

Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.

So I’m asking:

**[Please split a contribution between my reelection campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121869509/590845458/1918270835?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.23_Ossoff-EOQ_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWNlZTA2Ny00MWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-VOZigzsLYrN6t5Ben_x5FOCANZP8GCVHT-DNU8kbyg=)**

The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.

All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. clean_body: This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. If you would like to get less email, To unsubscribe, | | = Let me lay this out, clear as day: I am the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024. This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation. = | | = Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent. Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution. More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation. Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning. I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible. I also ran — years before the Dobbs decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is. Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history: He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf. Purged independent watchdogs across government. Stacked key agencies with loyalists — and called on them to investigate his political opponents. Defied and threatened federal judges. Undermined the press. Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government. This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes. In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority. Now we must win again. And we will win again. Just like last time, I can’t do it alone. So I’m asking: = The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more. All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today. | = Thanks for being part of this team. As always, Jon Ossoff | = I officially became the first woman and person of color to ever represent Delaware in the Senate. But even though our campaign is over, the work has just begun. clean_body: My investigation just uncovered something that should make every American furious: | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Peter, My investigation just uncovered something that should make every American furious: The Federal Reserve secretly handed over $600 BILLION to major banks, while you got stuck with inflation, higher prices, and economic uncertainty. No votes in Congress. No public debate. Just quiet payouts to protect their Wall Street friends while hardworking families suffered. This is exactly the kind of government corruption I came to Washington to expose. The Fed thinks they can operate in the shadows, bailing out big banks with your tax dollars while telling you that inflation is "transitory" and everything is fine. It's not fine. It's a betrayal. I've spent my career fighting the Federal Reserve's reckless monetary policies, demanding transparency, and holding them accountable to the American people. But I need your help to keep this fight going. The establishment in both parties wants to keep this quiet. They profit from the system while you pay the price. In liberty, Rand Paul | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate | | P.O.
