Fellow American - Democrats don't want this public.

After we flipped 4 seats in the United States Senate, winning back the Senate majority, Democrats and the DNC knew they needed to take a look at why they lost in 2024.

They are unburdened by past losses.

They don't want the reality of why they lost in 2024 public.

Their 2024 autopsy isn't public, but I guarantee it says something like this:

Democrats knew they lost because the Biden-Harris agenda ruined our economy. They lost because people know Democrats wouldn't secure our border. Democrats lost because they “picked” Kamala Harris without a real primary.

**They lost because the American people know the Left's radical agenda is wrong for us.**

But this doesn't mean that Democrats won't be out swinging in 2026.

They are already attacking President Trump and his most loyal defenders in the Senate. They're rushing millions of dollars into battleground Senate seats across the country.

**[Fellow American, I need your help.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=d36f6247c7764ab798014082494a8a59&_e=feMDbFMNSw3CN49VHbLs-2WUPxgvTDkeL7XTySfsGtG98KbCEj2rAVmfQ2uM6Gd3GJrooe3oEJYYQo9kS0QheXpqT_IbmCUoboq6Xm9HwWxqKVO8w8dtkmwjzQIhmYSjkdNQ3sK9skdGLKQR1ZzcF9Udcz3G4_jW2awPK3fu3Xy1YTjd-L33dWDlh53peg5WySyBqa-jm8b482zyXXSos-9PU6u754tftzR1pyffbVkzwUVmSk4ig14VsnKQQXjuVPLCK0XNlwzOkrgj45BN18StVfT2VZIcMSyP07jhnYAhvygxlXq1bZYFMZkXyUfDe1JTvkXjqaYj4FiMI4dZ_4cN63TzC38PCZVnOh_eeqWiDZlLqBLx9XD4Hdg2tdzUn-lAD7-4S-adrEmHCoMl6XlB5W4d8-y13AkKYj36_TjK29ou-qH0_JRNbADrHnFSEG82voUJMaTVTQEFYtls2tXHDn7wVXN6oCBzS9HjjqDbQFpO71rf9_Ktbg3pqpCzyMHmyjHTr1mYbREMaEPKfxfdLRHHTZwXPL71WTQzDNiLTvixJzwfipaCA_dn1cw2KQ3xdfIZrdRQlPJN-kW_z9yvSaLfsFiFCsDiaxAWbuIV8RtkHDJ9zYWp6m6l93Z1cRfgjwDvreUQlvoRlcVTvHFHkdZlU1QeEzrparkyxQqSSxYOo8zVrnSzMzylsWWVbZgu9YR92eTT6nG36GYKHopaL1pKhVPSnI5JCyJhbvU0ns6PhZe-E4HLxZRFhcOw)** Millions of dollars were spent here in Montana last year. Democrats think they can outspend us to undo 2024.

Let's prove them wrong.

**[Anything you give will help us fight back against these relentless attacks – even if it's $4 or $10.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=d36f6247c7764ab798014082494a8a59&_e=feMDbFMNSw3CN49VHbLs-2WUPxgvTDkeL7XTySfsGtG98KbCEj2rAVmfQ2uM6Gd3GJrooe3oEJYYQo9kS0QheXpqT_IbmCUoboq6Xm9HwWxqKVO8w8dtkmwjzQIhmYSjkdNQ3sK9skdGLKQR1ZzcF9Udcz3G4_jW2awPK3fu3Xy1YTjd-L33dWDlh53peg5WySyBqa-jm8b482zyXXSos-9PU6u754tftzR1pyffbVkzwUVmSk4ig14VsnKQQXjuVPLCK0XNlwzOkrgj45BN10h_dAoqL0__tjhKhazjtjdZBery6DPwxo80Zjxoh7gUJDOEJx4AQuat1mvl9kvIEsMoslaAV8UYHeJ-Wq1CJsi_Fsu7u017iYk9AwswxresLY8BgTyjN-vAmiOZZYIQM0ZmmiTeUWtRrmVQTWbyPx09ALNPg8T3m32C5ZUcedan9AElVfQionqYtxA-YsKAPzbl6fWoFbSqjvHPIviSFdHSlMDDQz7HMUfP00KtgEXvcCJvZT6LPf5LjwOia6ynLSVKulaYpZK_76ImRpzYRf0McgAxMz3rQYUFZhqmR3ObzHmUpFpkz9oaxIxMTKuqOjvbR_ZrupLshM4iyTfjfYO3QnW2H73WmzQjkKs1MrO005cYXmh-LPax4ytn_8QXXIKbSgmc6X-KffxQuydJMnQsxlB7l0pFIZ52N3PRHGQYwqRpiEFeKfURU6WAGyD5nfHPpV11u0PNt0dJ8Hi_Y5CGCo0e3h5WXI_FUA9edcOU)**

Midterms are always hard for the party in power. History says that Democrats have the upper hand, but I know with you in my corner, we can keep this seat RED.

Let's make Democrats regret not owning up to their 2024 problems.

Thanks,

clean_body: Since their 2024 Autopsy won't be public, I will make some guesses about what it could have said. | Fellow American - Democrats don't want this public. After we flipped 4 seats in the United States Senate, winning back the Senate majority, Democrats and the DNC knew they needed to take a look at why they lost in 2024. They are unburdened by past losses. They don't want the reality of why they lost in 2024 public. Their 2024 autopsy isn't public, but I guarantee it says something like this: Democrats knew they lost because the Biden-Harris agenda ruined our economy. They lost because people know Democrats wouldn't secure our border. Democrats lost because they “picked” Kamala Harris without a real primary. They lost because the American people know the Left's radical agenda is wrong for us. But this doesn't mean that Democrats won't be out swinging in 2026. They are already attacking President Trump and his most loyal defenders in the Senate. They're rushing millions of dollars into battleground Senate seats across the country. Millions of dollars were spent here in Montana last year. Democrats think they can outspend us to undo 2024. Let's prove them wrong. Midterms are always hard for the party in power. History says that Democrats have the upper hand, but I know with you in my corner, we can keep this seat RED. Let's make Democrats regret not owning up to their 2024 problems. Thanks, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Arizona is in SERIOUS trouble.

**This is no longer just a state election—it could be a tipping point for the entire country.**
That’s why I’m sounding the alarm for my friend Karrin Taylor Robson. **Karrin is a Trump-endorsed fighter — and she’s the one candidate in the race who can take this state back.**
🔴 She’ll **FOREVER** **SHUT DOWN** the border.
🔴 She’ll **REBUILD** Arizona’s economy.
🔴 She’ll **RESTORE** law, order, and integrity at every level.
_**But the Radical Left knows this too—and they’re already funneling MILLIONS into Arizona to keep control.**_

clean_body: I’m laser-focused on this one thing. | Peter, You're probably getting lots of fundraising emails. Believe it or not, I get them too! In fact, Senate Republicans recently OUTRAISED Senate Democrats, so I'm not going to give you a sky-is-falling fundraising pitch. Senate Majority Leader, I'm focused on the ONE and ONLY thing that wins elections: So, my priority right now is fixing the fact that our party's voter file isLAGGING behind the Democrats'. Look, we can be winning in the polls (we are), we can be winning by passing President Trump's agenda in the Senate and HOLDING THE LINE against Schumer's Shutdown (we are), and we can be winning in popularity over the Democrats (we absolutely are)... ...But unless we have a 100% verified voter file, we'll lose everything to the Democrats, We need to MATCH that energy and determination. We can't let Democrats take back the reins of the Senate for the second half of the Trump-Vance presidency. This state gave me everything. Now I’m giving back. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121870314/590848627/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_messagefromJJR_122325&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Y3ZTA4MTQtNDNlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=S6VBBZmQs02hEB4c2sneNbzN9g50IyOshbi2dsAhn10=&emci=219d32eb-61df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=cf7e0814-43e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=32374386)

Florida isn’t just where I live, Peter. I’m lucky to call this state my _home_. I’ve built my career standing up for people here. As a workers’ rights lawyer, I fought to make sure folks were paid what they earned. And in the State Senate, I went head-to-head with the powerful special interests that made Florida more expensive and less safe. **Every time we hold big corporations accountable, defend working families, or call out corruption, we’re taking a real step toward the Florida we all want to live in.** But right now, that progress is at risk. Our current MAGA Attorney General is siding with special interests while families deal with skyrocketing utility bills and some of the highest insurance costs in the country. **[I’m ready to fight for Florida’s future, but I can’t do it alone. Will you chip in to help us beat my self-serving opponent and make sure Florida has an Attorney General who’s willing to fight for them?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121870315/590848629/-1819093735?amount=10&refcode=em_JJR_FR_messagefromJJR_122325&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Y3ZTA4MTQtNDNlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=S6VBBZmQs02hEB4c2sneNbzN9g50IyOshbi2dsAhn10=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121870316/590848630/-1819093735?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=em_JJR_FR_messagefromJJR_122325&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Y3ZTA4MTQtNDNlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=S6VBBZmQs02hEB4c2sneNbzN9g50IyOshbi2dsAhn10=) **

clean_body: This state gave me everything. Now I’m giving back. | Florida isn’t just where I live, Peter. I’m lucky to call this state my home. I’ve built my career standing up for people here. As a workers’ rights lawyer, I fought to make sure folks were paid what they earned. And in the State Senate, I went head-to-head with the powerful special interests that made Florida more expensive and less safe. Every time we hold big corporations accountable, defend working families, or call out corruption, we’re taking a real step toward the Florida we all want to live in. But right now, that progress is at risk. Our current MAGA Attorney General is siding with special interests while families deal with skyrocketing utility bills and some of the highest insurance costs in the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Onward, Jose Javier Rodriguez = | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. name: Sen. Jacky Rosen
subject: A look at what we accomplished together this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
With 2026 just around the corner, I wanted to personally reach out to express my gratitude for all of your support this year. 2025 had its fill of challenges, and it meant the world to know you were always by my side.

That's why I also wanted to take a moment to share some of the highlights from the work and accomplishments you helped fuel this year:
**✅ Holding Trump and his administration accountable.**
* All year, I’ve been hammering **Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth** for his lack of qualifications and mismanagement – and I just called on him to resign after one of his directives may very well have been a war crime.

* I’ve been fighting back against the harm inflicted on working families under Trump’s tax and spending bill – which is nothing more than **a big, ugly betrayal** of the American people, gutting Medicaid and SNAP for millions.

* I also tried to get the Senate to pass legislation opposing Trump’s attempt to pay himself **$230 million** from the Justice Department, but Republicans blocked it. So I helped introduce a bill to make it illegal.

**✅ Fighting for affordability.**
* In addition to fighting **Trump’s reckless tariffs** on everything from household goods to housing construction supplies, which are raising costs for families and businesses, I also introduced the No Tariffs on Groceries Act to require congressional approval for food tariffs in order to prevent food costs from spiking.

* I introduced the Housing Oversight and Mitigating Exploitation (HOME) Act to **lower housing costs** for families by cracking down on price gouging from corporate investors.

* I helped introduce bills to guarantee **Universal Paid Leave** and **l****ower childcare costs** to make it more affordable to have a family.

**✅ Combating rising antisemitism.**
* As cofounder and co-chair of the **Senate Bipartisan Task Force for Combating Antisemitism,** I successfully pushed back against the Trump administration’s attempt to change Coast Guard policy that would’ve weakened the prohibition of swastikas and nooses as symbols of hate.

* I introduced the Holocaust Education and Antisemitism Lessons (HEAL) Act to strengthen **Holocaust education** and the Antisemitism Awareness Act to help **protect Jewish students** from antisemitic bigotry.

Thank you so much for being a part of this grassroots team. I appreciate your continued support, and I’m looking forward to our continued fight for progress in 2026.

Sending my warmest wishes to you and your loved ones this holiday season,

Jacky Rosen

Senate Democrats like me are the only thing standing in the way of Trump's extreme agenda that will hurt everyday Americans. That's why I need people like you on my side to help defend our progress and take back power from the GOP.

name: Yvette Martinez
subject: Wishing you a joyful holiday season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
I am deeply grateful |

---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121870336/590848711/-979043315?refcode=20251223_FR_45DO_Holidays&amount=100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2FhODA1OS00M2UwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gdilz7x9jD-1GNM9enwSlIRAqo6pxSk2wOSEcBCdVjs=) Dear friends, As we head into the holiday season, I wanted to reach out — not to ask for anything, but simply to say thank you. **2025 was unlike any year we could have planned.** When Donald Trump and his MAGA allies launched their scheme to rig the next election by manipulating congressional maps, California Democrats were suddenly faced with an unexpected, high-stakes challenge: Run and win a statewide ballot initiative to protect democracy in just a few short months. Proposition 50 was never on the calendar. There was no runway. No advance budgeting. And yet, together as California Strong Democrats, we rose to the moment. In a matter of weeks, Democrats across California ramped up a full-scale campaign: hiring organizers, mobilizing volunteers, countering misinformation, expanding our voter protection program, and talking directly with Californians about what was at stake for our democracy. _Because of your commitment, Prop 50 passed by a landslide, foiling Trump’s election-rigging plot and protecting California’s voice in Congress._ Throughout this year, whether you volunteered, organized in your community, made calls, knocked doors, shared our message, or supported this work in other ways, you showed what it means to be part of a movement that doesn’t agonize — it organizes. **We will be in touch again soon to share about our plans to flip seats and take back the House in 2026, but in the meantime I hope you’re able to rest, spend time with loved ones, and reflect on everything you helped California Democrats accomplish in 2025.** From all of us at the California Democratic Party, thank you for stepping up when it mattered most. I am deeply grateful to be in this fight alongside you. Wishing you a joyful holiday season, Yvette Martinez
Executive Director
California Democratic Party

** **

clean_body: I am deeply grateful | | = Dear friends, As we head into the holiday season, I wanted to reach out — not to ask for anything, but simply to say thank you. 2025 was unlike any year we could have planned. When Donald Trump and his MAGA allies launched their scheme to rig the next election by manipulating congressional maps, California Democrats were suddenly faced with an unexpected, high-stakes challenge: Run and win a statewide ballot initiative to protect democracy in just a few short months. Proposition 50 was never on the calendar. There was no runway. No advance budgeting. And yet, together as California Strong Democrats, we rose to the moment. In a matter of weeks, Democrats across California ramped up a full-scale campaign: hiring organizers, mobilizing volunteers, countering misinformation, expanding our voter protection program, and talking directly with Californians about what was at stake for our democracy. Because of your commitment, Prop 50 passed by a landslide, foiling Trump’s election-rigging plot and protecting California’s voice in Congress. Throughout this year, whether you volunteered, organized in your community, made calls, knocked doors, shared our message, or supported this work in other ways, you showed what it means to be part of a movement that doesn’t agonize — it organizes. We will be in touch again soon to share about our plans to flip seats and take back the House in 2026, but in the meantime I hope you’re able to rest, spend time with loved ones, and reflect on everything you helped California Democrats accomplish in 2025. From all of us at the California Democratic Party, thank you for stepping up when it mattered most. I am deeply grateful to be in this fight alongside you. Wishing you a joyful holiday season, Yvette Martinez Executive Director California Democratic Party | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. name: Kelly Morrison
subject: Trump called me a bad doctor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morrison for Congress
body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter,
In case you missed it, Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt announced that as part of Trump’s so-called “comprehensive executive physical,” he received a “preventative” MRI. Peter, preventative MRIs are not a thing.
I — and many other physicians — felt compelled to call this out. MRIs are not standard practice, and they are not typically used for screening. They are expensive and advanced imaging studies that are used to diagnose injuries or investigate symptoms that are concerning for a serious condition. The administration should share accurate information about the President’s health.
The President’s response was this:
“Kelly, you sound like a terrible doctor — with a case of Trump Derangement Syndrome. That diagnosis is on the house.”
Screenshot of the @RapidResponse47 reply [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109390/images/screenshots/kfc-terrible-doctor.png]
Peter, I am not intimidated. The American President has the biggest bully pulpit in the world and this president, unfortunately, uses it to attack his political opponents, distort the truth, and fan the flames of division.
I worry a lot about his blatant disregard for science and evidence-based policy. This administration continues to lie, push misinformation, and skirt the law and long-standing norms to advance their agenda and profit off of the office .
I take my role as a physician legislator very seriously and feel a responsibility to be a voice for science, healthcare, and evidence-based policy. To be able to continue to fight for these issues, I need your help.
Peter, we must end the year strong. My race has caught the eye of national Republicans and in order to keep them from pouring money into MN-03 we must raise enough to run a strong campaign.
Peter, can you chip in any amount today? We are almost halfway to our end of year digital fundraising goal and every dollar counts. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=5] Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=10]
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=25] Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=50]
Donate Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
Thank you so much for your continued support, Peter.
With gratitude,
Kelly Morrison

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, In case you missed it, Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt announced that as part of Trump’s so-called “comprehensive executive physical,” he received a “preventative” MRI. Peter, preventative MRIs are not a thing. I — and many other physicians — felt compelled to call this out. MRIs are not standard practice, and they are not typically used for screening. They are expensive and advanced imaging studies that are used to diagnose injuries or investigate symptoms that are concerning for a serious condition. The administration should share accurate information about the President’s health. The President’s response was this: “Kelly, you sound like a terrible doctor — with a case of Trump Derangement Syndrome. That diagnosis is on the house.” Screenshot of the @RapidResponse47 reply [] Peter, I am not intimidated. The American President has the biggest bully pulpit in the world and this president, unfortunately, uses it to attack his political opponents, distort the truth, and fan the flames of division. I worry a lot about his blatant disregard for science and evidence-based policy. This administration continues to lie, push misinformation, and skirt the law and long-standing norms to advance their agenda and profit off of the office . I take my role as a physician legislator very seriously and feel a responsibility to be a voice for science, healthcare, and evidence-based policy. To be able to continue to fight for these issues, I need your help. Peter, we must end the year strong. My race has caught the eye of national Republicans and in order to keep them from pouring money into MN-03 we must raise enough to run a strong campaign. Peter, can you chip in any amount today? We are almost halfway to our end of year digital fundraising goal and every dollar counts. [] If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Donate $5 [] Donate $10 [] Donate $25 [] Donate $50 [] Donate Other Amount [] Thank you so much for your continued support, Peter. With gratitude, Kelly Morrison [] [] [] kellyforcongress.org [kellyforcongress.org] Email is the best way to keep our supporters up to date. If you only want to receive our most important emails, click here to receive fewer emails. [] We’d hate to see you go, but if you want you can unsubscribe here [] . Dear Moms and Friends,

We are honored to share an opportunity that has been extended to Moms for America to serve during America250, the national
commemoration of our nation’s founding.

As the home of the Declaration of Independence, the National Archives will be at the center of this historic celebration and has
invited Moms for America to help support visitors and special events throughout 2026. They are seeking volunteers in the
Washington, DC area who love this country and are willing to serve during this significant moment in our nation’s history.

This is a unique opportunity to stand in the heart of our nation’s story, represent the values we hold dear, and welcome visitors
from across the country and around the world.

Please view the flyer pdf for details. If this opportunity is for you, we invite you to review the information and consider
participating.

clean_body: The National Archives is looking for 250 Patriotic Volunteers to help our nation celebrate America 250! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] Dear Moms and Friends, We are honored to share an opportunity that has been extended to Moms for America to serve during America250, the national commemoration of our nation’s founding. As the home of the Declaration of Independence, the National Archives will be at the center of this historic celebration and has invited Moms for America to help support visitors and special events throughout 2026. They are seeking volunteers in the Washington, DC area who love this country and are willing to serve during this significant moment in our nation’s history. This is a unique opportunity to stand in the heart of our nation’s story, represent the values we hold dear, and welcome visitors from across the country and around the world. Please view the flyer pdf for details. If this opportunity is for you, we invite you to review the information and consider participating. View the Flyer [] Right now America250 is specifically looking for volunteers who can provide visitor support in the Rotunda [] and in our new exhibit spaces The American Story [] and The Discovery Center [], which just opened last month. They are also looking for individuals who can help support the guest experience for A250 related events throughout 2026. You won't want to miss a moment of this exciting experience! Interested parties can contact Peggy Grande directly at peggy.grande@nara.gov [peggy.grande@nara.gov] or email volunteer@nara.gov [volunteer@nara.gov]. Additional information and a direct link to Volunteer can also be found here []. MOMS FOR AMERICA® Empowering Moms, Promoting Liberty and Raising Patriots! [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY [] REPLY STOP to Unsubscribe [newsletter@momsforamerica.us]

“Politicians don’t get to cherry-pick their voters."
|

_Today, we're in the midst of a redistricting crisis — and our democracy needs to be actively defended every day. That's why All On The Line is now**Redistricting Action** — a grassroots movement built for the critical fights ahead. Thank you for being part of it._
President Obama is speaking out in this urgent moment for our representative democracy — and you need to hear his message, Peter:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121870857/590850735/-915636940?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_ObamaDTCResend_email_20251223-AOTL-Tier1-ObamaDTCResend_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251223-AOTL-Tier1-ObamaDTCResend_&utm_campaign=ObamaDTCResend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmOTdkNzkyLTQ2ZTAtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XSJQ7-_sADZjEoK057SWX7t_T1BJJlqc4Py0_-4XZ5s=)

This year has proven beyond a doubt that we are in the midst of a redistricting crisis like we’ve never seen before. Maps are being manipulated by extreme politicians who care only about entrenching their own power and silencing voters.
**As President Obama says, “it’s a desperate, cynical move. And it’s not how democracy is supposed to work.”**
Here’s the good news: We were built for this unprecedented moment. That’s why All On The Line is now Redistricting Action — because this isn’t just a policy fight. It’s an ongoing struggle for representative democracy, and it’s on people like us to meet this moment with action.
It requires each and every one of us to get engaged, organized, and ready to fight.
[**Join President Obama’s call by supporting Redistricting Action with a donation. Your support will fuel our vital work to defend representative democracy in America in this critical moment.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121870858/590850736/-915636940?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_ObamaDTCResend_email_20251223-AOTL-Tier1-ObamaDTCResend_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251223-AOTL-Tier1-ObamaDTCResend_&utm_campaign=ObamaDTCResend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmOTdkNzkyLTQ2ZTAtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XSJQ7-_sADZjEoK057SWX7t_T1BJJlqc4Py0_-4XZ5s=)

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240556%2E444211%2EWsC8SR)
There are 10 months left until early voting begins for the pivotal 2026 midterm elections. That may sound like a long time—but for organizers, _it’s right now._
It’s 10 months to register new voters, 10 months to train volunteers, 10 months to make calls, 10 months to host events, and 10 months to build trust in communities that have been ignored for far too long. That’s less than a year to turn people power into real wins up and down the ballot.
That’s why we’re asking: [**will you maximize your impact and stick with Powered by People for the next 10 months by becoming a monthly donor?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57091?c0=pbp-em-20251223._u5vGa&refcode=ema20251223-240556&t=3&akid=240556%2E444211%2EWsC8SR)
**[BECOME A MONTHLY DONOR](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57091?c0=pbp-em-20251223._u5vGa&refcode=ema20251223-240556&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=240556%2E444211%2EWsC8SR)**
Monthly support is one of the most powerful ways to fuel our on-the-ground work—because it gives us the stability to organize year-round, not just when Election Day is around the corner. It helps us recruit and train thousands of volunteers. It allows us to register and mobilize voters, powers large-scale outreach programs, and helps us build long-term grassroots infrastructure.
This is how real change happens in Texas: people talking to people, neighbors organizing neighbors, and communities showing up.
[**Will you become a monthly donor today and help us plan ahead, expand our reach, and keep organizers on the ground doing the work—month after month?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57091?c0=pbp-em-20251223._u5vGa&refcode=ema20251223-240556&t=5&akid=240556%2E444211%2EWsC8SR)

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Sarah said I could reach out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Hi,
Congressman Greg Stanton here. My good friend and colleague, Congresswoman McBride, told me I could send you a message.
I’ve admired Sarah’s work for years. She's shown the country what it looks like when public service is rooted in community, compassion, and courage.
**She’s the kind of public servant we need more of in Congress. And the type of leader I am proud to work with every day.**
**[Donate to our campaigns](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1274?c0=mcb-em-20251223-2.k8ngdT&refcode=em20251223-2608&t=1&akid=2608%2E21716%2EHA13Rt)**
Sarah and I both know what it takes to win tough races. In fact, I represent a congressional district in Arizona that has more Republicans and more independents than Democrats. It also squarely resides in Maricopa County, the largest and most important battleground county in the United States. If Democrats don’t win seats like mine in Arizona, then we don’t win back the House majority. And President Trump gets another two years without any checks and balances.
We simply cannot let that happen. That’s why we need you.
Representing districts like mine is tough. But when I served two terms as mayor of Phoenix, I learned that these jobs are about the people you serve, not the points you score.
Like Sarah, I’ve spent my time in public office working across the aisle when it helps folks – and standing firm when our democracy, our freedoms, or our rights are on the line.
Right now, with Donald Trump back in the White House and a MAGA Congress acting like a rubber stamp, working families are getting squeezed while billionaires and big corporations cash in. It’s the same corrupt deal: the powerful win, everyone else pays.
Sarah and I are fighting back. Together, we’re pushing solutions to lower costs, protect health care, defend democracy, protect LGBTQ+ rights, and end corruption. But all of it is at risk if we’re replaced by MAGA extremists who put loyalty to one man ahead of loyalty to their constituents.
So I'm asking, humbly: [**if you’re able, will you chip in today to split a donation between our campaigns?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1274?c0=mcb-em-20251223-2.k8ngdT&refcode=em20251223-2608&t=2&akid=2608%2E21716%2EHA13Rt)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251223-2.qYZ0Z0&amount=5&refcode=em20251223-2608&t=21&akid=2608%2E21716%2EHA13Rt)**
Thank you for letting me introduce myself and for supporting leaders like Sarah who make our country better.
With gratitude,
**Greg Stanton**
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251223-2&t=22&refcode2=2608_21716_HA13Rt&akid=2608%2E21716%2EHA13Rt)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=2608%2E21716%2EHA13Rt)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=24&akid=2608%2E21716%2EHA13Rt)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2608%2E21716%2EHA13Rt)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We’ve seen what happens when Elon sticks his hands in our government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Elon Musk is back.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251223-5739-footer&t=1&akid=5739%2E420207%2EIeGuwO)
**Elon Musk is back, Peter.**
After months of drama earlier this year, **he’s started writing big checks to fund Republican House and Senate campaigns** , because billionaires _know_ that if working people have power, they lose control.
This is what it looks like when the ultra-wealthy try to rig the game. They pour money into elections, keep MAGA in charge, and block anything that threatens their profits — like lower prescription drug costs, Medicare For All, stronger worker protections, and real accountability for corporate wrongdoing.
And we’ve already seen what happens when Musk is within arm's reach of government. Under the DOGE “efficiency” agenda, the promise was savings from major cuts in federal programs, but what families got was chaos. Agencies were cut, we lost essential employees, and real people paid the price while he moved on to his next project.
I do things differently. I don’t take corporate PAC money, and I don’t rely on billionaires. This campaign runs on YOU and thousands of grassroots supporters — and heading into 2026, we need the resources to fight back against Elon and the billionaires so we can help Democrats flip the House.
[**If you’re with me, can you chip in $3, or any amount you can, to support our people-powered movement?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251223.5UkaaA&refcode=em20251223-5739&amount=3&t=2&akid=5739%2E420207%2EIeGuwO)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251223.5UkaaA&amount=3&refcode=em20251223-5739&t=21&akid=5739%2E420207%2EIeGuwO)**
Thank you,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251223-5739-footer&t=22&refcode2=5739_420207_IeGuwO&akid=5739%2E420207%2EIeGuwO)**

subject: our race is a toss-up

body:
This is yet another proof point that what we’re doing on the ground in Iowa is breaking through
Hey, it’s Rob Sand. Heartland Patriots said I could reach out because there’s been a huge development in the Iowa governor’s race, and trust me, you don’t want to miss this:
**_The Almanac of American Politics:_**
**_The Iowa Governor’s Race is rated a TOSS-UP_**
**[Split a donation!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98646?refcode=em20251223-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9845%2E614464%2Ew8ddx9)**
At the risk of sounding like a broken record, Iowa Democrats had yet _another_ special election overperformance earlier this month.
That’s five now, for those of you keeping score at home!
**Combine that with polling showing me with a narrow lead, and experts are saying we’ve got a 50/50 shot to win one of the most competitive races anywhere in the country.**
This is yet another proof point that what we’re doing on the ground in Iowa is breaking through, and there’s a clear _(yet challenging)_ path to victory here — _but only if we keep up this momentum._
**[Now that this race is officially a toss-up, I’m asking you: Will you toss in (sorry) a few bucks to support my campaign before our big end-of-year filing deadline? [](https://substack.com/redirect/0b49fb23-6d51-4e0a-bbdf-06cc8ccf06f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | POLL

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1c30c785-262b-460c-9119-129fd3522d6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

**An excellent way to display your American Pride and stand up to the woke MOB!**
**On your Boat, House or Truck, the message is clear!**
Made from 100% durable polyester, this flag is designed to withstand the elements while maintaining vibrant colors and high visibility. With its double-sided design, you can showcase it's message on both sides, ensuring that it looks great from any angle.
[Order your "Jolly Donald" flag today](https://substack.com/redirect/f24ad87e-62ab-4da6-b041-a03c8f21b94f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Joy Reid rejects Kirk 's hug offer, warns against touching Black women's hair**
Joy Reid responded to Erika Kirk's AmericaFest joke about giving her a hug and **[touching"the back of her head"](https://substack.com/redirect/b34410dd-3505-4128-a330-baf8e7c5267b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by saying "I would never let you get close enough to hug me 'cause I don't trust you," and warning "don't be offering to touch Black women's hair. We don't allow it. This is not the 19-teens. It's not the 1920s or the 1930s."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/23a07ffe-3183-428f-8df6-3d0faf975edf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Reid doubles down on Vance-Kirk "fairytale" suggestion:** Reid stood by her previous suggestion that JD Vance could leave his "Brown Hindu" wife Usha for a "White queen" like Kirk to appeal to the MAGA base, insisting "MAGA is the one doing the racism. Not me" and claiming "the ultimate MAGA fairytale would be for JD to leave Usha Vance alone and go run off with Charlie Kirk's widow."
* **Reid attacks Kirk as working single mom contradicting conservative values:** Reid told Kirk to focus on appealing to "White Christian nationalists" while questioning how she'll explain to her Turning Point USA base "why you working and not home with your children who now don't have a daddy," saying their ideology demands "your behind should be in your house" instead of "out rubbing on JD Vance's back of his head."

* * *
# **U.S. economy surges at 4.3% in Q3, beating forecasts**
The Commerce Department reported that U.S. GDP grew at a seasonally and inflation-adjusted 4.3% annual rate in the third quarter--**[the fastest pace in two years](https://substack.com/redirect/7ce0a245-d4d0-4098-941d-de89922593b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** --far exceeding economists' expectations of 3.2% growth, with the White House attributing the "blockbuster, expectation-smashing" results to President Trump's "America First trade and economic agenda."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7ce0a245-d4d0-4098-941d-de89922593b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Consumer spending and trade boost growth:** Consumer spending expanded at a robust 3.5% annual rate, up from 2.5% in Q2 and above the 2.7% expected, while Trump's trade policies contributed significantly as exports rose 8.8% and imports fell 4.7%, with corporate profits soaring at a 17.9% annual rate after adjusting for inventory pricing effects and depreciation.
* **Report delayed by shutdown, combines typical estimates:** The GDP report for the July-September period was delayed due to the government shutdown, with this "initial estimate" actually combining data typically used for both the advance and second estimates, potentially making it more reliable than usual initial readings, while the economy grew at an 8.2% rate prior to inflation adjustment.

* * *
# **Border Patrol arrests nearly 50 illegal aliens with commercial driver 's licenses in three weeks**
Between November 23 and December 12, Border Patrol agents in Southern California **[arrested 49 illegal aliens](https://substack.com/redirect/f0fa1eb5-0c37-4d13-9e54-a6af7e55fc8a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** operating semi-trucks with state-issued commercial driver's licenses at El Centro Sector highway checkpoints and during a multi-agency trucking sweep, including 30 Indian citizens and individuals from El Salvador, China, Eritrea, Haiti, Honduras, Mexico, Russia, Somalia, Turkey, and Ukraine.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f0fa1eb5-0c37-4d13-9e54-a6af7e55fc8a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **California issued majority of licenses, faces federal funding threat:** Of the 31 commercial driver's license holders encountered at border checkpoints, all 31 were issued by California, with the remainder from other states including Florida, Illinois, and New York, as the U.S. Department of Transportation threatens to withhold millions in highway funds from California after an audit revealed 25% of the state's non-domiciled commercial licenses were issued improperly, sometimes with validity exceeding immigration document expiration dates.
* **Operation launched after fatal accidents involving illegal alien truckers:** Operation Highway Sentinel was conceived and launched after several fatal accidents were caused by illegal aliens who had been issued commercial driver's licenses and were operating semi-tractor-trailers, with the multi-agency operation resulting in 38 additional arrests during a two-day period in December, while USDOT Secretary Sean Duffy signed new guidelines strengthening English language enforcement for commercial truck operators.

* * *

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/23/2025
body:
Why two House bills on medical transition procedures produced different votes
| | | | [](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.joinrmv.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.joinrmv.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.joinrmv.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
We sent a [dedicated email](https://link.email.joinrmv.) on AmFest on Sunday, but we now have a fresh, Colorado-focused look at the young conservatives who attended this weekend—[don’t miss it.](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Sharp divisions surfaced this week as lawmakers split over House bills on [medical transition procedures for minors](https://link.email.joinrmv.), exposing how process—not policy—can drive outcomes. A report confirmed Sen. Faith Winter was DUI when she [caused a fatal I-25 crash](https://link.email.joinrmv.). Elsewhere, a hockey mom [alleged retaliation](https://link.email.joinrmv.) after raising safety concerns, a Fort Lewis College student faced backlash for starting a Turning Point USA chapter but [stands firm](https://link.email.joinrmv.), and a new Colorado River report warned the region is [nearing a water crisis](https://link.email.joinrmv.) that threatens power, agriculture, and the broader Western economy.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** Nationally, a former FBI agent said the [DOJ now has a strong case against Obama-era officials](https://link.email.joinrmv.) accused of election meddling, citing evidence of politically motivated investigations against President Trump. At the same time, analysis shows [Marco Rubio’s foreign policy vision](https://link.email.joinrmv.) taking shape under Trump, signaling a tougher global stance on Iran, support for Ukraine, and pressure on socialist regimes in Latin America.
And to those who celebrate, we hope you had a meaningful and joyful Hanukkah as it came to a close yesterday. As we head into the week of Christmas, we wish you a season filled with peace, reflection, and time with the people you love. ♥️
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, December 23, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Why two House bills on medical transition procedures produced different votes](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
The U.S. House passed two bills this month aimed at restricting federal involvement in medical transition procedures for minors. They used different enforcement tools. And they produced different voting coalitions.
One bill passed without a single Republican voting against it and drew limited Democratic support. The vote on the second bill was closer, with some crossover support and a number of members listed as not voting.
Republican Rep. Gabe Evans (CD-8) backed the funding restriction but rejected the felony approach. The difference lies in how each bill was written to be enforced.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**[>From fracture to formation: What AmericaFest revealed about the next generation](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
* **AmericaFest revealed a maturing conservative generation focused on unity and action:** Despite early public infighting, young conservatives emphasized coalition over conflict, arguing that internal division only hands victories to Democrats ahead of critical elections.
* **Faith, debate, and responsibility—not outrage—are shaping next-gen leadership:** Students and activists rejected cruelty and performative politics, calling instead for grounded faith, disciplined debate, and truth-seeking without dehumanization, signaling a shift away from outrage-driven activism.
* **The next generation isn’t waiting for permission to lead:** From campus organizing to statewide activism, young conservatives showed they are already doing the work—building networks, engaging institutions, and translating urgency into participation rather than social-media spectacle.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
|
---
**[Fort Lewis College Student Stands Firm After Turning Point USA Chapter Sparks Backlash](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
* **A Fort Lewis College student stood up for free speech despite backlash:** Jonah Flynn, a senior who once identified as liberal-leaning, successfully fought to establish a Turning Point USA chapter after student government initially blocked it—reversing course only after public outcry highlighted viewpoint discrimination.
* **Campus intolerance followed the chapter’s approval:** Flynn says he’s been heckled and faced strained friendships since associating with TPUSA, underscoring how conservative viewpoints are often met with social and cultural hostility on college campuses.
* **Conviction outweighed pressure to conform:** Despite national attention and campus pushback, Flynn says he has “thick skin” and remains proud of the chapter’s presence—illustrating a growing willingness among students to challenge ideological conformity in higher education.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**Bonded in Battle — The Prayer That Holds Us Together**](https://link.email.joinrmv.) **BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 21** _As I write this, Sherrie and I are celebrating 38 years of marriage, and my thoughts turn not to the easy moments, but to the battles we’ve fought—and the quiet strength that has carried us through every one of them._

[**The warning before SPEED: How an ongoing Colorado wolf dispute shaped the permitting debate**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
**BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | DECEMBER 20** _If hope helps us wait and peace helps us stand, then joy helps us move forward. Joy can sometimes be misunderstood. People often mix it up with happiness, think it’s just an emotion, or even brush it off as silly. But joy has its own special meaning!_
[**“This is the team”: Michael Knowles at TPUSA AmFest on holding a coalition together**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
**BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 19** _The opening night of AmericaFest did not unfold as a unified rally. Disagreements among speakers played out in real time, reflecting a broader conservative fracture now visible nationally and within state parties, including in Colorado._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---
|
---
🎅🏻 **DID YOU KNOW?** The **NORAD Santa Tracker** began in 1955 after a child accidentally called the CONAD (Continental Air Defense Command) hotline, thinking it was Santa Claus—sparking a holiday tradition that continues today.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Our hearts grow tender with childhood memories and love of kindred, and we are better throughout the year for having, in spirit, become a child again at Christmastime." – Laura Ingalls Wilder
|

name: George Whitesides
subject: A quick holiday hello
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2025?refcode=em-header]
Peter,

Sending you warm holiday wishes from my family to yours.

As this year comes to a close, I’ve been reflecting on what it’s meant to serve the people of California’s 27th District in Congress. It’s been a year of real challenges, but also one filled with moments that reminded me why this work matters.

I’m deeply grateful for the trust you’ve placed in me and for the many ways you’ve shown up along the way. Whether you’ve shared your perspective, volunteered your time, or simply stayed engaged, your support has meant more than you know.

As we head into the new year, my focus remains on doing the work this district deserves and earning your trust every step of the way.

I wish you a peaceful holiday season and a healthy, happy new year.

Thank you,

George

name: Team Baldwin
subject: This is a slap in the face to our nation’s veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5160%2E35263%2EKMEZAJ)
This administration is leaving our nations’ veterans behind. [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4729?t=4&akid=5160%2E35263%2EKMEZAJ) In Wisconsin and across the country, our veterans have sacrificed for generations to protect our freedom and democracy. We owe it to our veterans to make their adjustment back to civilian life as seamless as possible, including providing accessible health care and support once they come back home. **We should all be able to agree on that, Peter.
** But this administration has already cut nearly 30,000 employees from the Department of Veterans Affairs since taking office earlier this year. With their latest proposal, we could see as many as 35,000 more positions eliminated — including doctors, nurses, and other support staff our veterans rely on. [**This is a slap in the face to every single member of our military, past or present. Tammy is fighting to protect the services our veterans rely on, but she can’t do it without your support. Can we count on you to pitch in today?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4729?t=5&akid=5160%2E35263%2EKMEZAJ) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-dec25.-J9ZHh&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20251223_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=5160%2E35263%2EKMEZAJ)

name: Josh Harder
subject: Important ask before you log off
body:
Here’s why your support matters today.
Hey Peter, it’s Josh.
Before you log off for the holidays, I have an important ask to make:

name: Meals for Our Troops
subject: You can still DOUBLE your impact for our troops
body:
Don't let our troops be forgotten this holiday season.
[](https://www.uso.org)
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[**There 's still time to deliver a holiday meal to
our military heroes serving over Christmas.**](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/A-VKBbX6_yhm/TUIrSk42MGREZTJaSzNqTEtTSHdSQmFYN1AyNER2MmJEK3BOaDRaNVA5UXdXVkVURzJaOHR1UWl2ZjBueDhITlFVaFpCa05IWGxMRHppMXR3TEhHZFpuVWhwczJXdUt0dDFpSWZwTDlxbnM9S0/M2xKOUpiYS85YnFGOVhmU1hWaWxRaDdjb2JURTBKdzF5VGV1MUdQM2Rya2swbE1KWXY2czNsR0RsamxTN1psRUp6cUhhNGl2QTR3Q2gwVVk3SDh0WFhLWjVQb3FxYk55S0)

[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/A-VKBbX6_yhm/TUIrSk42MGREZTJaSzNqTEtTSHdSQmFYN1AyNER2MmJEK3BOaDRaNVA5UXdXVkVURzJaOHR1UWl2ZjBueDhITlFVaFpCa05IWGxMRHppMXR3TEhHZFpuVWhwczJXdUt0dDFpSWZwTDlxbnM9S0/M2xKOUpiYS85YnFGOVhmU1hWaWxRaDdjb2JURTBKdzF5VGV1MUdQM2Rya2swbE1KWXY2czNsR0RsamxTN1psRUp6cUhhNGl2QTR3Q2gwVVk3SDh0WFhLWjVQb3FxYk55S0)
Dear USO Supporter,
Christmas morning for our service members will look a lot different than yours. They may wake up before dawn, eat the same breakfast they've had for weeks, run drills and plan for their next mission. If it's a good day, they'll get a five-minute shower. **[But if you're generous right now, they can receive a special holiday meal for their own celebration while serving our country far from home. ](https://links.e.uso.)**
Only hours remain to deliver holiday meals and crucial support to deployed service members who can't be with their loved ones this holiday season.
**[Please rush your gift now to provide a holiday meal and more to our troops.](https://links.e.uso.)Our goal is to provide 10,000 special holiday meals to our brave service members this Christmas.**
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/Dd9Kh-2ZA6Cg/TUIrSk42MGREZTJaSzNqTEtTSHdSQmFYN1AyNER2MmJEK3BOaDRaNVA5UXdXVkVURzJaOHR1UWl2ZjBueDhITlFVaFpCa05IWGxMRHppMXR3TEhHZFpuVWhwczJXdUt0dDFpSWZwTDlxbnM9S0/M2xKOUpiYS85YnFGOVhmU1hWaWxRaDdjb2JURTBKdzF5VGV1MUdQM2Rya2swbE1KWXY2czNsR0RsamxTN1psRUp6cUhhNGl2QTR3Q2gwVVk3SDh0WFhLWjVQb3FxYk55S0)
---
Remember, thanks to the generosity of our partners at Airbus America Inc., all gifts will be matched dollar for dollar, up to $25,000. **All gifts are tax-deductible** and can help our troops receive holiday meals and other critical supplies.
**But our records show you haven 't donated yet. **
Please join us in showing our service men and women that we honor and appreciate their service and sacrifice -- knowing they are missing special holiday meals and traditions back home.
**[With your support, our nation's heroes do not have to feel alone this Christmas. ](https://links.e.uso.)**
**[$37.50 CAN HELP FUND 1 MEAL](https://links.e.uso.)**
---
**[$75 CAN HELP FUND~~ 1 ~~ 2 MEALS](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/N-6VBp2XRrMD/TUIrSk42MGREZTJaSzNqTEtTSHdSQmFYN1AyNER2MmJEK3BOaDRaNVA5UXdXVkVURzJaOHR1UWl2ZjBueDhITlFVaFpCa05IWGxMRHppMXR3TEhHZFpuVWhwczJXdUt0dDFpSWZwTDlxbnM9S0/M2xKOUpiYS85YnFGOVhmU1hWaWxRaDdjb2JURTBKdzF5VGV1MUdQM2Rya2swbE1KWXY2czNsR0RsamxTN1psRUp6cUhhNGl2QTR3Q2gwVVk3SDh0WFhLWjVQb3FxYk55S0)**
---
**[$150 CAN HELP FUND~~ 2 ~~ 4 MEALS](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/gdYehE_PaRSD/TUIrSk42MGREZTJaSzNqTEtTSHdSQmFYN1AyNER2MmJEK3BOaDRaNVA5UXdXVkVURzJaOHR1UWl2ZjBueDhITlFVaFpCa05IWGxMRHppMXR3TEhHZFpuVWhwczJXdUt0dDFpSWZwTDlxbnM9S0/M2xKOUpiYS85YnFGOVhmU1hWaWxRaDdjb2JURTBKdzF5VGV1MUdQM2Rya2swbE1KWXY2czNsR0RsamxTN1psRUp6cUhhNGl2QTR3Q2gwVVk3SDh0WFhLWjVQb3FxYk55S0)**
---
**[I WANT TO GIVE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://links.e.uso.)**
---
Our heroes bravely rush into danger, selflessly serving our country and defending our freedom -- over and over again.
**[Please show your appreciation today by DOUBLING your gift to provide TWICE the holiday meals and support.](https://links.e.uso.)**
Thank you for making a difference for our heroes.
In support of our troops,
The USO
Airbus America Inc. is matching gifts to the USO up to $25,000 through December 31, 2025. Your contribution will be used where it is needed most.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]
